aliases: PAW Patrol - Helfer auf vier Pfoten
data.name: Paw Patrol
data.overview: PAW Patrol is a CG action-adventure for old children and preschool series starring a pack of six heroic puppies led by a tech-savvy 10-year-old boy named Ryder.

overviews.cat: "La Patrulla Peluda" és una sèrie protagonitzada per sis gossets, el Marshall, el Rubble, el Chase, el Rocky, el Zuma i la Skye, i un nen, en Ryder, de deu anys, especialista en tecnologia. "La Patrulla Peluda" lluita per mantenir fora de perill la Badia Aventures, incorporant-se a les missions més perilloses i ensenyant valors com ara la convivència, el treball en equip, l'amistat, la responsabilitat i la felicitat.
overviews.ces: Kluk Ryder vede psí smečku záchranářů známou jako Tlapková patrola. Společně plní zapeklité úkoly, aby ochránili pobřežní městečko před zkázou...
overviews.dan: En teknisk kyndig dreng og en gruppe af redningshvalpe arbejder sammen for at beskytte deres samfund.
overviews.deu: Paw Patrol ist eine Vorschulserie mit sechs heldenhaften Hunden in der Hauptrolle: Chase, Marshall, Rocky, Zuma, Rubble und Skye. Sie werden von dem 10-jährigen Technikliebhaber Ryder angeführt. Die Paw Patrol vereint Heldenmut, coole Fahrzeuge mit ganz viel niedlichem Humor. Alle haben einen kleinen Rucksack auf dem Rücken für ihre Missionen, damit sie für alles gewappnet sind – egal, ob sie eine Katze vom Baum retten oder einen Zug vor herabfallenden Steinen zu bewahren. Kein Job ist zu groß, kein Hund zu klein!
overviews.eng: PAW Patrol is a CG action-adventure for old children and preschool series starring a pack of six heroic puppies led by a tech-savvy 10-year-old boy named Ryder.
overviews.fin: Pentupoppoo säntää auttamaan! Pienet pentukaverukset elävät tavallista koirien elämää, kunnes pannan vastaanotin hälyttää. Silloin pennut rientävät Vartiotorniin Riku-pojan luokse. Koirista tulee pelastuspartio, joka rientää hätää kärsivien kansalaisten avuksi. Pennut tuovat ryhmään omat erityiskykynsä, joiden ansiosta he selviävät mistä vain - oli pelastettavana sitten kissanpentu tai kivivyöryn uhkaama juna.
overviews.fra: Ryder, un jeune garçon de 10 ans, est toujours prêt à venir en aide aux gens de la Grande Vallée. Pour cela, il peut compter sur la Pat’Patrouille pour solutionner n’importe quelle mission de sauvetage.
overviews.heb: בתחילת כל פרק עוסקים הגורים בפעילותיהם הרגילות. אחר כך מוצג מקום אחר בעיר שבו מתחילה צרה, והאדם הנקלע אליה מבקש מריידר לשלוח את יחידת החילוץ שלו; ריידר קורא לכל הגורים שיבואו כדי לספר להם באיזו צרה מדובר לפני יציאתם. ומוסיף את המשפט : "אין משימה גדולה מדי, אין גור קטן מדי", ולאחר חילוץ מוצלח אומר ריידר למחולץ "אם תזדקק לעזרה, ליחידת החילוץ קרא" ולגורים "גורים טובים". בנוסף לכל גור יש משפט קבוע (או שני משפטים) אשר הוא אומר לפני שהוא יוצא למשימה.
overviews.hrv: Chase, Marshall, Rocky, Zuma, Rubble i Skye su šest super psića koje predvodi tehnološki nadareni 10-godišnji dječak imena Ryder. Od Marshalla koji je vatrogasac do Skye koja je policijski pas, svaki od ovih psića unose jedinstvenu osobnost i vještine u ovu ekipu.
overviews.hun:
A Mancs Őrjárat egy számítógépes animációs, akció-kaland sorozat a kicsiknek, melynek főszereplői a hat hősies kutyus: Chase, Marshall, Rocky, Zuma, Rubble, és Skye, akiket a technikai zseni 10 éves Ryder vezet. Különleges problémamegoldó képességeikkel, menő járműveikkel és rengeteg aranyos kutyus humorral felvértezve a Mancs Őrjárat azért dolgozik együtt, rendkívüli küldetéseiken, hogy megmentsék az "Adventure Bay"-beli közösséget.
Kezdve Marshall-al a tűzoltó kutyával, Chasen a rendőrkutyán át Skyeig aki magasan szárnyal saját helikopterén, minden kutyus egyedi személyiséget és képességeket hoz a csoportba, így bizonyítva a csapatmunka és a közösségért való tenni akarás fontosságát. A hátukon speciális "pup pack"-el rendelkeznek, mely segítségükre van küldetéseik megoldásában - cicákat menteni a fáról éppúgy, mint a kisiklott vonatot megállítani! Azonban nem számít mekkora a kaland, a mancs őrjáratnak mindíg van ideje egy játékra, nevetésre, vagy egy fülvakarásra Rydertől.
overviews.ita: Ryder è un ragazzo di 10 anni, esperto di tecnologia e vive ad Adventure Bay assieme a sei cuccioli davvero eroici, Chase (un pastore tedesco), Rubble (bulldog inglese), Marshall (dalmata), Zuma (labrador retriever) Rocky (razza mista) e (Cockapoo). Ognuno di loro è dotato di un mezzo super tecnologico che gli conferisce un’abilità particolare, e tutti assieme sono sempre pronti a dare il loro apporto per risolvere le missioni che la squadra è chiamata ad affrontare!
overviews.jpn:
リーダーのケントと、個性豊かな子犬たちからなるチーム「パウ・パトロール」が、彼らの住むアドベンチャー・ベイで起こったさまざまなトラブルに立ち向かう。

ポリスカー（警察車両）を乗りこなすチェイス、ファイヤートラック（消防車）のマーシャル、パワーブルドーザーのラブルなど、それぞれが特技を活いかし、力を合わせて大活躍！

どんなトラブルも、「パウ・パトロール」ならパウフェクト！！
overviews.kor: 퍼피구조대 대장 라이더와 용감한 여섯마리의 강아지 구조대의 이야기. 안전한 어드벤쳐 베이를 만들기 위한 라이더 대장과 여섯마리 귀여운 강아지 구조대의 끊임없는 연습과 도전! 경찰견 체이스와 소방견 마샬, 공사견 러블, 미화견 로키에 해양구조견 주마와 하늘을 나는 스카이까지! 여섯마리 강아지의 엉뚱발랄 신나는 구조활동을 지켜봐주세요!
overviews.nld: Paw Patrol, gaat over zes heldhaftige pups: Chase, Marshall, Rocky, Puin, Zuma en Skye - die worden geleid door de 10-jarige Ryder. Samen werken ze hard om de inwoners van Adventure Bay te beschermen. Voor hen is er geen klus te groot en geen pup te klein.
overviews.nor: Velkommen til Adventure-bukta. Hvis du er i trøbbel, er PAW Patrol på plass for å hjelpe deg. Ingen jobb er for stor for politihunden Chase, brannhunden Marshall, byggmesterhunden Rubble, piloten Skye, dypdykkeren Zuma og renovatøren Rocky. Bli med dem på mange spennende redningsoppdrag i Adventure-bukta!
overviews.pol: Perypetie sześciorga bohaterskich szczeniąt: Chase'a, Marshalla, Rocky'ego, Zumy, Rubble'a i Skye. Odważne zwierzęta wspólnie z 10-letnim Ryderem pomagają lokalnej społeczności. Ich zaawansowany technicznie patrol spieszy na ratunek wszystkim potrzebującym. Przyjaciele stawiają czoła różnym zagrożeniom i wciąż przeżywają niezwykłe przygody.
overviews.por: Há problemas na cidade? É preciso dar uma mãozinha? Ou uma pata? Não há problema: o Ryder e a Patrulha Pata vão entrar em ação! Com 10 anos de idade, o Ryder e a sua patrulha de voluntariosos cachorros estão sempre disponíveis para ajudar. Nenhuma aventura é demasiado grande - nem pequena – para esta prestável equipa canina!
overviews.pt: O Ryder e a Patrulha Canina limpam uma mancha de petróleo no oceano, perto de Adventure Bay. A Patrulha Canina precisa ainda ajudar a tapar o buraco no navio, e também retirar o petróleo do mar e salvar os animais daquela baía.
overviews.rus: Главный герой – Зик Райдер, 10-летний мальчик, озорной, непоседливый и умный не по годам. Его хобби – это техника и электроника, с которой он умеет обращаться. У мальчика очень интересная и насыщенная жизнь, ведь каждый день ему и его команде из шести щенят предстоит участвовать в спасательных миссиях. «Щенячий патруль» с удовольствием спасает маленького котенка, попавшего в беду, без раздумий бросается на выручку поезду, попавшему под оползень. Мальчик с щенками справляются с любым заданием. Каждый из четвероногих друзей обладает своими способностями и характером, они делают очень много добрых дел, это действительно храбрые спасатели.
overviews.slk: Desaťročný Ryder vedie svorku odvážnych psích záchranárov známu ako Labková patrola. Každé zo šiestich šteniatok dokáže zvládnuť náročnú a zodpovednú profesiu sveta dospelých - policajt Chase, hasič Marshall, technik Rubble, mechanik Rocky, vodný záchranár Zuma a letecká záchranárka Skye. Spoločne plnia zamotané úlohy, aby svojmu pobrežnému mestečku pomohli z akejkoľvek šlamastiky. Či už je to mačka na strome alebo vykoľajený vlak, vždy nájdu spôsob, ako pomôcť tým, ktorí to potrebujú. Labková patrola dokazuje, že žiadna úloha nie je príliš veľká a žiadne šteňa príliš malé na to, aby ju dokázalo splniť. Divákom všetkých vekových kategórií udeľujú lekcie, ako riešiť technické a spoločenské problémy.
overviews.spa:
Protagonizada por 6 heroicos cachorros: Chase, Marshall, Rocky, Zuma, Rubble y Skye, que son entrenados y dirigidos por Ryder, un niño de 10 años que los rescató y les enseñó a utilizar sus habilidades para ayudar a los demás, formando la patrulla canina.
Con una combinación única de habilidades para resolver los problemas, lo último en vehículos y mucho humor por parte de estos lindos cachorritos, la patrulla canina (PAW Patrol) trabaja conjuntamente en misiones de rescate de alto riesgo para proteger a la comunidad de Adventure Bay.
Desde Marshall (el cachorro bombero) hasta Chase (el cachorro policía), pasando por Skye (quién vuela muy alto con su helicóptero), cada cachorrito aporta una personalidad y destreza únicos al equipo, mostrando la importancia del trabajo en equipo y como ser un buen ciudadano.
Todos ellos cuentan con todo lo necesario para rescatar gatitos o incluso ¡salvar un tren de un desprendimiento de rocas!
Y no importa como de grande sea la aventura, porque la patrulla canina siempre tendrá tiempo para algún juego, reír y pasar tiempo aprendiendo más cosas con Ryder.
overviews.swe: Inget jobb är för stort, ingen valp är för liten!
overviews.zhtw: 汪汪隊是由一群勇敢的狗狗組成，並由機智勇敢的萊德擔任隊長。鎮上居民只要遇到困難，第一時間就會呼叫汪汪隊來救援，可靠的萊德隊長與汪汪隊，也一定會不負眾望完成任務。

translations.jpn: パウ・パトロール -PAW PATROL-

data.name: PAW Patrol: To The Rescue
data.overview: When trouble strikes in Adventure Bay, PAW Patrol is there to save the day! Why? Because no job is too big, no pup is too small! Watch as PAW Patrol works together to keep Adventure Bay safe – whether it’s a cat in a tree, a chicken running free, or a train off the tracks, they always find a way to help those in need!

overviews.eng: When trouble strikes in Adventure Bay, PAW Patrol is there to save the day! Why? Because no job is too big, no pup is too small! Watch as PAW Patrol works together to keep Adventure Bay safe – whether it’s a cat in a tree, a chicken running free, or a train off the tracks, they always find a way to help those in need!

data.name: Paw Patrol Minecraft Adventure
data.overview: BdoubleO100 created a Paw Patrol adventure map in Minecraft for his daughter Ari! She is obsessed with Paw Patrol and has been begging to play with BdoubleO100. So, BdoubleO100 created a fun mission in the most beautiful jungle you have ever seen in your entire life.

overviews.eng: BdoubleO100 created a Paw Patrol adventure map in Minecraft for his daughter Ari! She is obsessed with Paw Patrol and has been begging to play with BdoubleO100. So, BdoubleO100 created a fun mission in the most beautiful jungle you have ever seen in your entire life.

lists.name: Paw Patrol Collection
lists.overview: Follow the adventures of Ryder and his crew of search and rescue dogs that call themselves the PAW Patrol.

tags.name: Person/Dog
tags.helpText: For series where there is a human-canine relationship at the center, like “Hudson & Rex.”

tags.name: Non-Story-based Comedy
tags.helpText: Comedy series in which you don't necessarily have to watch the episodes in order — there are no cross-episode stories or arcs. Ex: Curb Your Enthusiasm, Seinfeld, Reno 911!

series.name: Paw Patrol

aliases.name: PAW Patrol - Helfer auf vier Pfoten

series.overview: PAW Patrol is a CG action-adventure for old children and preschool series starring a pack of six heroic puppies led by a tech-savvy 10-year-old boy named Ryder.

episodes.name: Marshall's Rusty Makeover
episodes.overview: Rusty from Rusty Rivets gives Marshall a new car.

episodes.name: #ReadAlong PAW Patrol Song | 'Gimme an Alpha-Beat!' (w/ Lyrics)
episodes.overview: From the letter A to the letter Z, the members of PAW Patrol — Chase, Marshall, Skye, Rubble, Zuma, Rocky, Everest, Tracker, and Ryder — take you and your child on a fun, musical ride through the worlds of letters, words, learning, and reading.

episodes.name: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups
episodes.overview: Paw Patrol Mighty Pups: When their latest scheme goes awry, Mayor Humdinger and his nephew Harold accidentally divert a meteor towards Adventure Bay. The meteor's golden energy grants the PAW Patrol superpowers. The heroic MIGHTY PUPS are on a roll to super-save the day.

episodes.name: Ready, Race, Rescue
episodes.overview: It’s the Adventure Bay 500! The pups are ready to be the pit crew for their race hero, The Whoosh! When the legendary racer is unable to drive in the championship race, he calls on Marshall to take the wheel and race in his place!

episodes.name: Charged Up: Pups vs. the Super Sonic Sound System
episodes.overview: Mighty Pups Chase and Rocky get “Charged Up” to take on a maniacal musical menace: DJ Harold Humdinger’s Super Sonic Sound System!

episodes.name: Charged Up: Pups vs. a Copy Cat Marshall
episodes.overview: It's up to "Charged Up" Mighty Marshall to clear his name when Copy Cat steals Marshall's vehicle and impersonates him, melting everything in his path with his heat paw power.

episodes.name: Charged Up: Pups vs. the Teenybots
episodes.overview: "Charged Up" Rubble goes wrecking-balling for Teenybots when Copy Cat and Harold team up and lead a small army of minirobot minions in an invasion of Adventure Bay.

episodes.name: Charged Up: Pups vs. a Super Meow Meow
episodes.overview: "Charged Up" Skye and Zuma square off against a cyclonic catastrophe-causing robo-kitty when Harold reactivates "Meow Meow," super-powering it up with a meteor shard.

episodes.name: Charged Up: Pups vs. a Teleporting Copy Cat
episodes.overview: When the Copy Cat copies Harold's robot's teleporting powers, it's up to "Charged Up" Rocky and his X-ray vision to find him and Chase's sonic bark to save the day.

episodes.name: Charged Up: Pups Save a Super-Powered Puplantis
episodes.overview: When Harold's failed attempt to steal the meteor lands it in Puplantis, it's up to "Charged Up" Zuma and Skye to get it back where it belongs before the superpowered pearls give away the secret of the Mer-pups.

episodes.name: PAW Patrol: Jet to the Rescue
episodes.overview: When the scheming Duke steals a levitation gem from the castle, PAW Patrol must come to rescue before the town is lost forever. High-flying adventures to save a stunt pilot, one of Mayor's kittens, and Skye to fly to Jake's Mountain.

episodes.name: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Rubble and Wild and a Yarn Ball!
episodes.overview: Rubble and Wild rescue animals from a giant runaway ball of yarn.

episodes.name: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Skye and Rory Flip It
episodes.overview: Skye and Rory rescue Cora the painter hanging from a scaffold while doing some painting for Mayor Goodway.

episodes.name: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Marshall, Leo and a Ferris Wheel
episodes.overview: Marshall and Leo work together to stop a runaway ferris wheel that has animals on it.

episodes.name: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Everest, Shade and the Mountain Goat
episodes.overview: Everest meets Shade and helps her rescue a baby mountain goat from a ledge.

episodes.name: Pups Stop a Big Leak
episodes.overview: The pups help Cap'n Turbot and cousin Francois plug a water tower leak.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Baby Anteater
episodes.overview: A baby anteater's fingers get stuck to a galloping robotic pony.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Hatch Day
episodes.overview: The Pups rescue Ace and her special delivery for Chickaletta's party.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Munchie Mobile
episodes.overview: The Pups rescue Mr Porter and his stranded food truck.

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Tromping Triceratops
episodes.overview: Mayor Goodway's selfie accidentally spooks a Triceratops headed toward a Velociraptor nest.

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Baby Stegosaurus
episodes.overview: Rex takes a group of stegosaurus on a nature hike only to be interfered with Mayor Humdinger taking control of the Dino Patroller.

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Dino Christmas
episodes.overview: Christmas in the Dino Wilds is interrupted when a volcano causes a landslide that traps a Brachiosaurus and it's up to Ryder and the pups to come to the Dino Rescue.

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Pterodactyl Egg
episodes.overview: A Pterodactyl mother and her egg become trapped on a ledge after a rock slide.

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save the Baby Raptors
episodes.overview: A baby Raptor gets inside the Dino Lookout, which causes commotion. Rex and Zuma race to save the Raptor's siblings, and Ryder and the pups search for its parents.

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Tyrannosaurus' Birthday
episodes.overview: A surprise birthday party for a Tyrannosaurus turns into a dino rescue when the startled guest of honour stomps off, getting stuck in a pit full of quicksand.

episodes.name: Pups Make a Splash
episodes.overview: When Cap'n Turbot's boat runs aground, Ryder, Zuma, Skye, and Rocky must team up to save it before it sinks.

episodes.name: Pups Fall Festival
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol must pick all of Farmer Yumi's fruit before an early snowstorm comes! But how can Chase help?.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Sea Turtles
episodes.overview: While playing on the beach, Katie, Alex, Rocky, and Zuma discover a nest of baby sea turtles hatching across the street. The PAW Patrol must make sure the baby sea turtles safely reach the ocean, which is easier said than done when Alex is being reckless around them.

episodes.name: Pups and the Very Big Baby
episodes.overview: Cap'n Turbot calls the PAW Patrol to report a beached baby whale. Ryder and the PAW Patrol must figure out how to get the whale back to her mother before she dehydrates!

episodes.name: Pups and the Kitty-tastrophe
episodes.overview: While Chase and Rubble are playing Frisbee on the beach, they notice a little kitten floating away on a toy boat to the open ocean. The pups are sent out to rescue her, but the kitten just can't stay out of trouble.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Train
episodes.overview: A rock slide blocks a train that has Katie and Cali on it! In addition, a rock damages a trestle under the bridge the train is stopped on! The pups must clear out the rocks unaware that Katie's cat, Cali, has wandered off.

episodes.name: Pup Pup Boogie
episodes.overview: A train car derails and damages the tracks, and another train is scheduled to arrive later with important packages in it, including the all new Pup Pup Boogie 2 dance game! The PAW Patrol must try to fix the tracks before the scheduled train arrives, but how will they be able to do so when Rubble sprains his paw?.

episodes.name: Pups in a Fog
episodes.overview: At night, the sun sets and the light in the Seal Island Lighthouse goes out as a thick fog starts to roll in. Ryder, Zuma, and Chase must reach the lighthouse and fix the light before the MS Princess Maria sails too close to shore and hits the rocks! Meanwhile, the rest of the pups try to stay awake all night in case Ryder needs them.

episodes.name: Pup Pup Goose
episodes.overview: When a flock of geese stop at the PAW Patrol tower during their migration, one of the goslings becomes attached to Marshall, whom Marshall names "Fuzzy." However, when it's time for the geese to continue their migration the next day, Fuzzy goes missing in Adventure Bay!

episodes.name: Pup Pup and Away
episodes.overview: It's the Annual Mayors' Balloon Race, and acrophobic Mayor Goodway is in it trying to win her first race! Luckily, Ryder is going to be with her every step of the way... That is, until she accidentally takes flight in the balloon before Ryder is ready to get in.

episodes.name: Pups on Ice
episodes.overview: It's a snow day in Adventure Bay! However, up in Jake's Mountain, Alex is trying to snowboard but gets himself (and Jake) in danger! Can the PAW Patrol help?

episodes.name: Pups and the Snow Monster
episodes.overview: The Pups are alerted to sightings of a mysterious snow creature and strange footprints in the snow on Jake's Mountain, which some locals believe it is evidence of the the dreaded "Snow Monster" which according to local myth is said to live on Jake's mountain. Jake asks the PAW Patrol to investigate and hopefully prove it doesn't exist, or Jake may have to close the ski slopes.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Circus
episodes.overview: Ellie, the baby elephant from the circus, has escaped and is loose in Adventure Bay! Her worried mother escapes looking for her, as well! Can the PAW Patrol find Ellie and calm her mom down before they cause a lot of damage in Adventure Bay?.

episodes.name: Pup A Doodle Do
episodes.overview: Mayor Goodway's pet, Chickaletta, pet has gone missing during an important taping of Hello, Adventure Bay! Will the pups be able to find her?.

episodes.name: Pups Pit Crew
episodes.overview: Alex creates a makeshift "super trike," but it falls apart. Can Ryder and the PAW Patrol help build Alex a better, safer "super trike?".

episodes.name: Pups Fight Fire
episodes.overview: Marshall is training for the fastest firepup race, but his clumsiness keeps getting in his way! Ryder decides to get the other pups to help motivate him through the actual time trial. Will Marshall be able to become the fastest firepup in the world?

episodes.name: Pups Save the Treats
episodes.overview: Mr. Porter's van slides onto the frozen bay during a delivery! It is up to the PAW Patrol to save the van and the new pup food inside of it.

episodes.name: Pups Get a Lift
episodes.overview: The chair lift at the ski resort breaks down. Everyone is able to evacuate the lift except for Katie and Cali who are stuck high above the snow! Ryder and the PAW Patrol must help rescue Katie and Cali and repair the chair lift.

episodes.name: Pups and the Ghost Pirate
episodes.overview: It's Halloween-time in Adventure Bay, and the pups are trick-or-treating. However, trick-or-treating is cut short when Cap'n Turbot's "pirate" ship, where a Halloween Party is being held, mysteriously drifts off along with a boat-load of passengers and a series of unexplained ghostly business. Ryder and the pups must board the ship and try to make sense of all the unexplained ghostly actions.

episodes.name: Pups Get a Rubble
episodes.overview: Ryder tells Mayor Goodway about how Rubble was rescued, helped rescue Jake from a snow cave, and became the most recent member of the PAW Patrol.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Walrus
episodes.overview: While the PAW Patrol are competitively cleaning the beach of scattered recyclables, Wally gets trapped in a net underwater! It is up to the PAW Patrol to rescue Wally before he drowns.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Bunnies
episodes.overview: Bunnies have invaded Farmer Yumi's carrot garden! The PAW Patrol are deployed to round them up and relocate them, but it's harder than it sounds when a few escape to other parts of the town.

episodes.name: Puptacular
episodes.overview: Katie wants to enter a pup in the Puptacular dog show. Unfortunately, every willing candidate is occupied with PAW Patrol duties: Marshall and Rubble have to fix and clean their trucks for an upcoming inspection; and Ryder, Zuma, Skye, and Chase are deployed to the ocean to rescue Mayor Goodway and her chicken from drifting out to sea! That only leaves aquaphobic Rocky as a possible candidate for the Puptacular dog show, which would be easy for him to do if he didn't have to take a bath.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Bay
episodes.overview: An oil tanker hits some rocks causing oil to spill into Adventure Bay! Things get worse when a baby whale gets covered in the oil after swimming into it! The PAW Patrol must temporarily fix the source of the oil spill, clean the whale, and prevent the oil from spreading further before any harm can be done to the sea life.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Goodway
episodes.overview: Mayor Goodway sends the statue of her great-great-grandfather, Grover Goodway, to be cleaned in time for Great-Great-Great-Great-Grandpa Grover Day. On its way back aboard Cap'n Turbot's boat, The Flounder, the statue falls into the bay prompting an underwater-recovery! To further complicate matters, a reckless baby whale is swimming in the area.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Hoedown
episodes.overview: Out-of-towner Farmer Al's herd of cows escape from their train car during Adventure Bay's Western Town Hoedown! It's up to Ryder and the PAW Patrol to wrangle them up before the train leaves.

episodes.name: Pups Save Alex
episodes.overview: Alex wants to help the PAW Patrol on a real mission and tags along when they go to rescue Cali who is stuck on top of Farmer Yumi's silo.

episodes.name: Pups Save a School Day
episodes.overview: It's Alex's first day of school but he lost his backpack, so the PAW Patrol agree to help him find it. Easier said than done when Alex says that his backpack could be in many places around Adventure Bay, prompting all the pups to be deployed to all corners of the city. Not to mention they have limited time before the school bus arrives.

episodes.name: Pups Turn on the Lights
episodes.overview: Everyone is planning a surprise birthday party for Chase at Katie's vet clinic. However, the party is put on delay because of a major wind storm that breaks one of the power windmills, leaving a chunk of Adventure Bay in a blackout. The PAW Patrol are deployed to the windmills to fix them while the rest continue with preparing for Chase's surprise party.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Pool Day
episodes.overview: It's a hot day and the pups head for the water park - but the pool is empty!

episodes.name: Circus Pup-Formers
episodes.overview: When the animals don't show up in time for the circus to start, Ryder and the Paw Patrol step in to help.

episodes.name: Pups Save Christmas
episodes.overview: When Santa's Sleigh crashes and the reindeer run off, Ryder and the Paw Patrol have to help Santa finish delivering presents and save Christmas.

episodes.name: Pups Go All Monkey
episodes.overview: When Mandy the monkey escapes from her cage on the train, Ryder and the PAW Patrol are lead on a wild chase through Adventure Bay!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Hoot
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol are "WHO" to call when a mother owl loses her baby.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Bat
episodes.overview: A baby Bat decides to take a nap hanging from the Town Hall's bell and Mayor Goodway can't ring it. Ryder and the Pups attempt to rescue the bat quietly so it doesn't wake up, but it does and causes trouble around town.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Toof
episodes.overview: Chase finds he has loose tooth, but is terrified of going to the dentist to have it checked out. Meanwhile Alex is refusing to go to the dentist for a check up because of his own fear of going to the dentist, forcing Mr. Porter to call the PAW Patrol. Wanting to help Alex overcome his fear of going to the dentist, Ryder and the Pups must overcome their own fears in order to encourage Alex to do the same, which forces Chase to face his own fear of the dentist.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Camping Trip
episodes.overview: Skye and Rocky are excited to go on their Pup Scouts camping trip, and the rest of the Pups join in when Chickaletta falls into a crevice.

episodes.name: Pups and the Trouble with Turtles
episodes.overview: The Lookout is invaded by a group of cute freshwater turtles.

episodes.name: Pups and the Beanstalk
episodes.overview: Rubble has a wondrous dream, similar to "Jack and the Beanstalk," in which Marshall grows a giant beanstalk.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Turbots
episodes.overview: Francois gets involved in Cap'n Turbot's quest to take a picture of the rare Blue-Footed Booby Bird.

episodes.name: Pups and the Lighthouse Boogie
episodes.overview: Mayor Goodway and Alex take a rowboat out into the bay to get a closer look at a baby whale. A storm is approaching though and the rowboat drifts out of control towards the sea. It's up to the PAW Patrol to rescue them!

episodes.name: Pups Save Ryder
episodes.overview: While out on a hike, Ryder discovers that Garbie the goat is stuck on the edge of a cliff! He attempts to rescue Garbie, but gets stranded in the process. He calls the pups for help, but drops his Pup-Pad down the cliff side! Now the pups have to save Ryder... all on their own!

episodes.name: Pups Great Race
episodes.overview: It's Adventure Bay Race Day and the pups are about to race each other all across the town to see who is the fastest pup. One other competitor unexpectedly shows up though, Alex in his super trike!

episodes.name: Pups Take the Cake
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol help build an entry for the Biggest and Tastiest Cake Contest.

episodes.name: Pups and the Pirate Treasure
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol searches for the treasure of the infamous Pirate Captain Blackfur after Cap'n Turbot accidentally ends up in Blackfur's secret pirate cave.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Easter Egg Hunt
episodes.overview: It’s Adventure Bay’s annual Easter Egg Hunt and the pups are helping Mayor Goodway with the egg decorating. The hunt for a very special egg leads Ryder and the PAW Patrol on an exciting adventure.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Super Pup
episodes.overview: Rubble gets into trouble while pretending to be like his favorite super hero, Apollo the SuperPup.

episodes.name: Pups Save Ryder's Robot
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol must help Ryder find his robot pup when the antenna breaks and robot pup is out of control in adventure bay.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Penguins
episodes.overview: The pups must find a way to get a group of penguins back to the South Pole.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Dolphin Pup
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol must help a Baby Dolphin get back into the bay with her parents.

episodes.name: Pups Save Jake
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol must rescue Jake when his ankle gets stuck between some fallen rocks.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Parade
episodes.overview: Katie's bathtub float floats away when Alex puts too many balloons on it during Adventure Bay Day.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Space Alien
episodes.overview: An alien lands on Earth at Farmer Yumi's place, and the gang try to repair his spaceship so he can return home.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Flying Frog
episodes.overview: Marshall gets a pet frog, and it jumps into Skye's helicopter prior to a big frog-jumping competition.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Diving Bell
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol uses Zuma's new submarine to help Cap'n Turbot.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Beavers
episodes.overview: When a storm washes away Chompy the Beaver's dam, he starts chomping wood all over town.

episodes.name: The New Pup
episodes.overview: Ryder surprises the pups with their newest vehicle - THE PAW PATROLLER! Now the PAW Patrol can save the day outside of Adventure Bay in this 18 wheeler, mobile Lookout! It's just in time too because Jake ends up lost in the south pole when he loses his equipment and phone - Pups to the rescue! While the pups race down, an Arctic storm picks up, but Jake finds help from a brave mountain ranger pup named Everest!

episodes.name: Pups Save an Ace
episodes.overview: Skye's favorite stunt pilot, Ace Sorensen, is heading to Adventure Bay to put on a fantastic air show. Just before arrival she runs into engine trouble! It's up to Skye and the PAW Patrol to save Ace and her plane so the show can go on!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Wedding
episodes.overview: Farmer Al and Farmer Yumi are getting married! Farmer Yumi's barn is being decorated for the big day and all the pups are helping. A big storm blows in and takes down a wall of the barn! It's up to Ryder and the PAW Patrol to save the barn and the day - the wedding day!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Ghost
episodes.overview: A mysterious Ghost is causing havoc around the Lookout at night. The Pups and Chase in his new SPY GEAR set up a stakeout to bust it, but discover that it's not a ghost after all - its Marshall... sleepwalking! Now the pups have to save the slumbering pup as he sleepwalks through town!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Show
episodes.overview: The Pups are going to put on a Medieval play in town square, but Cap'n Turbot's castle stage prop ends up collapsing and trapping him! Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to save Turbot, along with Marshall in his new FIRST MEDICAL RESPONSE GEAR. Marshall then has to save the SHOW when Chase gets sick and can't play the lead role!

episodes.name: Pups Jungle Trouble
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol heads to the Jungle in the PAW Patroller to meet Ryder's 10 year old pen-pal, Carlos. They also meet up with an old friend, Mandy the Monkey! Still up to her old tricks, Mandy swipes Ryder's PupPad and it's a wild Monkey chase through the jungle that leads to a cursed temple. Now Ryder and Pups have to get Mandy out of the ancient ruins, and avoid all the booby traps in the process!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Herd
episodes.overview: Chase is taking part in a herding competition and starts to herd people around town as practice which causes more trouble than good. Farmer Al calls Ryder and needs help to fix his fence and herd all the sheep! Now the Pups have to fix the fence and Chase has to herd all the sheep in time to make it to the competition!

episodes.name: Pups and the Big Freeze
episodes.overview: A winter ice storm causes trouble all over Adventure Bay. Mayor Goodway's car hit's an icy patch and gets stuck in the snow. The PAW Patrol races to the rescue, but the roads aren't the only thing affected by the ice. The Engineer's train can't break on the icy tracks and it's headed for a huge snow drift on the crossing! Ryder, Rubble, and Everest have to get there in time and clear out all the snow and ice!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Basketball Game
episodes.overview: Mayor Goodway challenges Mayor Humdinger's Basketball team to a game. The only thing Mayor Goodway is missing though is a...Basketball team! She calls Ryder and the PAW Patrol for help, and Ryder thinks the pups would make a great team! The pups become the Adventure Bay All-Stars and they'll need everyone, including a reluctant Marshall, to pitch in and help win one for Mayor Goodway and the town. Nothing but net!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Talent Show
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol becomes a band and performs at the Adventure Bay Talent Show.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Corn Roast
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol must find Chickaletta when she is trapped inside a corn maze filled with popcorn.

episodes.name: Pups Leave Marshall Home Alone
episodes.overview: Katie calls with an emergency while Marshall is the only pup available.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Deer
episodes.overview: Cap'n Turbot goes ice fishing and finds a family of deer stranded out on the ice.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Parrot
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol heads to the jungle to help their friend find his lost parrot.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Queen Bee
episodes.overview: A beehive must be relocated because it's inside the lighthouse.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Mer-Pup
episodes.overview: The gang turn into Mer-Pups in order to rescue their new pals who live in the ocean.

episodes.name: Pups Save an Elephant Family
episodes.overview: The pups go on a safari and wind up reuniting a family of elephants.

episodes.name: Pups and the Mischievous Kittens
episodes.overview: A group of rowdy kittens wreak havoc on the town.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Friend
episodes.overview: When Marshall feels hurt when he thinks the pups say he can't do anything right, he moves to the forest where he finds a rabbit family.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Stowaway
episodes.overview: Cali tags along with the PAW Patrol on their road trip.

episodes.name: Pups' Adventures in Babysitting
episodes.overview: The gang must babysit the mayor's twin niece and nephew, who are quite a handful.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Fireworks
episodes.overview: A package mix-up occurs, and the mayor receives piglets instead of fireworks.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Sniffle
episodes.overview: Katie takes care of Chase, Zuma and Skye when they catch a cold.

episodes.name: Pups and the Ghost Cabin
episodes.overview: The pups believe that an old cabin is haunted.

episodes.name: Pups Save an Adventure
episodes.overview: Marshall is able to use his vast knowledge of fire safety at a campsite.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Surprise
episodes.overview: All of Adventure Bay surprises the pups with an appreciation party, which they set up as the pups help Cap'n Turbot find Wally.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Pizza
episodes.overview: A pizza-dough delivery goes awry when the van delivering it winds up hanging off of a cliff.

episodes.name: Pups Save Skye
episodes.overview: Skye's wing gets broken in a storm, so Ryder asks Everest to rescue her.

episodes.name: Pup-Fu!
episodes.overview: Sensei Yumi teaches the pups the ancient art of Pup-Fu.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Snowboard Competition
episodes.overview: The course for a snowboard competition is covered in snow.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Chicken of the Sea
episodes.overview: Cap'n Turbot installs new software for his diving bell.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Woof and Roll Show
episodes.overview: A pop star comes to town, but a storm hits Adventure Bay and damages the performance stage, so the gang must fix it quickly.

episodes.name: Pups Save an Eagle
episodes.overview: Chickaletta falls near an eagle's nest, but the eagle is caught in twine and is also in danger.

episodes.name: Pups Bark With Dinosaurs
episodes.overview: Baby dinosaurs run amok in Adventure Bay after the gang find three fossilized dinosaur eggs.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Mayor's Race
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger plans to cheat in the annual Mayor's Race.

episodes.name: Pups Save an Outlaw's Loot
episodes.overview: Ryder and Mayor Goodway find a treasure map while sorting through the old cabin of Outlaw Wild Wilbur.

episodes.name: Pups Save Walinda
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol must come to the rescue when Wally's special friend, Walinda, gets tangled in an anchor chain.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Big Bone
episodes.overview: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin are in the middle of an archaeological dig when the cliff they are on collapses all around them.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Floundering Francois
episodes.overview: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin Francois are watching white whales in Adventure Bay when their boat hits a rock and starts to sink.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Pop-Up Penguins
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol must track down some loose penguins and help them return to the land of ice and snow.

episodes.name: Pups Find a Genie
episodes.overview: In the third-season opener, Rubble finds a genie and is granted three wishes, but the genie's magic isn't perfected yet.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Tightrope Walker
episodes.overview: A tightrope walker needs help when a flock of seagulls get in his way.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Goldrush
episodes.overview: The pups search for gold using Rocky's makeshift sifting tools.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Paw Patroller
episodes.overview: The pups take a break from washing the PAW Patroller. When they return, the PAW Patroller is missing because Mayor Humdinger wants to use it's TV to watch his favorite show when the Kitten Catastrophe Crew accidentally break his big screen.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Soccer Game
episodes.overview: The pups discover that their opponents in a soccer match are cheating.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Lucky Collar
episodes.overview: Marshall wins a supposedly lucky collar, leading him to take unnecessary risks while helping Cap'n Turbot save an owl.

episodes.name: Pups Save Alex's Mini-Patrol
episodes.overview: The pups prepare for Adventure Bay's Tree Dedication Ceremony and end up receiving help from Alex Porter's newly-formed "mini-patrol."

episodes.name: Pups Save a Lost Tooth
episodes.overview: The pups' boat ride with Cap'n Turbot is postponed when they must track down a lost tooth.

episodes.name: Air Pups
episodes.overview: Ryder and the pups use their new Air Patroller to find a family of monkeys working with Cap'n Turbot and Francois.

episodes.name: Pups Save Friendship Day
episodes.overview: While celebrating Friendship Day, the pups must prevent Mayor Humdinger from ruining Adventure Bay's reputation as the friendliest town on the map.

episodes.name: Pups Save Apollo
episodes.overview: Rubble dreams about saving his idol, Apollo the Super-Pup, from an evil Spider King.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Hippos
episodes.overview: Zuma feels left out when he cannot assist in a mission involving a trio of circus hippos.

episodes.name: Pups Save Daring Danny X
episodes.overview: Ryder performs an incredible stunt during a rescue, inspiring a young boy to become a daredevil.

episodes.name: Pups in a Fix
episodes.overview: Ryder entrusts the care of Adventure Bay to Robo-Dog while he and the pups take a vacation, but this leads to problems when Robo-Dog tinkers with Cap'n Turbot's boat, the Flounder.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Dragon
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol performs a play in which Katie is a princess in a tower.

episodes.name: Pups Save Three Little Pigs
episodes.overview: Rubble builds a brick house for three pigs on a farm.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Stinky Flower
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger drops off a 'gift' to Mayor Goodway, a flower that spreads a horrible stink when it blooms. Mayor Goodway tries to return it to him, but runs into trouble and has to be rescued by the PAW Patrol. It takes Ryder, the pups, and Rocky's brand new tugboat to get that stinky plant out of Adventure Bay before it explodes stink seeds everywhere.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Monkey-Naut
episodes.overview: A UFO has just splashed down in the bay! When Ryder and the pups pop the hatch, they find a monkey astronaut with a broken spacecraft and no way back into space. It's the PAW Patrol to the rescue! Ryder and the pups will have to launch the space capsule from the Air Patroller to get the monkey back into space in time to complete his mission!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Polar Bears
episodes.overview: Jake and Everest help Cap'n Turbot count polar bears, when The Flounder accidentally cracks a sheet of ice, setting a couple polar bear cubs out onto ice floes heading out to open water. Ryder and the pups must fly to the Arctic in the Air Patroller to rescue the lost cubs. Everest helps the PAW Patrol search and lures the frightened baby bears back to shore and their mother bear.

episodes.name: A Pup in Sheep's Clothing
episodes.overview: When little lambs keep running away from Farmer Al's pasture, it's up to the PAW Patrol to find the missing sheep and discover who's been making holes in the fence. Super Spy Chase uses his spy gear and tools to search for the culprit from outside the pasture, while Marshall infiltrates the flock by dressing up like a sheep. Despite the pups' efforts, three lambs manage to escape and get trapped in a cave. Now Marshall a.k.a Baaaaney, must save them and bring the real lambs home.

episodes.name: Pups Save a School Bus
episodes.overview: The school bus breaks, so Rocky repairs it while Ryder uses the PAW Patroller to transport the kids. While fixing the bus, the kids hop into some pups' vehicles and drive off! The PAW Patroller drives off, too, and it's up to the PAW Patrol to rescue them all.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Songbirds
episodes.overview: Egg nests are found with the mother songbirds missing, so Ryder and Chase begin searching for the mama birds.

episodes.name: Pups Save Old Trusty
episodes.overview: Ryder investigates when jets of water start springing up all over town

episodes.name: Pups Save a Pony
episodes.overview: The Paw Patrol helps a rancher find a spooked horse.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Robo-Saurus
episodes.overview: The pups set out to recover a missing robotic dinosaur.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Film Festival
episodes.overview: The pups have trouble filming their entry for a film festival.

episodes.name: Tracker Joins the Pups!
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol's newest member, Tracker, helps find an ancient crown.

episodes.name: Pups Bear-ly Save Danny
episodes.overview: Hungry bears are in pursuit of Daring Danny X, who's stuck in a tree over a canyon.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Mayor's Tulips
episodes.overview: Mayor Goodway's tulips are damaged prior to a contest, and sabotage is to blame.

episodes.name: All Star Pups!
episodes.overview: The pups' game of kickball is interrupted when an eagle steals their ball. Now Skye and Everest must face the bird and save the day.

episodes.name: Pups Save Sports Day
episodes.overview: The All Star Pups are ready to compete in the summer sports day when Daring Danny X turns the field into an ice rink!

episodes.name: Pups in a Jam
episodes.overview: The pups take care of an ant infestation on the day of Adventure Bay's jam festival

episodes.name: Pups Save a Windsurfing Pig
episodes.overview: Zuma tracks down a pig on a windsurfing board

episodes.name: Pups Get Growing
episodes.overview: The pups must stop overgrown tomatoes from rolling around Adventure Bay

episodes.name: Pups Save a Space Toy
episodes.overview: Marshall is beamed into the sky by space aliens.

episodes.name: Pups Get Skunked
episodes.overview: The pups' hunt for berries is cut short when Everest is sprayed by a skunk

episodes.name: Pups and a Whale of a Tale
episodes.overview: During a whale watching trip, Cap'n Turbot finds a baby whale trapped under an ice sheet.

episodes.name: Parroting Pups
episodes.overview: Rocky loses his voice while visiting Tracker in the jungle, so a talkative parrot helps him fulfill his PAW Patrol duties.

episodes.name: Merpups Save the Turbots
episodes.overview: Cap'n Turbot and Francois try to catch magical mer-pups on film. When they accidentally lure a giant sea slug on top of their diving bell in the process, the mer-pups must rescue them.

episodes.name: The Pups' Winter Wonder Show
episodes.overview: The Snow-Show's in jeopardy when the penguins are kidnapped by Mayor Humdinger, so the pups and Tracker mount a rescue mission.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Gliding Turbots
episodes.overview: When Francois and Cap'n Turbot become stranded on a remote island, Ryder and the pups fly in to find and rescue the bickering cousins.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Plane
episodes.overview: It's a double daring mid-air rescue as Mayor Goodway's first flying lesson goes sideways, and the pups make sure everyone lands safely.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Giant Plant
episodes.overview: Tracker's new Venus flytrap grows at an unexpected rate after being planted in an unsuitable area.

episodes.name: Pups Get Stuck
episodes.overview: Rubble's electromagnet falls into Marshall's fire truck, magnetizing the vehicle and causing problems around the town.

episodes.name: Pups Raise the Paw Patroller
episodes.overview: The pups must find a way to save their waterlogged 18-wheeler after Daring Danny X accidentally sinks it to the bottom of Adventure Bay in an attempt to a stunt.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Crows
episodes.overview: Two crows start to steal objects from around Adventure Bay, including hats needed for the town's "Hat-a-palooza" event.

episodes.name: Pups Save Their Floating Friends
episodes.overview: A "floating ray" from outer space causes the people of Adventure Bay to float in mid-air.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Satellite
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol must stop an out-of-orbit satellite from crashing in time to catch Rubble's favorite TV show.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Blimp
episodes.overview: Capn' Turbot's weather blimp is taken by Mayor Humdinger, who plans to use it to change the weather in Foggy Bottom.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Chili Cook-Off
episodes.overview: Mr. Porter's stove explodes right before the chili cook-off!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Teeny Penguin
episodes.overview: Everest and Jake try to rescue a little penguin and end up floating out to sea.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Cat Show
episodes.overview: Katie's kittens are all covered in mud and running amuck! If they're not rounded up, the Cat Show will be ruined.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Playful Dragon
episodes.overview: When Alex and Rubble fall asleep reading Alex's favorite storybook, one of the main characters in the story "Flicker the Playful Dragon", jumps right out and continues to play a lively game of hide and seek all around Adventure Bay. His trademark fiery hiccups not only give his hiding spots away, but also cause lots of damage and freak everyone out. Now it's up to Ryder and the Pups (and dragon expert Alex) to track down Flicker and stop him. When Flicker gets trapped in a cave, the gang has to work together to come up with a way to get him out and back into the storybook.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Critters
episodes.overview: When Francois' travelling reptile and amphibian truck snaps a trailer hitch on the way to a special demonstration at school, all of Francois's friends, a chameleon, a crocodile, frogs, and lots and lots of snakes, escape to slither around Adventure Bay. Now it's up to Ryder and the Pups to round them all up and get them back into a fixed trailer. Capturing the snakes and frogs is one thing, but when 'Jimmy the Crocodile' finds his way to the community pool, the Paw Patrol has to come up with a new way of luring the creature back to his home.

episodes.name: Mission Paw: Quest For The Crown
episodes.overview: When Chase crosses the ocean to the city of Barkingburg for special guard duty of the Royal Crown, he gets more than he barked for! Sweetie, the spoiled royal pup, steals the crown and plans to use it to crown herself Queen. When Chase discovers her plan, Sweetie locks him in her secret doggie dungeon. With Chase no longer on the case, there's nothing to stop Sweetie's plan. Except for the rest of the paw patrol! Receiving a distress call from Chase, Ryder mobilizes the team. Ryder calls it a "Mission Paw" to save their pup pal, extraordinary action and extraordinary tools are called for. The team boards the Air Patroller and jet to Barkingburg. But Sweetie's ready for them, she leads the team on a wild pup chase throughout the castle delaying them from finding Chase and the Royal Crown. If the team can't retrieve the Royal Crown and rescue their pup pal, Sweetie will become the bad queen pup of Barkingburg.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Sleepover
episodes.overview: Farmer Al's animals go missing during a sleepover.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Carnival
episodes.overview: Cornelius has escaped from the pig ride at the carnival, and the prizes have gone missing too!

episodes.name: Pups Save Jake's Cake
episodes.overview: A birthday ice-cream cake must be transported to Jake's cabin.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Wild Ride
episodes.overview: Alex and Daring Danny X need help because they're snowboarding toward Risky Ridge.

episodes.name: Mission Paw: Royally Spooked
episodes.overview: The pups go to Barkingburg to investigate when the Princess thinks she has seen a ghost.

episodes.name: Pups Save Monkey-dinger
episodes.overview: While on safari with Carlos and Tracker, Mayor Humdinger steals a magic mask.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Flying Food
episodes.overview: Mr. Porter's delivery drones have gone out of control, and now they are air-dropping food everywhere!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Ferris Wheel
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger steals Adventure Bay's Ferris Wheel.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Sleepwalking Bear
episodes.overview: When an ice sculpture turns out to be a hibernating bear, the pups must get it safely home before it wakes up.

episodes.name: Pups Save Dude Ranch Danny
episodes.overview: The pups must rescue Daring Danny X when the pony he's riding takes off.

episodes.name: Mission Paw: Pups Save the Royal Throne
episodes.overview: The pups must come to the rescue when Sweetie plans to steal the royal throne so that she can rule.

episodes.name: Pups Save Big Hairy
episodes.overview: A giant monkey follows the PAW Patrol home after a trip to the jungle.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Flying Kitty
episodes.overview: While birdwatching, Marshall and Cap'n Turbot spot a kitten stuck in a mountainside tree.

episodes.name: Pups Party with Bats
episodes.overview: While Rubble is getting ready to DJ the Adventure Bay dance party, Spy Chase and Rocky work with Ryder to rescue three bats who have strayed into Katie's Pet Parlor. After Skye flies them back to their cave, DJ Rubble's music draws the entire flock of bats to town! Rubble gets past his fear of bats and takes the party on the road to guide them safely home.

episodes.name: Pups Save Sensei Yumi
episodes.overview: When Marshall tests for his green belt out in the woods, he and Sensei Yumi are accidentally cut off from communication. The PAW Patrol must warn them about an incoming windstorm and then get them safely down off a cliff ledge. During the rescue, Marshall demonstrates both bravery and mastery of physical skills, which prove that he has what it takes to earn his belt!

episodes.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Baby Octopus
episodes.overview: The Sea Patrol must save the day when a baby octopus gets separated from its mother and sinks the Flounder.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Runaway Kitties
episodes.overview: Rubble and the PAW Patrol have to round up Mayor Humdinger's kitties, which he left to be kitty-sat at Katie's, before they get blown away.

episodes.name: Pups Save Tiny Marshall
episodes.overview: Marshall dreams that a shrink ray miniaturizes himself and his fire engine, and the teeny-tiny pup goes on a big adventure in his own backyard. Ryder and the pups have to be very careful to rescue little Marshall without stepping on him.

episodes.name: Pups Chill Out
episodes.overview: Roger's frozen food delivery truck gets stuck in a ditch.

episodes.name: Pups Save Farmer Alex
episodes.overview: Farmer Yumi's animals stampede toward town.

episodes.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Shark
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger makes a robotic shark to scare everyone away from the beach.

episodes.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save the Pier
episodes.overview: The pups come to the rescue when the pier has a broken support post.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Space Rock
episodes.overview: Everest, the Turbots and a Space Rock get trapped in a cave.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Good Mayor
episodes.overview: When Mayor Goodway goes missing, Mayor Humdinger causes havoc in Adventure Bay.

episodes.name: Pups Save a City Kitty
episodes.overview: Cali gets lost in the woods.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Cloud Surfer
episodes.overview: Daring Danny X's harness loosens while kite-surfing.

episodes.name: Sea Patrol: Pirate Pups to the Rescue
episodes.overview: The Sea Patrol has to rescue Carlos and Tracker, when they get stranded on an island in the search for buried treasure. Unbeknownst to them, a long-gone pirate hypnotized the animals into protecting the treasure and Carlos gets carried off in a treasure chest.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Mail
episodes.overview: When the postman's truck gets stuck in the mud, the mail is stuck in a tree.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Frog Mayor
episodes.overview: Mayor Goodway turns into a frog.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Runaway Turtles
episodes.overview: Daring Danny X accidentally drives off with turtle eggs.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Shivering Sheep
episodes.overview: Farmer Al's sheep run away, and Mayor Humdinger's kittens go missing.

episodes.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Frozen Flounder
episodes.overview: Cap'n Turbot's boat gets frozen in the Arctic ice.

episodes.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Narwhal
episodes.overview: The pups use the Sea Patroller to help guide a lost narwhal back home.

episodes.name: Pups Save Luke Stars
episodes.overview: Katie is going to perform her contest-winning song with Luke Stars! But Luke Stars gets stuck on a mountain ledge on his way to Adventure Bay.

episodes.name: Pups Save Chicken Day
episodes.overview: Mayor Goodway's big plans for Chicken Day are nearly spoiled when the Chicken of Honor, Chickaletta, mysteriously disappears

episodes.name: Pups Save Francois The Penguin
episodes.overview: Francois dresses up as a penguin in order to more closely observe the birds, but he winds up accidentally belly-sliding with a little penguin and gets caught on the other side of a crevasse.

episodes.name: Pups Save Daring Danny's Hippo
episodes.overview: The pups are busy practicing a pyramid trick for their pretend circus, but their rehearsal is cut short when they are tasked with finding a missing circus hippo.

episodes.name: Pups Save Baby Humdinger
episodes.overview: Tracker has a dream that Mayor Humginder turns into a baby! Now it's up to the pups to find the special coconuut to reverse the spell.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Piñata
episodes.overview: Alex is hosting a fun party in Adventure Bay but is heartbroken when his special pinata mysteriously disappears.

episodes.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save Puplantis
episodes.overview: Sid Swashbuckle the Pirate and his first pup mate, Arrby, steal the giant pearl-making shell that gives Puplantis its magic.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Kitty Rescue Crew
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger creates false emergencies so his Kitten Catastrophe Crew can appear better than the PAW Patrol.

episodes.name: Pups Save an Ostrich
episodes.overview: When the Wingnuts get a new pet ostrich, it gets lost on the trip home, and the PAW Patrol must find and lead it home.

episodes.name: Pups Save Big Paw
episodes.overview: A huge monkey follows the PAW Patrol home because it wants Rocky to scratch its back

episodes.name: Pups Save the Hum-Mover
episodes.overview: When Mayor Humdinger pretends to break his toe so he can win a race, the PAW Patrol build him a Hum-Mover.

episodes.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Sunken Sloop
episodes.overview: Sid the Pirate and his first mate Arrby take the sunken sloop.

episodes.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Wiggly Whale
episodes.overview: A wiggling whale knocks the diving bell to the bottom of the ocean, with Cap'n Turbot and Francois trapped inside.

episodes.name: Pups Save a High-Flying Skye
episodes.overview: When Corny runs away from Farmer Al's farm during a blackout, the pups need to light the way to get them home safely.

episodes.name: Pups Go for the Gold
episodes.overview: Uncle Otis hurls down Jake's Mountain in a runaway mine car.

episodes.name: Pups Save an Extreme Lunch
episodes.overview: Daring Danny X is harnessed over a canyon eating an Extreme Lunch when the wind blows him upside down.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Cat Burglar
episodes.overview: During Pie Swap Day in Adventure Bay, Humdinger sends Rocky Kitty to take one of Mr. Porter's delicious pies so he can join the contest.

episodes.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save the Flying Diving Bell
episodes.overview: Francois and Cap'n Turbot learn an underwater volcano is going to erupt while Farmer Yumi and Mayor Goodway are scuba diving nearby.

episodes.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Soggy Farm
episodes.overview: Farmer Al's farm is flooded.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Butterflies
episodes.overview: Skye uses her super-sonic wings to find out where a group of butterflies is coming from.

episodes.name: Pups Save an Underground Chicken
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol investigates the disappearance of Adventure Bay's Chickaletta statue which leads them to discover that Mayor Humdinger and the Kitten Catastrophe Crew are responsible.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Bookmobile
episodes.overview: When Ms. Marjorie brings her bookmobile to Everest and the kids of the mountains, Maynard accidentally sets the van rolling and goes off on a wild ride.

episodes.name: Pups Save Heady Humdinger
episodes.overview: Rubble builds a ramp out of rocks to get the Kitten Catastrophe Crew's bulldozer down from a cliff that they and Mayor Humdinger are using to make a cliff carving of themselves.

episodes.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save Their Pirated Sea Patroller
episodes.overview: The Ferris wheel has been stolen by Sid Swashbuckle the Pirate and Arrby, so the pups set out to bring it back to Adventure Bay. However, Sid comes up with an even more sneaky plan: to steal the Sea Patroller.

episodes.name: Pups Save the PawPaws
episodes.overview: Carlos and Tracker make PawPaw juice with the Paw Patrol when they find out Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta are in trouble.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Popped Top
episodes.overview: Rocky builds a scarecrow to stop a flock of hungry crows from eating a crop of corn.

episodes.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Royal Kitties
episodes.overview: Francois and Mayor Goodway set up a laser security system to protect a priceless jewel from Barkingburg, but Mayor Humdinger and the Kitten Catastrophe Crew is determined to bypass it by getting the Royal Kittens Henry and Elizabeth off the train while bypassing Katie and Cali on board and take them to the Museum to unlock the security system. This leads to Chase to lead the pups on this Ultimate Police Rescue.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Snowshoeing Goodways
episodes.overview: When Mayor Goodway and the twins are late getting back from a snowshoeing, Jake and Everest call the PAW Patrol to search for them.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Duck Pond
episodes.overview: When water in the duck pond mysteriously drains out, it's up to the PAW Patrol to find out what's happening

episodes.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save Tilly Turbot
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol must rescue Cap'n Turbot and Francois' Grandma Tilly after she rides off on a dolphin.

episodes.name: Pups Save an Upset Elephant
episodes.overview: Carlos and Tracker call the PAW Patrol to help solve the mystery of a rumbling sound that's upsetting the jungle elephants.

episodes.name: Pups Save an Out of Control Mini Patrol
episodes.overview: Alex and his Mini-Patrol accidentally take off on Daring Danny's rocket bike.

episodes.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Tigers
episodes.overview: When searching for elusive rumble top tigers, the Turbots fall into a cave deep inside a volcano; the PAW Patrol performs a paratrooper-style rescue from Skye's ultimate copter.

episodes.name: Rocky Saves Himself
episodes.overview: Rocky must rescue himself when he gets stranded on an island full of trash.

episodes.name: Pups and the Mystery of the Driverless Snow Cat
episodes.overview: Daring Danny's new remote control accidentally takes control of Everest's SnoCat and all the vehicles in Adventure Bay.

episodes.name: Pups and the Werepuppy
episodes.overview: Ryder and the fur friends go on a camping trip with Uncle Herbert. During the night, Rocky then dreams that he has turned into a werewolf.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Sleepwalking Mayor
episodes.overview: The team takes the PAW Patroller to a ranch to help Mayor Goodway learn to ride a horse.

episodes.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Movie Monster
episodes.overview: Marshall works as the "safety pup" for Adventure Bay's new film, starring Francois as a superhero who fights a robot monster called Gigantasaur. Now it's up to Marshall to lead the others in an Ultimate Fire Rescue when it's remote control is swiped by Mayor Humdinger so that the movie can be filmed in Foggy Bottom.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Trick-or-Treaters
episodes.overview: It's Halloween in Adventure Bay! Everyone is looking forward to the party. And who is messing things up again? The greedy Mayor Know-it-all.

episodes.name: Mission PAW: Pups Save a Royal Concert
episodes.overview: Luke Stars goes missing before his Royal Concert in Barkingburg, and Sweetie attempts to take over the event.

episodes.name: Mission PAW: Pups Save the Princess' Pals
episodes.overview: Animals overrun Barkingburg Castle while the Princess is away, forcing Ryder and the PAW Patrol to get them under control.

episodes.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save a Swamp Monster
episodes.overview: The pups save a giant catfish from a shrinking swamp!

episodes.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups and the Hidden Golden Bones
episodes.overview: Everything is shaking and breaking beneath Adventure Bay! Ryder will need Rocky to lead the pups on an Ultimate Fix-it Rescue!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Cuckoo Clock
episodes.overview: Cap'n Turbot and Francois inadvertently send snowballs heading towards a precious cuckoo clock—with Chickaletta stuck inside.

episodes.name: Pups Save Ms. Marjorie's House
episodes.overview: The pups investigate after mysterious holes appear across Ms. Marjorie's yard.

episodes.name: Pups Save Thanksgiving
episodes.overview: When the bouncy turkey from the Thanksgiving feast at City Hall flies away with Mayor Humdinger and his kittens, the pups must save the day.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Windy Bay
episodes.overview: An extremely strong wind suddenly sweeps up all the surfers in the Adventure Bay windsurfing race.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Frozen Camp Out
episodes.overview: A freak snowstorm hits while Alex and Mr. Porter are camping on a tropical island.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Fizzy Pickles
episodes.overview: An over-pressurized pickle jar pops and knocks Cap'n Turbot's ladder off of his boat.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Pluck-o-matic
episodes.overview: Yumi's new Robo-Corn Plucker goes haywire, and Ryder and the PAW Patrol must get it under control.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Mascot
episodes.overview: When Daring Danny X, dressed as Bird X, the mascot for the Adventure Bay, he gets carried away by a couple of eagles who mistake him for one of their own.

episodes.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save a Runaway Stargazer
episodes.overview: A comet is coming and the PAW Patrol gets to work building a giant observatory. When the observatory starts rolling out of control, Rubble and the pups need to rebuild everything it has destroyed.

episodes.name: Pups Save Ace's Birthday Surprise
episodes.overview: Rocky and the pups fix a vintage junk car for a surprise gift for Ace Sorensen's birthday but Mayor Humdinger wants the car for himself.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Tower of Pizza
episodes.overview: Adventure Bay works hard to earn the record for having the world's highest tower of pizzas.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Jungle Penguins
episodes.overview: When an ice floe carrying three penguins lands in the jungle, the pups must get the birds back to their frosty home;

episodes.name: Pups Save a Freighter
episodes.overview: Daring Danny is locked out of the lighthouse Turbot left him to look after, with a freighter headed his way.

episodes.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Stop a Meltdown
episodes.overview: It's a hot day in Adventure Bay, and things are melting, and the pups will need a lot of fire-pup power to cool things down.

episodes.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups and the Mystery of the Missing Phones
episodes.overview: Cell phones are vanishing all over Adventure Bay, and the pups will need a lot of police power to solve this mystery.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Melon Festival
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger's plan to win the great melon contest goes off the rails when his "melon" bounces away and causes chaos all over town.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Cow
episodes.overview: Farmer Al's truck gets stuck on a broken bridge.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Honey
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger steals Farmer Yumi's beehive to have honey for himself and the Kitten Catastrophe Crew.

episodes.name: Pups Save Mayor Goodway's Purse
episodes.overview: Seagulls carry Mayor Goodway's purse with her precious grapes and Chickaletta in it.

episodes.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Mountain Climbers
episodes.overview: Cap'n Turbot, Francois, Mayor Goodway, Chickaletta, and Daring Danny X fall into a canyon high up in the mountains. And it's up to the pups, led by Skye to save the mountain climbers in this Ultimate Flight Rescue.

episodes.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save Captain Gordy
episodes.overview: Rubble leads the pups into building a landing pad for Captain Gordy's spaceship as part of an Ultimate Construction Rescue.

episodes.name: Pups and the Stinky Bubble Trouble
episodes.overview: A strange odor is chasing the jungle animals away from their homes.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Baby Ostriches
episodes.overview: After Olivia the Ostrich falls into a canyon, the pups work together to lift her to safety and protect her soon-to-hatch eggs.

episodes.name: Pups Save Gustavo's Guitar
episodes.overview: Gustavo Goodway’s guitar is missing. The pups need to find it before tonight’s campfire concert!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Yoga Goats
episodes.overview: Farmer Yumi’s new Yoga Goat class is a hit, until her goats go missing! The PAW Patrol must find the goats and return them safely to Yumi’s farm.

episodes.name: Pups Save Bedtime
episodes.overview: The Turbots are trapped somewhere in the jungle. They tried to call the PAW Patrol, but their phone cut out!

episodes.name: Pups Save Chickaletta's Egg
episodes.overview: Chickaletta has laid an egg, but it rolled away and is heading through town. The PAW Patrol has to catch it before it breaks!

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: When Super Kitties Attack
episodes.overview: The Kitty Catastrophe crew gets super powers, and now those little kittens are causing big problems all over town! It’ll take the Mighty Pups and their Super Paws to stop them and restore order to Adventure Bay!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Manatee
episodes.overview: Farmer Al and Farmer Yumi need help from the PAW Patrol to a get a manatee to the swamp!

episodes.name: Pups Save Breakfast
episodes.overview: Mr. Porter and Alex are in a sticky situation - they’re up to their ears in maple syrup! It’s up to the PAW Patrol to save the Porter’s and Breakfast!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Land Pirates
episodes.overview: Pirates Alex, Julia, Julius and Chick-ARR-letta, are sent sailing into the desert and get lost! It’s up to the PAW Patrol to save these Land pirates.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Birdwatching Turbots
episodes.overview: Cap’n Turbot and Francois chirp need help when a bird-watching contest leaves them up in the air

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Meet the Mighty Twins
episodes.overview: Super-bandit Ladybird shrieks havoc in Adventure Bay taking all of the town’s treasures – including Mayor Goodway! The Mighty Pups team up with new super pals The Mighty Twins to save the day – and the Mayor - in this super heroic adventure!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Freaky Pup-Day
episodes.overview: Chase and Chickaletta switch bodies and must learn to work together to return Cap'n Turbot's boat to the bay.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Runaway Mayor
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger creates robotic pants to cheat at the Most Amazing Athlete Contest. They go haywire so the pups have to save a runaway mayor.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Bat Family
episodes.overview: A rockslide traps a Bat Family inside their cave, so the PAW Patrol has to free them! The bats search for a new home leads to problems in town though!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Mud Monster
episodes.overview: Snowboarders on Jake’s Mountain are stuck on a broken chair lift while a monster is on the loose!

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Save a Giant Chicken
episodes.overview: The Ladybird is back and Chickaletta has super powers! The Mighty Twins join the Mighty Pups to save a Giant Chicken and the town.

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Stop Harold's Deep Freeze
episodes.overview: The Mighty Pups have to stop Harold Humdinger before he puts Adventure Bay in a deep freeze so he can become mayor.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Balloon Pups
episodes.overview: Giant balloons have floated away from a parade and it’s up to the pups to save the pup balloons, the parade and Mayor Humdinger!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Spider Spies
episodes.overview: The Turbot cousins try to spot a rare spider, but get stuck in its web. It’s up to the PAW Patrol save the spider spies!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Bears
episodes.overview: A rockslide traps a bear family inside their cave, so the PAW Patrol has to free them! The bears search for a new home leads to problems in town though!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Farmerless Farm
episodes.overview: With the farmers out of town, Mayor Goodway calls the PAW Patrol to wrangle the animals and control the chaos on the farmerless farm.

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups and the Big Twin Trick
episodes.overview: The Ladybird is up to her old tricks again, but this time the Mighty Twins have a super trick of their own!

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Save the Mega Mayor
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger finally gets super powers, and it’s a total cat-astrophe! The Mighty Pups are summoned to save the Mega Mayor from himself.

episodes.name: Pups Save a White Wolf
episodes.overview: After a sudden snow storm, Everest cares for a white wolf cub as they work together to help the PAW Patrol find them.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Wrong Way Explorer
episodes.overview: Famous wrong-way explorer, Travelling Travis, accidentally takes Chickaletta to the North Pole where they run into... crocodiles?

episodes.name: Pups Save the Squirrels
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol is on a roll when squirrels stash acorns in Alex's treehouse causing it to fall onto Daring Danny's skateboard!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Roo
episodes.overview: It's a switcheroo situation when a joey is separated from its mama. It's up to the pups to save a roo and the day!

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Pups vs. the Copycat
episodes.overview: The Mighty Pups get Charged Up to take on new super-baddie, The Copycat. It’ll take all new powers and gear to take down their most formidable foe to date.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Humsquatch
episodes.overview: Travelling Travis yelps for help when he finds a mysterious creature in trouble. The PAW Patrol heads to Foggy Bottom to save a Humsquatch!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Far Flung Flying Disc
episodes.overview: When a robo-toy causes mayhem, Ryder knows just who to call to save the far flung flying disc!

episodes.name: Pups Rescue a Rescuer
episodes.overview: Mayor Goodway tries to help the PAW Patrol rescue Danny, but the pups end up having to rescue the rescuer, too!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Phantom of the Frog Pond
episodes.overview: A spooky sound forces frogs from their home. The pups must bring them home and solve the mystery of the frog pond phantom.

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Pups Stop a Big Bad Bot
episodes.overview: When Harold Humdinger uses a GIANT ROBOT to take the buildings of Adventure Bay and make his OWN town, the Mighty Pups must save the day!

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Mighty Pups Versus the Dome
episodes.overview: The COPYCAT is BACK and Adventure Bay needs a Mighty Rescue when he traps the entire town under a GIANT DOME!

episodes.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Opening Ceremonies
episodes.overview: Marshall leads the pups when an underground fire threatens the opening ceremonies in this Ultimate Fire Rescue.

episodes.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Adventure Bay Games
episodes.overview: Chase and his police-pups must find the missing medals to save the Adventure Bay Games in this Ultimate Police Rescue.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Tour Bus
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger's tour bus goes out of control when he tries to bring tourists to Foggy Bottom! PAW Patrol to the rescue!

episodes.name: Pups Save Midnight at the Museum
episodes.overview: A fun museum sleepover is interrupted when Alex and the Mini Patrol go missing, and Mayor Goodway gets stranded on a T-Rex!

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Pups Stop a Humdinger Horde
episodes.overview: The Mighty Pups have to save the day when Harold makes a cloning machine and Mayor Humdinger clones five versions of himself, as they take Katie's Pet Parlor to Foggy Bottom, with Katie and Cali inside.

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Pups Save a Mighty Lighthouse
episodes.overview: Harold uses his superpowers to turn Cap'n Turbot's lighthouse into a rocket ship to fly to the moon, but the pups make him go underwater instead.

episodes.name: Pups Save Election Day
episodes.overview: When Mayor Humdinger runs for mayor of Adventure Bay, his Mayor Mobile runs out of control, the PAW Patrol have to save the day!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Bubble Monkeys
episodes.overview: Ryder and the pups visit Tracker and Carlos in the jungle, a group of monkeys find themselves in sticky bubble trouble!

episodes.name: Pups Save an Antarctic Martian
episodes.overview: Travelling Travis thinks he is on Mars when he lands in Antarctica, due to his helmet cover being red.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Maze Explorers
episodes.overview: While visiting Carlos and Tracker in the jungle with the pups, Mr. Porter and Alex get trapped inside a huge maze while going on a hike.

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Pups vs. Three Super Baddies
episodes.overview: Tired of Ryder and the PAW Patrol always winning up to the top, Harold Humdinger, Ladybird and the Copycat team up and uses Mayor Humdinger's idea to take the pups' meteor to get more powers, causing the Mighty Pups to lose their powers. With the help from Tuck and Ella, the Mighty Pups use a piece of the meteor to stop the three baddies and save the meteor.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Waiter Bot
episodes.overview: Mr. Porter gets a new robot that helps him around the café, but it soon malfunctions and cleans things all over town.

episodes.name: Pups Stop a Pie-Clone
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger tries to get pies faster by cooling them down, only to make them fly in a tornado.

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups and the Lost Dino Eggs
episodes.overview: The pups go into a tunnel in Jake's mountain to go into a world of dinosaurs, where they meet a dino expert pup named Rex and his owners, Dr. Turbot and her daughter, Taylor Turbot. However, Mayor Humdinger has followed the PAW Patrol into the world and decides to take dino eggs back to Foggy Bottom. It is up to the pups to get the baby dinosaurs back to their mothers on a Dino Rescue.

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Pterodactyl
episodes.overview: Rex, Taylor Turbot, and the Baby Brachiosaurus, whose name was Benny, call for the PAW Patrol to help Maverick the daredevil pterodactyl after his wing gets injured by a rockslide. After being rescued, Dr. Turbot gives Maverick a brace to help him fly. But a fountain splashed on him and then he bumped into a tree, causing him to spin out of control.

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups and the Big Rumble
episodes.overview: The pups must get the dinosaurs away from an active volcano in the Dino Wilds before it erupts.

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Hum-Dino
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger takes his kitties to the Dino Wilds for some dino acting lessons, but instead finds himself on top of a runaway Brachiosaurus bound for Adventure Bay! Now it's up to the pups to save the town before the Dino stomps all over it!

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Sore Dino
episodes.overview: In the Dino Wilds, Marshall performs some Dino dentistry with the help of an ancient geyser and his fellow Dino Pup Pals.

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save the Triceratops Tag-Alongs
episodes.overview: Francois and Cap'n Turbot are in the Dino Wilds for an adventure. But a sightseeing expedition quickly turns into a wild dino ride!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Big Bad Bird Crew
episodes.overview: The pups must save Chickaletta after she gets lost along with Myrna the Mynha bird.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Soapbox Derby
episodes.overview: Mr. Porter's new high tech waiter robot helps around the Café, but it can't stop cleaning! It's up to the Pups to clean up the mess all over town!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Skydivers
