episodes.overview: When Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta get trapped inside a mesa, it's up to the Paw Patrol and a little snake to rescue them.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Trophy
episodes.overview: When Mayor Humdinger's mom Helga loses her son's phony trophy, the Paw Patrol have to rescue her and its secret stash of treats.

episodes.name: Pups Save Alex's Feathery Friends
episodes.overview: The Paw Patrol must rescue Mr. Porter and reunite an ostrich family before the big birds get into big trouble.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Puffy Mayor
episodes.overview: During Mayor Goodway's fashion show, the Pups must save Farmer Al and Mayor Humdinger after Humdinger's puffy shirt floats away with them.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Jukebox
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger steals a jukebox so he can play an annoying song all day long. Chase and Rubble track it down to save the records.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Mayor on a Wire
episodes.overview: A hungry eagle causes Mayor Goodway's tightrope walking lesson to go awry sending her careening down Jake's Mountain

episodes.name: Pups Save the Baby Space Rocks
episodes.overview: When a mysterious storm drops hailstones that hatch into Baby Space Rocks, the Pups must find a way to keep them safe.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Eddies and Emmys
episodes.overview: A 3-D printer leads to trouble when Eddie and Emmy make 3-D reproductions of themselves and play pranks all over Adventure Bay.

episodes.name: Charger Visits the Pups
episodes.overview: Rubble's cousin, Charger, visits Adventure Bay just in time to help out when a Humdinger-caused geyser destroys Mr. Porter's cafe

episodes.name: Pups Save a Shiny Ride
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger hatches a plan to sabotage a "Shiniest Ride Contest", so it's up to the Paw Patrol to save the day.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Wacky Water Skiers
episodes.overview: en Emmy and Eddie take a joyride, Hurricane Harrigan and Cap'n Turbot get caught water skiing behind the out-of-control boat.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Mayor's Assistant
episodes.overview: Daring Danny X becomes Mayor Humdinger's assistant and builds a theme park. A jealous Humdinger sabotages the rides.

episodes.name: Pups Save a High-Flying Hen
episodes.overview: After Chickaletta accidentally takes flight on a toy airplane, it's up to the Paw Patrol to rescue her.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Sloth
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger mistakes a sloth for a monkey. He races the Paw Patrol to find it when it goes missing to cover up his blunder.

episodes.name: Jungle Pups: Pups Find a Hidden Jungle
episodes.overview: Tracker stumbles into a hidden jungle and its animal inhabitants who are frightened by the rumblings of an impending volcano. It's up to Ryder and the pups to use their new animal vehicles to rescue the creatures from the hot lava and save their home.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Windswept Polar Bear Cub
episodes.overview: When a windstorm sends a polar bear cub down to Adventure Bay, it's up to Ryder, Everest, and the pups to bring the baby bear back to its family.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Drive-In
episodes.overview: The Pups must save Mayor Humdinger from a runaway movie projector at the new drive-in.

episodes.name: Pups Save Their Digi-Tal Friends
episodes.overview: The Paw Patrol must save the day when two overly helpful robots take on more than they can handle.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Rainbow
episodes.overview: Then, in a dream, Mayor Humdinger finds a Prism that makes rainbows and drains Adventure Bay of color. It's up to the pups to restore colour to Adventure Bay.

episodes.name: Jungle Pups: Pups Save the Big, Big Animals
episodes.overview: When the Hidden Jungle animals appear to be uncharacteristically frightened, Marshall discovers a saber-tooth tiger has been stalking them. And the big-fanged tiger is not the only creature strangely awakening from long, long ago

episodes.name: Pups Save the Meerkat Pirates
episodes.overview: Arrby recruits a crew of Meerkats to gather magical seeds. It's up to the Pups to recover the seeds and rescue Arrby and crew.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Hum-Hippo
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger wants a hippo as his new hench-animal, but needs a rescue when it gallops off with Humdinger on his back.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Golden Sweetie
episodes.overview: The Pups rescue Sweetie when she sneaks into the Hidden Jungle and finds a mysterious orb that causes everything she touches to turn gold.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Giant Ants
episodes.overview: The Pups must save a colony of giant ants from destroying the Hidden Jungle and themselves.

episodes.name: Pups Stop a Gold Finding Machine
episodes.overview: The Paw Patrol springs into action when a digging machine goes out of control and takes Uncle Otis on a wild ride.

episodes.name: Pups Help Mayor Humdinger Out of a Jam
episodes.overview: Digi and Tal, try to help Mayor Humdinger but leave the Mayor covered in jam, the Pups must rescue him from hungry animals.

episodes.name: Liberty's Mountain Rescue
episodes.overview: Liberty comes to visit the pups just in time to help save the Turbots and their radar doppler in a daring mountain rescue.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Flying Farmer Yumi
episodes.overview: When Farmer Al builds a windmill, the wind takes Farmer Yumi and Garby on a wild flight.

episodes.name: Pups Stop the Falling Space Junk
episodes.overview: When Digi & Tal's space vacuum breaks it's up to the pups to save Mayor Humdinger from falling space debris.

episodes.name: Pups Stop the Giant Cuckoo
episodes.overview: Humdinger's Cuckoo Clock goes out of control. Ryder and the Pups must rescue Travis and get control of the Cuckoo to save Humdinger.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Hum-ñata
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger's birthday party goes horribly awry when Cat Marshall gets trapped inside a life-sized piñata.

episodes.name: Pups Stop the Foggy Skies
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger tries pushing fog into Adventure Bay. It's up to the PAW Patrol to find animals missing in the clouds and save the day.

episodes.name: Mighty Pups vs. The Mayor of the Universe
episodes.overview: Liberty and the Poms team up with the Mighty Pups to save Adventure Bay from being crushed by a giant, flying top hat.

episodes.name: Charger's Christmas Adventure
episodes.overview: Charger helps the PAW Patrol rescue Santa and his helpers when a blizzard at the North Pole threatens to close down Christmas.

episodes.name: Pups Save Great Uncle Smiley's Cup
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger enlists Digi and Tal to help him win a hockey game. It's up to the pups to undo the mayhem the team causes.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Baby Caribou
episodes.overview: When a baby caribou winds up speeding down a mountainside, it's up to the PAW Patrol to save the calf and reunite him with his family.

episodes.name: Pups Save Luke and His Luke-Alike
episodes.overview: When Luke Stars gets blown away in a giant tumbleweed, Digi and Tal make a duplicate which dances out of control.

episodes.name: Mighty Pups vs. The Big Chill
episodes.overview: Harold creates a ray that can freeze things instantly, it goes awry and sends a giant ice ball toward Adventure Bay.

episodes.name: Mighty Pups vs. The Mighty Cheetah
episodes.overview: The Cheetah snatches half of Chase's Meteor Crystal. Chase must stop the Cheetah and restore his crystal.

episodes.name: Mighty Pups Stop the Mighty Queen
episodes.overview: The Mighty Pups must stop Sweetie from using her new powers to take over Adventure Bay.

episodes.name: Mighty Pups Stop the Hiccups
episodes.overview: Mighty Nano gets the hiccups and starts duplicating out of control, it's up to Liberty and the Mighty Pups to find a cure.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Disappearing Flounder
episodes.overview: When Cap'n Turbot's ship disappears, the PAW Patrol must venture into the mysterious Adventure Bay triangle to find the missing vessel.

episodes.name: Pups Save Little Grandpa and Mr. Alex
episodes.overview: When Alex and Mr. Porter swap roles, the pups must help track down the Mini-Patrol after they go missing.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Elephant Spa
episodes.overview: While trying to save Traveling Travis, Ryder and the pups stumble across the legendary Elephants Spa.

episodes.name: Pups Save an Underwater Otis
episodes.overview: Uncle Otis believes he's found gold but when Sid the Pirate tries to jump on Otis's claim, Otis gets trapped in a sunken shipping container.

episodes.name: Pups vs. the Hum-Flectors
episodes.overview: After a drone carrying Humdinger's reflecting panel crashes in a tree, the reflector concentrates a beam of light on a wooden bridge, causing it to burn.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Capybara
episodes.overview: The Paw Patrol rescues Winnie and a capybara when they go rolling off in a giant exercise ball.

episodes.name: Pups and Cats Save HumCatDingerMan
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger becomes HumCatDingerMan to steal the spotlight from the Cat Pack.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Turbot Tournament
episodes.overview: The pups must save Tilly during the Turbot Tournament.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Talkative Mini Patrol
episodes.overview: Alex dreams that his Mini Patrol animals can talk and they take the Bookmobile on a wild ride.

episodes.name: Pups Save the History of Adventure Bay
episodes.overview: When Mayor Humdinger steals "The History of Adventure Bay," the ancient book falls apart. It's up to the Paw Patrol to retrieve the pages and find the map.

episodes.name: Rescue Wheels: Pups Save Adventure Bay
episodes.overview: Adventure Bay is hosting a Monster Truck Rally, featuring truckers Roxi and Boomer. However, when Boomer isn't declared the Champion, he causes chaos all over Adventure Bay to prove he's the best of the best. Ryder invites Roxi to join the Paw Patrol and introduces the Pups' new Rescue Wheel vehicles just in time for them to save Adventure Bay from the havoc caused by Boomer.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Runaway Robo-Chicken Purse
episodes.overview: Digi and Tal's inventions to help a busy Mayor Goodway -- a harness with robot hands and a self-propelled chicken purse -- go haywire and lead to a wild woodland chase.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Buggy Trekkers
episodes.overview: When Mayor Humdinger literally squeezes himself into the Trekkers' friendly dune buggy race, his cheating ways put the other racers in jeopardy and it's up to the Paw Patrol to rescue them.

episodes.name: Pups Take in a Runaway Kitty!
episodes.overview: When Rocky Kitty runs away from Mayor Humdinger and tries to join the Paw Patrol, he learns how to be a real hero when he helps the pups rescue Humdinger and the kitties from a wild hang-glider ride.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Cheese Goat!
episodes.overview: When the Good Neighbor Robots confuse Farmer Al's request for goat cheese and create a goat out of cheese instead, they wind up the target of a hungry eagle. Cheese Goat and Tal wind up snatched by the ravenous raptor, and the real goats stampede off! It's up to the Paw Patrol to save Tal, the cheese goat, and corral the frightened real goat herd.

episodes.name: Rescue Wheels: Pups vs. the Monster Mayor
episodes.overview: Humdinger and Boomer join forces to get Roxi out of the way so that the two can put on the ultimate monster truck show and Humdinger can show off for his mom. But when Boomer steals City Hall to crush it with his truck, the pups must stop him and rescue Mayor Goodway and Helga, who are trapped inside.

episodes.name: Rescue Wheels: Pups Save the Teetering Tower
episodes.overview: When Boomer starts swiping vehicles from all over Adventure Bay, the Rescue Wheels roll out to get them back!

episodes.name: Rescue Wheels: Pups Save the Spelunkers
episodes.overview: When the Turbot cousins go spelunking, they're left clinging to a stalactite after a cave floor collapses.

episodes.name: Rescue Wheels: Pups Save the Risky Race
episodes.overview: When Boomer challenges Roxi in a race to the top of a mountain, his reckless driving causes an avalanche of boulders!

episodes.name: Rescue Wheels: Pups Save the Runaway Truck
episodes.overview: When Boomer's monster truck stunt goes wrong, he's left dangling from a drawbridge while his monster truck goes without a driver.

episodes.name: Pups Plus a Plucky Chicken
episodes.overview: When Humdinger steals Farmer Al's super-powered seeds, Chickaletta joins the PAW Patrol to help stop the mayor's corny plan.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Pet Show
episodes.overview: When Humdinger steals Katie and Cali's tiaras, it's up to the PAW Patrol to save their costumes and the pet show!

episodes.name: Pups Save Helga & the Humsquatch
episodes.overview: While Humdinger gets dressed for a day with his Hummy Mummy, the Humsquatch accidentally puts on the mayor's suit and takes his place!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Missing Bone-Stone
episodes.overview: When a precious bone goes missing, the pups' only chance at getting it back is to team up with Sweetie!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Director
episodes.overview: Francois is directing a video when his camera crane rolls away. The PAW Patrol must rescue Francois and track down his missing camera

episodes.name: Pups Save the Super Cows
episodes.overview: Winnie's cow competitor Moona Lisa and Bettina run away during the Super Farm Fair.

episodes.name: Air Rescue: Pups Save the Airport Opening
episodes.overview: Adventure Bay is getting a brand-new airport! Sweetie tries to take the Princess' place at the grand opening.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Mountain Surfers
episodes.overview: A mighty wind sweeps Zuma and Harrigan off the beach and blows them all the way up to Jake's Mountain.

episodes.name: Pups Save Humdingers Home Away from Home
episodes.overview: Humdinger's driving lands him and his trailer at the top of a tall spire.

series.name: Paw Patrol

aliases.name: PAW Patrol - Helfer auf vier Pfoten

series.overview: PAW Patrol is a CG action-adventure for old children and preschool series starring a pack of six heroic puppies led by a tech-savvy 10-year-old boy named Ryder.

episodes.name: Pups Get Your Goat
episodes.overview: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin Francois are observing a pair of mountain goats when a sudden avalanche strikes.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Crop Circles
episodes.overview: Farmer Al finds mysterious crop circles in his corn field, so he calls on the PAW Patrol to find out who is making them.

episodes.name: Air Rescue: Pups Save a Hum-stronaut
episodes.overview: Captain Gordy and his Space Shuttle are blasting off from the Adventure Bay Airport with a satellite! But when Mayor Humdinger sneaks on board to snap a couple of selfies, the space shuttle blasts off with him still inside!

episodes.name: Air Rescue: Pups Stop a Rocket-Powered Pogo Stick
episodes.overview: Danny's rocket boosted pogo stick accidentally causes a fire! Now it's up to the entire Air Rescue team to save Danny and stop the forest from going up in flames.

episodes.name: Air Rescue: Pups Save the Sky-High Stunt Show
episodes.overview: When Francois' big stunt show goes horribly awry, the Air Rescue pups are on a roll!

episodes.name: Air Rescue: Pups vs. the Hum-Cloud
episodes.overview: Humdinger builds a mechanical rain cloud to sabotage the Air Rescue Pups' Air Show.

episodes.name: Air Rescue: Pups Stop the Mid-Air Magnet
episodes.overview: Uncle Otis gets a powerful magnetic drone but when the magnet malfunctions, the drone starts picking up every metal object in sight!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Baddies
episodes.overview: Humdinger, Sid, and Sweetie have joined forces to try and take over the Lookout.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Yumi Bee
episodes.overview: Humdinger sabotages Yumi's Bee costume sending her buzzing out of control! It's up to the PAW Patrol to stop the Yumi Bee before the Buzzy Bee-Fest is totally smashed!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Big Book Delivery
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger's kitties make off with Mayor Goodway's book delivery truck.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Puppets
episodes.overview: Julius and Julia get into a sticky situation when the paper bag puppets they created for a puppet show become stuck on the antlers of a deer!

episodes.name: A Jr. Patrollers' Christmas
episodes.overview: At a Christmas Eve sleepover, the Jr. Patrollers are fooled into helping Mayor Humdinger steal everyone's stockings so he can get all the presents.

episodes.name: Pups vs. The Robo-Ducky
episodes.overview: Digi and Tal build a giant Robo-Ducky that runs amok through Adventure Bay.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Lost Penguin
episodes.overview: When Mayor Goodway tries to catch a glimpse of a migrating penguin colony, her precious Chickaletta and a baby penguin accidentally switch places.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Chicken Conductor!
episodes.overview: Chickaletta is left driving the train after an enormous chicken floaty launches Engineer Ed out the window!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Digi-Tal Stylists
episodes.overview: When Katie needs to close the Pet Parlor early, Digi and Tal volunteer to keep the shop open; however, when they run out of pets to pamper, they bring in wild animals.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Stage Actor
episodes.overview: Francois kicks off his production, but he is accidentally transported into the woods and comes face-to-face with mountain lions that threaten his show.

episodes.name: Pups Save Fogstock
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger's music festival shakes up Adventure Bay and causes a big mess.

episodes.name: Fire Rescue: Pups Save the Big BBQ
episodes.overview:
Summary
Adventure Bay is getting a Fire Station! When disaster strikes during the opening day BBQ, it's up to the PAW Patrol in their awesome new Fire Rescue Gear and Vehicles to put it out.

episodes.name: Hum-Patrol to the Rescue
episodes.overview: When Adventure Bay holds a raffle, a pair of nesting seagulls snatch the winning prize.

episodes.name: Pups Save Morning Mountain Yoga
episodes.overview: A rockslide leaves Mayor Goodway, Farmer Yumi and Garby stranded on the side of a mountain.

episodes.name: Pups and the Power of Flowers
episodes.overview: A jealous Mayor Humdinger tries to swipe the florist's Easter decorations and winds up on a runaway wagon with Mayor Goodway

episodes.name: Pups Save the Alien Egg Hunt
episodes.overview: When some mysterious Alien Easter Eggs cause trouble in Adventure Bay, the Paw Patrol and their Alien Friend will team up to catch them on the egg hunt!.

episodes.name: Fire Rescue: Pups Save Lizzy's Lemonade Blaze
episodes.overview: When Mayor Humdinger and his kitties accidentally set Lizzy's Lemonade Stand and parts of Foggy Bottom ablaze, it's up to the Fire Rescue pups to extinguish the fires!

episodes.name: Fire Rescue: Pups Save the Flaming Flounder
episodes.overview: Francois' pants catch on fire, sending both the lighthouse and Cap'n Turbot's Flounder up in flames.

episodes.name: Fire Rescue: Pups Make the News
episodes.overview: A news crew is in town when Chickaletta accidently causes a fire.

episodes.name: Fire Rescue: Pups Save a Baby Goat Birthday
episodes.overview: When Farmer Yumi and Al's baby goat's birthday party goes up in flames, they call on the Fire Rescue Pups to put it out.

episodes.name: Fire Rescue: Pups Save a S'more-mergency
episodes.overview: When Mayor Humdinger goes camping, he has just one thing on his mind: s'mores! But roasting marshmallows turns into a recipe for disaster!

episodes.name: Pups Save Captain Crinkle-cut
episodes.overview: When Alex dons a french-fry costume, a flock of hungry seagulls carry him off, putting him in a series of perilous predicaments.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Big Nightlight
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger and the kitties take the lighthouse from Seal Island.

episodes.name: Skye's Road Trip Rescue
episodes.overview: Skye, Liberty, and Everest head off on a road trip in a cool new RV. But when a baby deer, rabbit and bear go missing, the three pups must set aside their sight-seeing fun for a high-stakes triple rescue.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Space Kitty
episodes.overview: When Humdinger puts on a cat costume, the Alien Kid mistakes him for a real kitty in need of a home and beams Humdinger into his UFO!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Sea Sponges
episodes.overview: After a tiring deep-sea dive, Zuma dozes off and dreams about the life he might have if he never joined the PAW Patrol.

data.name: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups
data.overview: Paw Patrol Mighty Pups: When their latest scheme goes awry, Mayor Humdinger and his nephew Harold accidentally divert a meteor towards Adventure Bay. The meteor's golden energy grants the PAW Patrol superpowers. The heroic MIGHTY PUPS are on a roll to super-save the day.

data.name: Ready, Race, Rescue
data.overview: It’s the Adventure Bay 500! The pups are ready to be the pit crew for their race hero, The Whoosh! When the legendary racer is unable to drive in the championship race, he calls on Marshall to take the wheel and race in his place!

data.name: PAW Patrol: Jet to the Rescue
data.overview: When the scheming Duke steals a levitation gem from the castle, PAW Patrol must come to rescue before the town is lost forever. High-flying adventures to save a stunt pilot, one of Mayor's kittens, and Skye to fly to Jake's Mountain.

data.name: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Rubble and Wild and a Yarn Ball!
data.overview: Rubble and Wild rescue animals from a giant runaway ball of yarn.

data.name: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Skye and Rory Flip It
data.overview: Skye and Rory rescue Cora the painter hanging from a scaffold while doing some painting for Mayor Goodway.

data.name: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Marshall, Leo and a Ferris Wheel
data.overview: Marshall and Leo work together to stop a runaway ferris wheel that has animals on it.

data.name: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Everest, Shade and the Mountain Goat
data.overview: Everest meets Shade and helps her rescue a baby mountain goat from a ledge.

data.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Tromping Triceratops
data.overview: Mayor Goodway's selfie accidentally spooks a Triceratops headed toward a Velociraptor nest.

data.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Baby Stegosaurus
data.overview: Rex takes a group of stegosaurus on a nature hike only to be interfered with Mayor Humdinger taking control of the Dino Patroller.

data.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Dino Christmas
data.overview: Christmas in the Dino Wilds is interrupted when a volcano causes a landslide that traps a Brachiosaurus and it's up to Ryder and the pups to come to the Dino Rescue.

data.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Pterodactyl Egg
data.overview: A Pterodactyl mother and her egg become trapped on a ledge after a rock slide.

data.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save the Baby Raptors
data.overview: A baby Raptor gets inside the Dino Lookout, which causes commotion. Rex and Zuma race to save the Raptor's siblings, and Ryder and the pups search for its parents.

data.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Tyrannosaurus' Birthday
data.overview: A surprise birthday party for a Tyrannosaurus turns into a dino rescue when the startled guest of honour stomps off, getting stuck in a pit full of quicksand.

data.name: Pups Stop a Big Leak
data.overview: The pups help Cap'n Turbot and cousin Francois plug a water tower leak.

data.name: Pups Save a Baby Anteater
data.overview: A baby anteater's fingers get stuck to a galloping robotic pony.

data.name: Pups Save a Hatch Day
data.overview: The Pups rescue Ace and her special delivery for Chickaletta's party.

data.name: Pups Save the Munchie Mobile
data.overview: The Pups rescue Mr Porter and his stranded food truck.

data.name: Pups Make a Splash
data.overview: When Cap'n Turbot's boat runs aground, Ryder, Zuma, Skye, and Rocky must team up to save it before it sinks.

data.name: Pups Fall Festival
data.overview: The PAW Patrol must pick all of Farmer Yumi's fruit before an early snowstorm comes! But how can Chase help?.

data.name: Pups Save the Sea Turtles
data.overview: While playing on the beach, Katie, Alex, Rocky, and Zuma discover a nest of baby sea turtles hatching across the street. The PAW Patrol must make sure the baby sea turtles safely reach the ocean, which is easier said than done when Alex is being reckless around them.

data.name: Pups and the Very Big Baby
data.overview: Cap'n Turbot calls the PAW Patrol to report a beached baby whale. Ryder and the PAW Patrol must figure out how to get the whale back to her mother before she dehydrates!

data.name: Pups and the Kitty-tastrophe
data.overview: While Chase and Rubble are playing Frisbee on the beach, they notice a little kitten floating away on a toy boat to the open ocean. The pups are sent out to rescue her, but the kitten just can't stay out of trouble.

data.name: Pups Save a Train
data.overview: A rock slide blocks a train that has Katie and Cali on it! In addition, a rock damages a trestle under the bridge the train is stopped on! The pups must clear out the rocks unaware that Katie's cat, Cali, has wandered off.

data.name: Pup Pup Boogie
data.overview: A train car derails and damages the tracks, and another train is scheduled to arrive later with important packages in it, including the all new Pup Pup Boogie 2 dance game! The PAW Patrol must try to fix the tracks before the scheduled train arrives, but how will they be able to do so when Rubble sprains his paw?.

data.name: Pups in a Fog
data.overview: At night, the sun sets and the light in the Seal Island Lighthouse goes out as a thick fog starts to roll in. Ryder, Zuma, and Chase must reach the lighthouse and fix the light before the MS Princess Maria sails too close to shore and hits the rocks! Meanwhile, the rest of the pups try to stay awake all night in case Ryder needs them.

data.name: Pup Pup Goose
data.overview: When a flock of geese stop at the PAW Patrol tower during their migration, one of the goslings becomes attached to Marshall, whom Marshall names "Fuzzy." However, when it's time for the geese to continue their migration the next day, Fuzzy goes missing in Adventure Bay!

data.name: Pup Pup and Away
data.overview: It's the Annual Mayors' Balloon Race, and acrophobic Mayor Goodway is in it trying to win her first race! Luckily, Ryder is going to be with her every step of the way... That is, until she accidentally takes flight in the balloon before Ryder is ready to get in.

data.name: Pups on Ice
data.overview: It's a snow day in Adventure Bay! However, up in Jake's Mountain, Alex is trying to snowboard but gets himself (and Jake) in danger! Can the PAW Patrol help?

data.name: Pups and the Snow Monster
data.overview: The Pups are alerted to sightings of a mysterious snow creature and strange footprints in the snow on Jake's Mountain, which some locals believe it is evidence of the the dreaded "Snow Monster" which according to local myth is said to live on Jake's mountain. Jake asks the PAW Patrol to investigate and hopefully prove it doesn't exist, or Jake may have to close the ski slopes.

data.name: Pups Save the Circus
data.overview: Ellie, the baby elephant from the circus, has escaped and is loose in Adventure Bay! Her worried mother escapes looking for her, as well! Can the PAW Patrol find Ellie and calm her mom down before they cause a lot of damage in Adventure Bay?.

data.name: Pup A Doodle Do
data.overview: Mayor Goodway's pet, Chickaletta, pet has gone missing during an important taping of Hello, Adventure Bay! Will the pups be able to find her?.

data.name: Pups Pit Crew
data.overview: Alex creates a makeshift "super trike," but it falls apart. Can Ryder and the PAW Patrol help build Alex a better, safer "super trike?".

data.name: Pups Fight Fire
data.overview: Marshall is training for the fastest firepup race, but his clumsiness keeps getting in his way! Ryder decides to get the other pups to help motivate him through the actual time trial. Will Marshall be able to become the fastest firepup in the world?

data.name: Pups Save the Treats
data.overview: Mr. Porter's van slides onto the frozen bay during a delivery! It is up to the PAW Patrol to save the van and the new pup food inside of it.

data.name: Pups Get a Lift
data.overview: The chair lift at the ski resort breaks down. Everyone is able to evacuate the lift except for Katie and Cali who are stuck high above the snow! Ryder and the PAW Patrol must help rescue Katie and Cali and repair the chair lift.

data.name: Pups and the Ghost Pirate
data.overview: It's Halloween-time in Adventure Bay, and the pups are trick-or-treating. However, trick-or-treating is cut short when Cap'n Turbot's "pirate" ship, where a Halloween Party is being held, mysteriously drifts off along with a boat-load of passengers and a series of unexplained ghostly business. Ryder and the pups must board the ship and try to make sense of all the unexplained ghostly actions.

data.name: Pups Save Christmas
data.overview: When Santa's Sleigh crashes and the reindeer run off, Ryder and the Paw Patrol have to help Santa finish delivering presents and save Christmas.

data.name: Pups Get a Rubble
data.overview: Ryder tells Mayor Goodway about how Rubble was rescued, helped rescue Jake from a snow cave, and became the most recent member of the PAW Patrol.

data.name: Pups Save a Walrus
data.overview: While the PAW Patrol are competitively cleaning the beach of scattered recyclables, Wally gets trapped in a net underwater! It is up to the PAW Patrol to rescue Wally before he drowns.

data.name: Pups Save the Bunnies
data.overview: Bunnies have invaded Farmer Yumi's carrot garden! The PAW Patrol are deployed to round them up and relocate them, but it's harder than it sounds when a few escape to other parts of the town.

data.name: Puptacular
data.overview: Katie wants to enter a pup in the Puptacular dog show. Unfortunately, every willing candidate is occupied with PAW Patrol duties: Marshall and Rubble have to fix and clean their trucks for an upcoming inspection; and Ryder, Zuma, Skye, and Chase are deployed to the ocean to rescue Mayor Goodway and her chicken from drifting out to sea! That only leaves aquaphobic Rocky as a possible candidate for the Puptacular dog show, which would be easy for him to do if he didn't have to take a bath.

data.name: Pups Save the Bay
data.overview: An oil tanker hits some rocks causing oil to spill into Adventure Bay! Things get worse when a baby whale gets covered in the oil after swimming into it! The PAW Patrol must temporarily fix the source of the oil spill, clean the whale, and prevent the oil from spreading further before any harm can be done to the sea life.

data.name: Pups Save a Goodway
data.overview: Mayor Goodway sends the statue of her great-great-grandfather, Grover Goodway, to be cleaned in time for Great-Great-Great-Great-Grandpa Grover Day. On its way back aboard Cap'n Turbot's boat, The Flounder, the statue falls into the bay prompting an underwater-recovery! To further complicate matters, a reckless baby whale is swimming in the area.

data.name: Pups Save a Hoedown
data.overview: Out-of-towner Farmer Al's herd of cows escape from their train car during Adventure Bay's Western Town Hoedown! It's up to Ryder and the PAW Patrol to wrangle them up before the train leaves.

data.name: Pups Save Alex
data.overview: Alex wants to help the PAW Patrol on a real mission and tags along when they go to rescue Cali who is stuck on top of Farmer Yumi's silo.

data.name: Pups Save a School Day
data.overview: It's Alex's first day of school but he lost his backpack, so the PAW Patrol agree to help him find it. Easier said than done when Alex says that his backpack could be in many places around Adventure Bay, prompting all the pups to be deployed to all corners of the city. Not to mention they have limited time before the school bus arrives.

data.name: Pups Turn on the Lights
data.overview: Everyone is planning a surprise birthday party for Chase at Katie's vet clinic. However, the party is put on delay because of a major wind storm that breaks one of the power windmills, leaving a chunk of Adventure Bay in a blackout. The PAW Patrol are deployed to the windmills to fix them while the rest continue with preparing for Chase's surprise party.

data.name: Pups Save a Pool Day
data.overview: It's a hot day and the pups head for the water park - but the pool is empty!

data.name: Circus Pup-Formers
data.overview: When the animals don't show up in time for the circus to start, Ryder and the Paw Patrol step in to help.

data.name: Pups Save the Easter Egg Hunt
data.overview: It’s Adventure Bay’s annual Easter Egg Hunt and the pups are helping Mayor Goodway with the egg decorating. The hunt for a very special egg leads Ryder and the PAW Patrol on an exciting adventure.

data.name: Pups Save a Super Pup
data.overview: Rubble gets into trouble while pretending to be like his favorite super hero, Apollo the SuperPup.

data.name: Pups Save Ryder's Robot
data.overview: The PAW Patrol must help Ryder find his robot pup when the antenna breaks and robot pup is out of control in adventure bay.

data.name: Pups Go All Monkey
data.overview: When Mandy the monkey escapes from her cage on the train, Ryder and the PAW Patrol are lead on a wild chase through Adventure Bay!

data.name: Pups Save a Hoot
data.overview: The PAW Patrol are "WHO" to call when a mother owl loses her baby.

data.name: Pups Save a Bat
data.overview: A baby Bat decides to take a nap hanging from the Town Hall's bell and Mayor Goodway can't ring it. Ryder and the Pups attempt to rescue the bat quietly so it doesn't wake up, but it does and causes trouble around town.

data.name: Pups Save a Toof
data.overview: Chase finds he has loose tooth, but is terrified of going to the dentist to have it checked out. Meanwhile Alex is refusing to go to the dentist for a check up because of his own fear of going to the dentist, forcing Mr. Porter to call the PAW Patrol. Wanting to help Alex overcome his fear of going to the dentist, Ryder and the Pups must overcome their own fears in order to encourage Alex to do the same, which forces Chase to face his own fear of the dentist.

data.name: Pups Save the Camping Trip
data.overview: Skye and Rocky are excited to go on their Pup Scouts camping trip, and the rest of the Pups join in when Chickaletta falls into a crevice.

data.name: Pups and the Trouble with Turtles
data.overview: The Lookout is invaded by a group of cute freshwater turtles.

data.name: Pups and the Beanstalk
data.overview: Rubble has a wondrous dream, similar to "Jack and the Beanstalk," in which Marshall grows a giant beanstalk.

data.name: Pups Save the Turbots
data.overview: Francois gets involved in Cap'n Turbot's quest to take a picture of the rare Blue-Footed Booby Bird.

data.name: Pups and the Lighthouse Boogie
data.overview: Mayor Goodway and Alex take a rowboat out into the bay to get a closer look at a baby whale. A storm is approaching though and the rowboat drifts out of control towards the sea. It's up to the PAW Patrol to rescue them!

data.name: Pups Save Ryder
data.overview: While out on a hike, Ryder discovers that Garbie the goat is stuck on the edge of a cliff! He attempts to rescue Garbie, but gets stranded in the process. He calls the pups for help, but drops his Pup-Pad down the cliff side! Now the pups have to save Ryder... all on their own!

data.name: Pups Great Race
data.overview: It's Adventure Bay Race Day and the pups are about to race each other all across the town to see who is the fastest pup. One other competitor unexpectedly shows up though, Alex in his super trike!

data.name: Pups Take the Cake
data.overview: The PAW Patrol help build an entry for the Biggest and Tastiest Cake Contest.

data.name: Pups and the Pirate Treasure
data.overview: The PAW Patrol searches for the treasure of the infamous Pirate Captain Blackfur after Cap'n Turbot accidentally ends up in Blackfur's secret pirate cave.

data.name: Pups Save the Penguins
data.overview: The pups must find a way to get a group of penguins back to the South Pole.

data.name: Pups Save a Dolphin Pup
data.overview: The PAW Patrol must help a Baby Dolphin get back into the bay with her parents.

data.name: Pups Save the Space Alien
data.overview: An alien lands on Earth at Farmer Yumi's place, and the gang try to repair his spaceship so he can return home.

data.name: Pups Save a Flying Frog
data.overview: Marshall gets a pet frog, and it jumps into Skye's helicopter prior to a big frog-jumping competition.

data.name: Pups Save Jake
data.overview: The PAW Patrol must rescue Jake when his ankle gets stuck between some fallen rocks.

data.name: Pups Save the Parade
data.overview: Katie's bathtub float floats away when Alex puts too many balloons on it during Adventure Bay Day.

data.name: Pups Save the Diving Bell
data.overview: The PAW Patrol uses Zuma's new submarine to help Cap'n Turbot.

data.name: Pups Save the Beavers
data.overview: When a storm washes away Chompy the Beaver's dam, he starts chomping wood all over town.

data.name: Pups Save a Ghost
data.overview: A mysterious Ghost is causing havoc around the Lookout at night. The Pups and Chase in his new SPY GEAR set up a stakeout to bust it, but discover that it's not a ghost after all - its Marshall... sleepwalking! Now the pups have to save the slumbering pup as he sleepwalks through town!

data.name: Pups Save a Show
data.overview: The Pups are going to put on a Medieval play in town square, but Cap'n Turbot's castle stage prop ends up collapsing and trapping him! Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to save Turbot, along with Marshall in his new FIRST MEDICAL RESPONSE GEAR. Marshall then has to save the SHOW when Chase gets sick and can't play the lead role!

data.name: The New Pup
data.overview: Ryder surprises the pups with their newest vehicle - THE PAW PATROLLER! Now the PAW Patrol can save the day outside of Adventure Bay in this 18 wheeler, mobile Lookout! It's just in time too because Jake ends up lost in the south pole when he loses his equipment and phone - Pups to the rescue! While the pups race down, an Arctic storm picks up, but Jake finds help from a brave mountain ranger pup named Everest!

data.name: Pups Jungle Trouble
data.overview: The PAW Patrol heads to the Jungle in the PAW Patroller to meet Ryder's 10 year old pen-pal, Carlos. They also meet up with an old friend, Mandy the Monkey! Still up to her old tricks, Mandy swipes Ryder's PupPad and it's a wild Monkey chase through the jungle that leads to a cursed temple. Now Ryder and Pups have to get Mandy out of the ancient ruins, and avoid all the booby traps in the process!

data.name: Pups Save a Herd
data.overview: Chase is taking part in a herding competition and starts to herd people around town as practice which causes more trouble than good. Farmer Al calls Ryder and needs help to fix his fence and herd all the sheep! Now the Pups have to fix the fence and Chase has to herd all the sheep in time to make it to the competition!

data.name: Pups and the Big Freeze
data.overview: A winter ice storm causes trouble all over Adventure Bay. Mayor Goodway's car hit's an icy patch and gets stuck in the snow. The PAW Patrol races to the rescue, but the roads aren't the only thing affected by the ice. The Engineer's train can't break on the icy tracks and it's headed for a huge snow drift on the crossing! Ryder, Rubble, and Everest have to get there in time and clear out all the snow and ice!

data.name: Pups Save a Basketball Game
data.overview: Mayor Goodway challenges Mayor Humdinger's Basketball team to a game. The only thing Mayor Goodway is missing though is a...Basketball team! She calls Ryder and the PAW Patrol for help, and Ryder thinks the pups would make a great team! The pups become the Adventure Bay All-Stars and they'll need everyone, including a reluctant Marshall, to pitch in and help win one for Mayor Goodway and the town. Nothing but net!

data.name: Pups Save an Ace
data.overview: Skye's favorite stunt pilot, Ace Sorensen, is heading to Adventure Bay to put on a fantastic air show. Just before arrival she runs into engine trouble! It's up to Skye and the PAW Patrol to save Ace and her plane so the show can go on!

data.name: Pups Save a Wedding
data.overview: Farmer Al and Farmer Yumi are getting married! Farmer Yumi's barn is being decorated for the big day and all the pups are helping. A big storm blows in and takes down a wall of the barn! It's up to Ryder and the PAW Patrol to save the barn and the day - the wedding day!

data.name: Pups Save a Talent Show
data.overview: The PAW Patrol becomes a band and performs at the Adventure Bay Talent Show.

data.name: Pups Save the Corn Roast
data.overview: The PAW Patrol must find Chickaletta when she is trapped inside a corn maze filled with popcorn.

data.name: Pups Leave Marshall Home Alone
data.overview: Katie calls with an emergency while Marshall is the only pup available.

data.name: Pups Save the Deer
data.overview: Cap'n Turbot goes ice fishing and finds a family of deer stranded out on the ice.

data.name: Pups Save the Parrot
data.overview: The PAW Patrol heads to the jungle to help their friend find his lost parrot.

data.name: Pups Save the Queen Bee
data.overview: A beehive must be relocated because it's inside the lighthouse.

data.name: Pups Save a Mer-Pup
data.overview: The gang turn into Mer-Pups in order to rescue their new pals who live in the ocean.

data.name: Pups Save an Elephant Family
data.overview: The pups go on a safari and wind up reuniting a family of elephants.

data.name: Pups and the Mischievous Kittens
data.overview: A group of rowdy kittens wreak havoc on the town.

data.name: Pups Save a Friend
data.overview: When Marshall feels hurt when he thinks the pups say he can't do anything right, he moves to the forest where he finds a rabbit family.

data.name: Pups Save a Stowaway
data.overview: Cali tags along with the PAW Patrol on their road trip.

data.name: Pups' Adventures in Babysitting
data.overview: The gang must babysit the mayor's twin niece and nephew, who are quite a handful.

data.name: Pups Save the Fireworks
data.overview: A package mix-up occurs, and the mayor receives piglets instead of fireworks.

data.name: Pups Save a Sniffle
data.overview: Katie takes care of Chase, Zuma and Skye when they catch a cold.

data.name: Pups and the Ghost Cabin
data.overview: The pups believe that an old cabin is haunted.

data.name: Pups Save an Adventure
data.overview: Marshall is able to use his vast knowledge of fire safety at a campsite.

data.name: Pups Save a Surprise
data.overview: All of Adventure Bay surprises the pups with an appreciation party, which they set up as the pups help Cap'n Turbot find Wally.

data.name: Pup-Fu!
data.overview: Sensei Yumi teaches the pups the ancient art of Pup-Fu.

data.name: Pups Save the Mayor's Race
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger plans to cheat in the annual Mayor's Race.

data.name: Pups Save an Outlaw's Loot
data.overview: Ryder and Mayor Goodway find a treasure map while sorting through the old cabin of Outlaw Wild Wilbur.

data.name: Pups Save Walinda
data.overview: The PAW Patrol must come to the rescue when Wally's special friend, Walinda, gets tangled in an anchor chain.

data.name: Pups Save a Big Bone
data.overview: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin are in the middle of an archaeological dig when the cliff they are on collapses all around them.

data.name: Pups Save a Floundering Francois
data.overview: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin Francois are watching white whales in Adventure Bay when their boat hits a rock and starts to sink.

data.name: Pups Save the Pop-Up Penguins
data.overview: The PAW Patrol must track down some loose penguins and help them return to the land of ice and snow.

data.name: Pups Save a Snowboard Competition
data.overview: The course for a snowboard competition is covered in snow.

data.name: Pups Save a Chicken of the Sea
data.overview: Cap'n Turbot installs new software for his diving bell.

data.name: Pups Save a Pizza
data.overview: A pizza-dough delivery goes awry when the van delivering it winds up hanging off of a cliff.

data.name: Pups Save Skye
data.overview: Skye's wing gets broken in a storm, so Ryder asks Everest to rescue her.

data.name: Pups Save the Woof and Roll Show
data.overview: A pop star comes to town, but a storm hits Adventure Bay and damages the performance stage, so the gang must fix it quickly.

data.name: Pups Save an Eagle
data.overview: Chickaletta falls near an eagle's nest, but the eagle is caught in twine and is also in danger.

data.name: Pups Bark With Dinosaurs
data.overview: Baby dinosaurs run amok in Adventure Bay after the gang find three fossilized dinosaur eggs.

data.name: Pups Find a Genie
data.overview: In the third-season opener, Rubble finds a genie and is granted three wishes, but the genie's magic isn't perfected yet.

data.name: Pups Save a Tightrope Walker
data.overview: A tightrope walker needs help when a flock of seagulls get in his way.

data.name: Pups Save a Goldrush
data.overview: The pups search for gold using Rocky's makeshift sifting tools.

data.name: Pups Save the Paw Patroller
data.overview: The pups take a break from washing the PAW Patroller. When they return, the PAW Patroller is missing because Mayor Humdinger wants to use it's TV to watch his favorite show when the Kitten Catastrophe Crew accidentally break his big screen.

data.name: Pups Save the Soccer Game
data.overview: The pups discover that their opponents in a soccer match are cheating.

data.name: Pups Save a Lucky Collar
data.overview: Marshall wins a supposedly lucky collar, leading him to take unnecessary risks while helping Cap'n Turbot save an owl.

data.name: Pups Save Alex's Mini-Patrol
data.overview: The pups prepare for Adventure Bay's Tree Dedication Ceremony and end up receiving help from Alex Porter's newly-formed "mini-patrol."

data.name: Pups Save a Lost Tooth
data.overview: The pups' boat ride with Cap'n Turbot is postponed when they must track down a lost tooth.

data.name: Air Pups
data.overview: Ryder and the pups use their new Air Patroller to find a family of monkeys working with Cap'n Turbot and Francois.

data.name: Pups Save Friendship Day
data.overview: While celebrating Friendship Day, the pups must prevent Mayor Humdinger from ruining Adventure Bay's reputation as the friendliest town on the map.

data.name: Pups Save Apollo
data.overview: Rubble dreams about saving his idol, Apollo the Super-Pup, from an evil Spider King.

data.name: Pups Save the Hippos
data.overview: Zuma feels left out when he cannot assist in a mission involving a trio of circus hippos.

data.name: Pups Save Daring Danny X
data.overview: Ryder performs an incredible stunt during a rescue, inspiring a young boy to become a daredevil.

data.name: Pups in a Fix
data.overview: Ryder entrusts the care of Adventure Bay to Robo-Dog while he and the pups take a vacation, but this leads to problems when Robo-Dog tinkers with Cap'n Turbot's boat, the Flounder.

data.name: Pups Save a Dragon
data.overview: The PAW Patrol performs a play in which Katie is a princess in a tower.

data.name: Pups Save Three Little Pigs
data.overview: Rubble builds a brick house for three pigs on a farm.

data.name: Pups Save a Stinky Flower
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger drops off a 'gift' to Mayor Goodway, a flower that spreads a horrible stink when it blooms. Mayor Goodway tries to return it to him, but runs into trouble and has to be rescued by the PAW Patrol. It takes Ryder, the pups, and Rocky's brand new tugboat to get that stinky plant out of Adventure Bay before it explodes stink seeds everywhere.

data.name: Pups Save a Monkey-Naut
data.overview: A UFO has just splashed down in the bay! When Ryder and the pups pop the hatch, they find a monkey astronaut with a broken spacecraft and no way back into space. It's the PAW Patrol to the rescue! Ryder and the pups will have to launch the space capsule from the Air Patroller to get the monkey back into space in time to complete his mission!

data.name: Pups Save the Polar Bears
data.overview: Jake and Everest help Cap'n Turbot count polar bears, when The Flounder accidentally cracks a sheet of ice, setting a couple polar bear cubs out onto ice floes heading out to open water. Ryder and the pups must fly to the Arctic in the Air Patroller to rescue the lost cubs. Everest helps the PAW Patrol search and lures the frightened baby bears back to shore and their mother bear.

data.name: A Pup in Sheep's Clothing
data.overview: When little lambs keep running away from Farmer Al's pasture, it's up to the PAW Patrol to find the missing sheep and discover who's been making holes in the fence. Super Spy Chase uses his spy gear and tools to search for the culprit from outside the pasture, while Marshall infiltrates the flock by dressing up like a sheep. Despite the pups' efforts, three lambs manage to escape and get trapped in a cave. Now Marshall a.k.a Baaaaney, must save them and bring the real lambs home.

data.name: Pups Save a School Bus
data.overview: The school bus breaks, so Rocky repairs it while Ryder uses the PAW Patroller to transport the kids. While fixing the bus, the kids hop into some pups' vehicles and drive off! The PAW Patroller drives off, too, and it's up to the PAW Patrol to rescue them all.

data.name: Pups Save the Songbirds
data.overview: Egg nests are found with the mother songbirds missing, so Ryder and Chase begin searching for the mama birds.

data.name: Pups Save Old Trusty
data.overview: Ryder investigates when jets of water start springing up all over town

data.name: Pups Save a Pony
data.overview: The Paw Patrol helps a rancher find a spooked horse.

data.name: Pups Save a Robo-Saurus
data.overview: The pups set out to recover a missing robotic dinosaur.

data.name: Pups Save a Film Festival
data.overview: The pups have trouble filming their entry for a film festival.

data.name: Tracker Joins the Pups!
data.overview: The PAW Patrol's newest member, Tracker, helps find an ancient crown.

data.name: Pups Bear-ly Save Danny
data.overview: Hungry bears are in pursuit of Daring Danny X, who's stuck in a tree over a canyon.

data.name: Pups Save the Mayor's Tulips
data.overview: Mayor Goodway's tulips are damaged prior to a contest, and sabotage is to blame.

data.name: All Star Pups!
data.overview: The pups' game of kickball is interrupted when an eagle steals their ball. Now Skye and Everest must face the bird and save the day.

data.name: Pups Save Sports Day
data.overview: The All Star Pups are ready to compete in the summer sports day when Daring Danny X turns the field into an ice rink!

data.name: Pups in a Jam
data.overview: The pups take care of an ant infestation on the day of Adventure Bay's jam festival

data.name: Pups Save a Windsurfing Pig
data.overview: Zuma tracks down a pig on a windsurfing board

data.name: Pups Get Growing
data.overview: The pups must stop overgrown tomatoes from rolling around Adventure Bay

data.name: Pups Save a Space Toy
data.overview: Marshall is beamed into the sky by space aliens.

data.name: Pups Get Skunked
data.overview: The pups' hunt for berries is cut short when Everest is sprayed by a skunk

data.name: Pups and a Whale of a Tale
data.overview: During a whale watching trip, Cap'n Turbot finds a baby whale trapped under an ice sheet.

data.name: Parroting Pups
data.overview: Rocky loses his voice while visiting Tracker in the jungle, so a talkative parrot helps him fulfill his PAW Patrol duties.

data.name: Merpups Save the Turbots
data.overview: Cap'n Turbot and Francois try to catch magical mer-pups on film. When they accidentally lure a giant sea slug on top of their diving bell in the process, the mer-pups must rescue them.

data.name: The Pups' Winter Wonder Show
data.overview: The Snow-Show's in jeopardy when the penguins are kidnapped by Mayor Humdinger, so the pups and Tracker mount a rescue mission.

data.name: Pups Save the Gliding Turbots
data.overview: When Francois and Cap'n Turbot become stranded on a remote island, Ryder and the pups fly in to find and rescue the bickering cousins.

data.name: Pups Save a Plane
data.overview: It's a double daring mid-air rescue as Mayor Goodway's first flying lesson goes sideways, and the pups make sure everyone lands safely.

data.name: Pups Save a Giant Plant
data.overview: Tracker's new Venus flytrap grows at an unexpected rate after being planted in an unsuitable area.

data.name: Pups Get Stuck
data.overview: Rubble's electromagnet falls into Marshall's fire truck, magnetizing the vehicle and causing problems around the town.

data.name: Pups Raise the Paw Patroller
data.overview: The pups must find a way to save their waterlogged 18-wheeler after Daring Danny X accidentally sinks it to the bottom of Adventure Bay in an attempt to a stunt.

data.name: Pups Save the Crows
data.overview: Two crows start to steal objects from around Adventure Bay, including hats needed for the town's "Hat-a-palooza" event.

data.name: Pups Save Their Floating Friends
data.overview: A "floating ray" from outer space causes the people of Adventure Bay to float in mid-air.

data.name: Pups Save a Satellite
data.overview: The PAW Patrol must stop an out-of-orbit satellite from crashing in time to catch Rubble's favorite TV show.

data.name: Pups Save a Blimp
data.overview: Capn' Turbot's weather blimp is taken by Mayor Humdinger, who plans to use it to change the weather in Foggy Bottom.

data.name: Pups Save the Chili Cook-Off
data.overview: Mr. Porter's stove explodes right before the chili cook-off!

data.name: Pups Save a Teeny Penguin
data.overview: Everest and Jake try to rescue a little penguin and end up floating out to sea.

data.name: Pups Save the Cat Show
data.overview: Katie's kittens are all covered in mud and running amuck! If they're not rounded up, the Cat Show will be ruined.

data.name: Pups Save a Playful Dragon
data.overview: When Alex and Rubble fall asleep reading Alex's favorite storybook, one of the main characters in the story "Flicker the Playful Dragon", jumps right out and continues to play a lively game of hide and seek all around Adventure Bay. His trademark fiery hiccups not only give his hiding spots away, but also cause lots of damage and freak everyone out. Now it's up to Ryder and the Pups (and dragon expert Alex) to track down Flicker and stop him. When Flicker gets trapped in a cave, the gang has to work together to come up with a way to get him out and back into the storybook.

data.name: Pups Save the Critters
data.overview: When Francois' travelling reptile and amphibian truck snaps a trailer hitch on the way to a special demonstration at school, all of Francois's friends, a chameleon, a crocodile, frogs, and lots and lots of snakes, escape to slither around Adventure Bay. Now it's up to Ryder and the Pups to round them all up and get them back into a fixed trailer. Capturing the snakes and frogs is one thing, but when 'Jimmy the Crocodile' finds his way to the community pool, the Paw Patrol has to come up with a new way of luring the creature back to his home.

data.name: Mission Paw: Quest For The Crown
data.overview: When Chase crosses the ocean to the city of Barkingburg for special guard duty of the Royal Crown, he gets more than he barked for! Sweetie, the spoiled royal pup, steals the crown and plans to use it to crown herself Queen. When Chase discovers her plan, Sweetie locks him in her secret doggie dungeon. With Chase no longer on the case, there's nothing to stop Sweetie's plan. Except for the rest of the paw patrol! Receiving a distress call from Chase, Ryder mobilizes the team. Ryder calls it a "Mission Paw" to save their pup pal, extraordinary action and extraordinary tools are called for. The team boards the Air Patroller and jet to Barkingburg. But Sweetie's ready for them, she leads the team on a wild pup chase throughout the castle delaying them from finding Chase and the Royal Crown. If the team can't retrieve the Royal Crown and rescue their pup pal, Sweetie will become the bad queen pup of Barkingburg.

data.name: Pups Save a Sleepover
data.overview: Farmer Al's animals go missing during a sleepover.

data.name: Pups Save the Carnival
data.overview: Cornelius has escaped from the pig ride at the carnival, and the prizes have gone missing too!

data.name: Pups Save Jake's Cake
data.overview: A birthday ice-cream cake must be transported to Jake's cabin.

data.name: Pups Save a Wild Ride
data.overview: Alex and Daring Danny X need help because they're snowboarding toward Risky Ridge.

data.name: Mission Paw: Royally Spooked
data.overview: The pups go to Barkingburg to investigate when the Princess thinks she has seen a ghost.

data.name: Pups Save Monkey-dinger
data.overview: While on safari with Carlos and Tracker, Mayor Humdinger steals a magic mask.

data.name: Pups Save the Flying Food
data.overview: Mr. Porter's delivery drones have gone out of control, and now they are air-dropping food everywhere!

data.name: Pups Save a Ferris Wheel
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger steals Adventure Bay's Ferris Wheel.

data.name: Pups Save a Sleepwalking Bear
data.overview: When an ice sculpture turns out to be a hibernating bear, the pups must get it safely home before it wakes up.

data.name: Pups Save Dude Ranch Danny
data.overview: The pups must rescue Daring Danny X when the pony he's riding takes off.

data.name: Mission Paw: Pups Save the Royal Throne
data.overview: The pups must come to the rescue when Sweetie plans to steal the royal throne so that she can rule.

data.name: Pups Save Big Hairy
data.overview: A giant monkey follows the PAW Patrol home after a trip to the jungle.

data.name: Pups Save a Flying Kitty
data.overview: While birdwatching, Marshall and Cap'n Turbot spot a kitten stuck in a mountainside tree.

data.name: Pups Party with Bats
data.overview: While Rubble is getting ready to DJ the Adventure Bay dance party, Spy Chase and Rocky work with Ryder to rescue three bats who have strayed into Katie's Pet Parlor. After Skye flies them back to their cave, DJ Rubble's music draws the entire flock of bats to town! Rubble gets past his fear of bats and takes the party on the road to guide them safely home.

data.name: Pups Save Sensei Yumi
data.overview: When Marshall tests for his green belt out in the woods, he and Sensei Yumi are accidentally cut off from communication. The PAW Patrol must warn them about an incoming windstorm and then get them safely down off a cliff ledge. During the rescue, Marshall demonstrates both bravery and mastery of physical skills, which prove that he has what it takes to earn his belt!

data.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Baby Octopus
data.overview: The Sea Patrol must save the day when a baby octopus gets separated from its mother and sinks the Flounder.

data.name: Pups Save the Runaway Kitties
data.overview: Rubble and the PAW Patrol have to round up Mayor Humdinger's kitties, which he left to be kitty-sat at Katie's, before they get blown away.

data.name: Pups Save Tiny Marshall
data.overview: Marshall dreams that a shrink ray miniaturizes himself and his fire engine, and the teeny-tiny pup goes on a big adventure in his own backyard. Ryder and the pups have to be very careful to rescue little Marshall without stepping on him.

data.name: Pups Chill Out
data.overview: Roger's frozen food delivery truck gets stuck in a ditch.

data.name: Pups Save Farmer Alex
data.overview: Farmer Yumi's animals stampede toward town.

data.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Shark
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger makes a robotic shark to scare everyone away from the beach.

data.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save the Pier
data.overview: The pups come to the rescue when the pier has a broken support post.

data.name: Pups Save a Space Rock
data.overview: Everest, the Turbots and a Space Rock get trapped in a cave.

data.name: Pups Save a Good Mayor
data.overview: When Mayor Goodway goes missing, Mayor Humdinger causes havoc in Adventure Bay.

data.name: Pups Save a City Kitty
data.overview: Cali gets lost in the woods.

data.name: Pups Save a Cloud Surfer
data.overview: Daring Danny X's harness loosens while kite-surfing.

data.name: Sea Patrol: Pirate Pups to the Rescue
data.overview: The Sea Patrol has to rescue Carlos and Tracker, when they get stranded on an island in the search for buried treasure. Unbeknownst to them, a long-gone pirate hypnotized the animals into protecting the treasure and Carlos gets carried off in a treasure chest.

data.name: Pups Save the Mail
data.overview: When the postman's truck gets stuck in the mud, the mail is stuck in a tree.

data.name: Pups Save a Frog Mayor
data.overview: Mayor Goodway turns into a frog.

data.name: Pups Save the Runaway Turtles
data.overview: Daring Danny X accidentally drives off with turtle eggs.

data.name: Pups Save the Shivering Sheep
data.overview: Farmer Al's sheep run away, and Mayor Humdinger's kittens go missing.

data.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Frozen Flounder
data.overview: Cap'n Turbot's boat gets frozen in the Arctic ice.

data.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Narwhal
data.overview: The pups use the Sea Patroller to help guide a lost narwhal back home.

data.name: Pups Save Luke Stars
data.overview: Katie is going to perform her contest-winning song with Luke Stars! But Luke Stars gets stuck on a mountain ledge on his way to Adventure Bay.

data.name: Pups Save Chicken Day
data.overview: Mayor Goodway's big plans for Chicken Day are nearly spoiled when the Chicken of Honor, Chickaletta, mysteriously disappears

data.name: Pups Save Francois The Penguin
data.overview: Francois dresses up as a penguin in order to more closely observe the birds, but he winds up accidentally belly-sliding with a little penguin and gets caught on the other side of a crevasse.

data.name: Pups Save Daring Danny's Hippo
data.overview: The pups are busy practicing a pyramid trick for their pretend circus, but their rehearsal is cut short when they are tasked with finding a missing circus hippo.

data.name: Pups Save Baby Humdinger
data.overview: Tracker has a dream that Mayor Humginder turns into a baby! Now it's up to the pups to find the special coconuut to reverse the spell.

data.name: Pups Save a Piñata
data.overview: Alex is hosting a fun party in Adventure Bay but is heartbroken when his special pinata mysteriously disappears.

data.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save Puplantis
data.overview: Sid Swashbuckle the Pirate and his first pup mate, Arrby, steal the giant pearl-making shell that gives Puplantis its magic.

data.name: Pups Save the Kitty Rescue Crew
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger creates false emergencies so his Kitten Catastrophe Crew can appear better than the PAW Patrol.

data.name: Pups Save an Ostrich
data.overview: When the Wingnuts get a new pet ostrich, it gets lost on the trip home, and the PAW Patrol must find and lead it home.

data.name: Pups Save Big Paw
data.overview: A huge monkey follows the PAW Patrol home because it wants Rocky to scratch its back

data.name: Pups Save the Hum-Mover
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger pretends to break his toe so he can win a race, the PAW Patrol build him a Hum-Mover.

data.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Sunken Sloop
data.overview: Sid the Pirate and his first mate Arrby take the sunken sloop.

data.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Wiggly Whale
data.overview: A wiggling whale knocks the diving bell to the bottom of the ocean, with Cap'n Turbot and Francois trapped inside.

data.name: Pups Save a High-Flying Skye
data.overview: When Corny runs away from Farmer Al's farm during a blackout, the pups need to light the way to get them home safely.

data.name: Pups Go for the Gold
data.overview: Uncle Otis hurls down Jake's Mountain in a runaway mine car.

data.name: Pups Save an Extreme Lunch
data.overview: Daring Danny X is harnessed over a canyon eating an Extreme Lunch when the wind blows him upside down.

data.name: Pups Save a Cat Burglar
data.overview: During Pie Swap Day in Adventure Bay, Humdinger sends Rocky Kitty to take one of Mr. Porter's delicious pies so he can join the contest.

data.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save the Flying Diving Bell
data.overview: Francois and Cap'n Turbot learn an underwater volcano is going to erupt while Farmer Yumi and Mayor Goodway are scuba diving nearby.

data.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Soggy Farm
data.overview: Farmer Al's farm is flooded.

data.name: Pups Save the Butterflies
data.overview: Skye uses her super-sonic wings to find out where a group of butterflies is coming from.

data.name: Pups Save an Underground Chicken
data.overview: The PAW Patrol investigates the disappearance of Adventure Bay's Chickaletta statue which leads them to discover that Mayor Humdinger and the Kitten Catastrophe Crew are responsible.

data.name: Pups Save the Bookmobile
data.overview: When Ms. Marjorie brings her bookmobile to Everest and the kids of the mountains, Maynard accidentally sets the van rolling and goes off on a wild ride.

data.name: Pups Save Heady Humdinger
data.overview: Rubble builds a ramp out of rocks to get the Kitten Catastrophe Crew's bulldozer down from a cliff that they and Mayor Humdinger are using to make a cliff carving of themselves.

data.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save Their Pirated Sea Patroller
data.overview: The Ferris wheel has been stolen by Sid Swashbuckle the Pirate and Arrby, so the pups set out to bring it back to Adventure Bay. However, Sid comes up with an even more sneaky plan: to steal the Sea Patroller.

data.name: Pups Save the PawPaws
data.overview: Carlos and Tracker make PawPaw juice with the Paw Patrol when they find out Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta are in trouble.

data.name: Pups Save a Popped Top
data.overview: Rocky builds a scarecrow to stop a flock of hungry crows from eating a crop of corn.

data.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Royal Kitties
data.overview: Francois and Mayor Goodway set up a laser security system to protect a priceless jewel from Barkingburg, but Mayor Humdinger and the Kitten Catastrophe Crew is determined to bypass it by getting the Royal Kittens Henry and Elizabeth off the train while bypassing Katie and Cali on board and take them to the Museum to unlock the security system. This leads to Chase to lead the pups on this Ultimate Police Rescue.

data.name: Pups Save the Snowshoeing Goodways
data.overview: When Mayor Goodway and the twins are late getting back from a snowshoeing, Jake and Everest call the PAW Patrol to search for them.

data.name: Pups Save a Duck Pond
data.overview: When water in the duck pond mysteriously drains out, it's up to the PAW Patrol to find out what's happening

data.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save Tilly Turbot
data.overview: The PAW Patrol must rescue Cap'n Turbot and Francois' Grandma Tilly after she rides off on a dolphin.

data.name: Pups Save an Upset Elephant
data.overview: Carlos and Tracker call the PAW Patrol to help solve the mystery of a rumbling sound that's upsetting the jungle elephants.

data.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Tigers
data.overview: When searching for elusive rumble top tigers, the Turbots fall into a cave deep inside a volcano; the PAW Patrol performs a paratrooper-style rescue from Skye's ultimate copter.

data.name: Rocky Saves Himself
data.overview: Rocky must rescue himself when he gets stranded on an island full of trash.

data.name: Pups and the Mystery of the Driverless Snow Cat
data.overview: Daring Danny's new remote control accidentally takes control of Everest's SnoCat and all the vehicles in Adventure Bay.

data.name: Pups Save the Trick-or-Treaters
data.overview: It's Halloween in Adventure Bay! Everyone is looking forward to the party. And who is messing things up again? The greedy Mayor Know-it-all.

data.name: Pups Save an Out of Control Mini Patrol
data.overview: Alex and his Mini-Patrol accidentally take off on Daring Danny's rocket bike.

data.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Movie Monster
data.overview: Marshall works as the "safety pup" for Adventure Bay's new film, starring Francois as a superhero who fights a robot monster called Gigantasaur. Now it's up to Marshall to lead the others in an Ultimate Fire Rescue when it's remote control is swiped by Mayor Humdinger so that the movie can be filmed in Foggy Bottom.

data.name: Mission PAW: Pups Save a Royal Concert
data.overview: Luke Stars goes missing before his Royal Concert in Barkingburg, and Sweetie attempts to take over the event.

data.name: Mission PAW: Pups Save the Princess' Pals
data.overview: Animals overrun Barkingburg Castle while the Princess is away, forcing Ryder and the PAW Patrol to get them under control.

data.name: Pups and the Werepuppy
data.overview: Ryder and the fur friends go on a camping trip with Uncle Herbert. During the night, Rocky then dreams that he has turned into a werewolf.

data.name: Pups Save a Sleepwalking Mayor
data.overview: The team takes the PAW Patroller to a ranch to help Mayor Goodway learn to ride a horse.

data.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save a Swamp Monster
data.overview: The pups save a giant catfish from a shrinking swamp!

data.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups and the Hidden Golden Bones
data.overview: Everything is shaking and breaking beneath Adventure Bay! Ryder will need Rocky to lead the pups on an Ultimate Fix-it Rescue!

data.name: Pups Save a Cuckoo Clock
data.overview: Cap'n Turbot and Francois inadvertently send snowballs heading towards a precious cuckoo clock—with Chickaletta stuck inside.

data.name: Pups Save Ms. Marjorie's House
data.overview: The pups investigate after mysterious holes appear across Ms. Marjorie's yard.

data.name: Pups Save Thanksgiving
data.overview: When the bouncy turkey from the Thanksgiving feast at City Hall flies away with Mayor Humdinger and his kittens, the pups must save the day.

data.name: Pups Save a Windy Bay
data.overview: An extremely strong wind suddenly sweeps up all the surfers in the Adventure Bay windsurfing race.

data.name: Pups Save a Frozen Camp Out
data.overview: A freak snowstorm hits while Alex and Mr. Porter are camping on a tropical island.

data.name: Pups Save the Fizzy Pickles
data.overview: An over-pressurized pickle jar pops and knocks Cap'n Turbot's ladder off of his boat.

data.name: Pups Save a Pluck-o-matic
data.overview: Yumi's new Robo-Corn Plucker goes haywire, and Ryder and the PAW Patrol must get it under control.

data.name: Pups Save a Mascot
data.overview: When Daring Danny X, dressed as Bird X, the mascot for the Adventure Bay, he gets carried away by a couple of eagles who mistake him for one of their own.

data.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save a Runaway Stargazer
data.overview: A comet is coming and the PAW Patrol gets to work building a giant observatory. When the observatory starts rolling out of control, Rubble and the pups need to rebuild everything it has destroyed.

data.name: Pups Save Ace's Birthday Surprise
data.overview: Rocky and the pups fix a vintage junk car for a surprise gift for Ace Sorensen's birthday but Mayor Humdinger wants the car for himself.

data.name: Pups Save a Tower of Pizza
data.overview: Adventure Bay works hard to earn the record for having the world's highest tower of pizzas.

data.name: Pups Save the Jungle Penguins
data.overview: When an ice floe carrying three penguins lands in the jungle, the pups must get the birds back to their frosty home;

data.name: Pups Save a Freighter
data.overview: Daring Danny is locked out of the lighthouse Turbot left him to look after, with a freighter headed his way.

data.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Stop a Meltdown
data.overview: It's a hot day in Adventure Bay, and things are melting, and the pups will need a lot of fire-pup power to cool things down.

data.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups and the Mystery of the Missing Phones
data.overview: Cell phones are vanishing all over Adventure Bay, and the pups will need a lot of police power to solve this mystery.

data.name: Pups Save a Melon Festival
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger's plan to win the great melon contest goes off the rails when his "melon" bounces away and causes chaos all over town.

data.name: Pups Save a Cow
data.overview: Farmer Al's truck gets stuck on a broken bridge.

data.name: Pups Save the Honey
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger steals Farmer Yumi's beehive to have honey for himself and the Kitten Catastrophe Crew.

data.name: Pups Save Mayor Goodway's Purse
data.overview: Seagulls carry Mayor Goodway's purse with her precious grapes and Chickaletta in it.

data.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Mountain Climbers
data.overview: Cap'n Turbot, Francois, Mayor Goodway, Chickaletta, and Daring Danny X fall into a canyon high up in the mountains. And it's up to the pups, led by Skye to save the mountain climbers in this Ultimate Flight Rescue.

data.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save Captain Gordy
data.overview: Rubble leads the pups into building a landing pad for Captain Gordy's spaceship as part of an Ultimate Construction Rescue.

data.name: Pups and the Stinky Bubble Trouble
data.overview: A strange odor is chasing the jungle animals away from their homes.

data.name: Pups Save the Baby Ostriches
data.overview: After Olivia the Ostrich falls into a canyon, the pups work together to lift her to safety and protect her soon-to-hatch eggs.

data.name: Pups Save Gustavo's Guitar
data.overview: Gustavo Goodway’s guitar is missing. The pups need to find it before tonight’s campfire concert!

data.name: Pups Save the Yoga Goats
data.overview: Farmer Yumi’s new Yoga Goat class is a hit, until her goats go missing! The PAW Patrol must find the goats and return them safely to Yumi’s farm.

data.name: Pups Save Bedtime
data.overview: The Turbots are trapped somewhere in the jungle. They tried to call the PAW Patrol, but their phone cut out!

data.name: Pups Save Chickaletta's Egg
data.overview: Chickaletta has laid an egg, but it rolled away and is heading through town. The PAW Patrol has to catch it before it breaks!

data.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: When Super Kitties Attack
data.overview: The Kitty Catastrophe crew gets super powers, and now those little kittens are causing big problems all over town! It’ll take the Mighty Pups and their Super Paws to stop them and restore order to Adventure Bay!

data.name: Pups Save a Manatee
data.overview: Farmer Al and Farmer Yumi need help from the PAW Patrol to a get a manatee to the swamp!

data.name: Pups Save Breakfast
data.overview: Mr. Porter and Alex are in a sticky situation - they’re up to their ears in maple syrup! It’s up to the PAW Patrol to save the Porter’s and Breakfast!

data.name: Pups Save the Land Pirates
data.overview: Pirates Alex, Julia, Julius and Chick-ARR-letta, are sent sailing into the desert and get lost! It’s up to the PAW Patrol to save these Land pirates.

data.name: Pups Save the Birdwatching Turbots
data.overview: Cap’n Turbot and Francois chirp need help when a bird-watching contest leaves them up in the air

data.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Meet the Mighty Twins
data.overview: Super-bandit Ladybird shrieks havoc in Adventure Bay taking all of the town’s treasures – including Mayor Goodway! The Mighty Pups team up with new super pals The Mighty Twins to save the day – and the Mayor - in this super heroic adventure!

data.name: Pups Save a Freaky Pup-Day
data.overview: Chase and Chickaletta switch bodies and must learn to work together to return Cap'n Turbot's boat to the bay.

data.name: Pups Save a Runaway Mayor
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger creates robotic pants to cheat at the Most Amazing Athlete Contest. They go haywire so the pups have to save a runaway mayor.

data.name: Pups Save a Bat Family
data.overview: A rockslide traps a Bat Family inside their cave, so the PAW Patrol has to free them! The bats search for a new home leads to problems in town though!

data.name: Pups Save a Mud Monster
data.overview: Snowboarders on Jake’s Mountain are stuck on a broken chair lift while a monster is on the loose!

data.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Save a Giant Chicken
data.overview: The Ladybird is back and Chickaletta has super powers! The Mighty Twins join the Mighty Pups to save a Giant Chicken and the town.

data.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Stop Harold's Deep Freeze
data.overview: The Mighty Pups have to stop Harold Humdinger before he puts Adventure Bay in a deep freeze so he can become mayor.

data.name: Pups Save the Balloon Pups
data.overview: Giant balloons have floated away from a parade and it’s up to the pups to save the pup balloons, the parade and Mayor Humdinger!

data.name: Pups Save the Spider Spies
data.overview: The Turbot cousins try to spot a rare spider, but get stuck in its web. It’s up to the PAW Patrol save the spider spies!

data.name: Pups Save the Bears
data.overview: A rockslide traps a bear family inside their cave, so the PAW Patrol has to free them! The bears search for a new home leads to problems in town though!

data.name: Pups Save a Farmerless Farm
data.overview: With the farmers out of town, Mayor Goodway calls the PAW Patrol to wrangle the animals and control the chaos on the farmerless farm.

data.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups and the Big Twin Trick
data.overview: The Ladybird is up to her old tricks again, but this time the Mighty Twins have a super trick of their own!

data.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Save the Mega Mayor
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger finally gets super powers, and it’s a total cat-astrophe! The Mighty Pups are summoned to save the Mega Mayor from himself.

data.name: Pups Save a White Wolf
data.overview: After a sudden snow storm, Everest cares for a white wolf cub as they work together to help the PAW Patrol find them.

data.name: Pups Save a Wrong Way Explorer
data.overview: Famous wrong-way explorer, Travelling Travis, accidentally takes Chickaletta to the North Pole where they run into... crocodiles?

data.name: Pups Save the Squirrels
data.overview: The PAW Patrol is on a roll when squirrels stash acorns in Alex's treehouse causing it to fall onto Daring Danny's skateboard!

data.name: Pups Save a Roo
data.overview: It's a switcheroo situation when a joey is separated from its mama. It's up to the pups to save a roo and the day!

data.name: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Pups vs. the Copycat
data.overview: The Mighty Pups get Charged Up to take on new super-baddie, The Copycat. It’ll take all new powers and gear to take down their most formidable foe to date.

data.name: Pups Save a Humsquatch
data.overview: Travelling Travis yelps for help when he finds a mysterious creature in trouble. The PAW Patrol heads to Foggy Bottom to save a Humsquatch!

data.name: Pups Save a Far Flung Flying Disc
data.overview: When a robo-toy causes mayhem, Ryder knows just who to call to save the far flung flying disc!

data.name: Pups Rescue a Rescuer
data.overview: Mayor Goodway tries to help the PAW Patrol rescue Danny, but the pups end up having to rescue the rescuer, too!

data.name: Pups Save the Phantom of the Frog Pond
data.overview: A spooky sound forces frogs from their home. The pups must bring them home and solve the mystery of the frog pond phantom.

data.name: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Pups Stop a Big Bad Bot
data.overview: When Harold Humdinger uses a GIANT ROBOT to take the buildings of Adventure Bay and make his OWN town, the Mighty Pups must save the day!

data.name: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Mighty Pups Versus the Dome
data.overview: The COPYCAT is BACK and Adventure Bay needs a Mighty Rescue when he traps the entire town under a GIANT DOME!

data.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Opening Ceremonies
