data.overview: Marshall leads the pups when an underground fire threatens the opening ceremonies in this Ultimate Fire Rescue.

data.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Adventure Bay Games
data.overview: Chase and his police-pups must find the missing medals to save the Adventure Bay Games in this Ultimate Police Rescue.

data.name: Pups Save a Tour Bus
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger's tour bus goes out of control when he tries to bring tourists to Foggy Bottom! PAW Patrol to the rescue!

data.name: Pups Save Midnight at the Museum
data.overview: A fun museum sleepover is interrupted when Alex and the Mini Patrol go missing, and Mayor Goodway gets stranded on a T-Rex!

data.name: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Pups Stop a Humdinger Horde
data.overview: The Mighty Pups have to save the day when Harold makes a cloning machine and Mayor Humdinger clones five versions of himself, as they take Katie's Pet Parlor to Foggy Bottom, with Katie and Cali inside.

data.name: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Pups Save a Mighty Lighthouse
data.overview: Harold uses his superpowers to turn Cap'n Turbot's lighthouse into a rocket ship to fly to the moon, but the pups make him go underwater instead.

data.name: Pups Save Election Day
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger runs for mayor of Adventure Bay, his Mayor Mobile runs out of control, the PAW Patrol have to save the day!

data.name: Pups Save the Bubble Monkeys
data.overview: Ryder and the pups visit Tracker and Carlos in the jungle, a group of monkeys find themselves in sticky bubble trouble!

data.name: Pups Save an Antarctic Martian
data.overview: Travelling Travis thinks he is on Mars when he lands in Antarctica, due to his helmet cover being red.

data.name: Pups Save the Maze Explorers
data.overview: While visiting Carlos and Tracker in the jungle with the pups, Mr. Porter and Alex get trapped inside a huge maze while going on a hike.

data.name: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Pups vs. Three Super Baddies
data.overview: Tired of Ryder and the PAW Patrol always winning up to the top, Harold Humdinger, Ladybird and the Copycat team up and uses Mayor Humdinger's idea to take the pups' meteor to get more powers, causing the Mighty Pups to lose their powers. With the help from Tuck and Ella, the Mighty Pups use a piece of the meteor to stop the three baddies and save the meteor.

data.name: Pups Save a Waiter Bot
data.overview: Mr. Porter gets a new robot that helps him around the café, but it soon malfunctions and cleans things all over town.

data.name: Pups Stop a Pie-Clone
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger tries to get pies faster by cooling them down, only to make them fly in a tornado.

data.name: Dino Rescue: Pups and the Lost Dino Eggs
data.overview: The pups go into a tunnel in Jake's mountain to go into a world of dinosaurs, where they meet a dino expert pup named Rex and his owners, Dr. Turbot and her daughter, Taylor Turbot. However, Mayor Humdinger has followed the PAW Patrol into the world and decides to take dino eggs back to Foggy Bottom. It is up to the pups to get the baby dinosaurs back to their mothers on a Dino Rescue.

data.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Pterodactyl
data.overview: Rex, Taylor Turbot, and the Baby Brachiosaurus, whose name was Benny, call for the PAW Patrol to help Maverick the daredevil pterodactyl after his wing gets injured by a rockslide. After being rescued, Dr. Turbot gives Maverick a brace to help him fly. But a fountain splashed on him and then he bumped into a tree, causing him to spin out of control.

data.name: Dino Rescue: Pups and the Big Rumble
data.overview: The pups must get the dinosaurs away from an active volcano in the Dino Wilds before it erupts.

data.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Hum-Dino
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger takes his kitties to the Dino Wilds for some dino acting lessons, but instead finds himself on top of a runaway Brachiosaurus bound for Adventure Bay! Now it's up to the pups to save the town before the Dino stomps all over it!

data.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Sore Dino
data.overview: In the Dino Wilds, Marshall performs some Dino dentistry with the help of an ancient geyser and his fellow Dino Pup Pals.

data.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save the Triceratops Tag-Alongs
data.overview: Francois and Cap'n Turbot are in the Dino Wilds for an adventure. But a sightseeing expedition quickly turns into a wild dino ride!

data.name: Pups Save the Big Bad Bird Crew
data.overview: The pups must save Chickaletta after she gets lost along with Myrna the Mynha bird.

data.name: Pups Save a Soapbox Derby
data.overview: Mr. Porter's new high tech waiter robot helps around the Café, but it can't stop cleaning! It's up to the Pups to clean up the mess all over town!

data.name: Pups Save the Skydivers
data.overview: Mayor Goodway and Farmer Al end up getting stranded up a ledge of a canyon after skydiving from the air and are trapped by a mountain lion and it's cubs.

data.name: Pups Save the Cupcakes
data.overview: Cap'n Turbot accidentally takes Alex's cupcakes for school instead of fish treats for Wally and Walinda.

data.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Pupmobiles
data.overview: Mayor Goodway honors the PAW Patrol with the Key to the City. But Sid Swashbuckle and his trusty pirate pup Arrby swipe the key. Ryder calls for an Ultimate Rescue as the pups team up, Police style, to solve the mystery and stop those pesky pirates.

data.name: Pups Save a Lost Gold Miner
data.overview: Uncle Otis takes a trip to a lost gold mine. After wandering off course, Ryder and the Pups must save him from the booby-trapped mine.

data.name: Pups Save Uncle Otis from His Cabin
data.overview: Uncle Otis's installs a Smart Home 3000, in his cabin, that ends up trapping Uncle Otis and Mr. Wingnut inside!

data.name: Pups Save a Rocket Roller Skater
data.overview: A mix-up delivery leads to Ms. Marjorie and Danny speeding out of control in Adventure Bay. Now the pups must rescue them.

data.name: Pups Save Ryder's Surprise
data.overview: Ryder's present ends up in the jungle and Carlos is trapped in a Jungle Gym. It's up to the pups to save the present and Carlos.

data.name: Pups Save the Marooned Mayors
data.overview: While out ice fishing in the North Country, Mayors Goodway, Humdinger, along with Chickaletta, get stuck in an ice crevasse.

data.name: Pups Save the Game Show
data.overview: The Wingnuts' farm plays host to a rootin' tootin' game show hosted by Cowgirl Beryl!

data.name: Pups Save the Chalk Art
data.overview: The Mini Patrol and the Pups race to save a mural before it rains.

data.name: Pups Save the Hot Potato
data.overview: Farmer Al and Yumi discover their garden is full of holes and their one-of-a-kind potato is missing.

data.name: Pups Save a Bah Humdinger!
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger is being very naughty on Christmas Eve, and it's up to the Paw Patrol to help Santa and save Christmas.

data.name: Pups Save Little Hairy
data.overview: Big Hairy's little brother falls into a hole and Tracker gets carried away by Big Hairy. It's time for a Jungle Rescue!

data.name: Pups Save a Kooky Climber
data.overview: Daring Danny X tries extreme rock climbing with Ace Sorensen, but they end up in an eagle's territory. It's up to the PAW Patrol to rescue the extreme duo.

data.name: Pups Save Queen Cluck-Cluck
data.overview: Mayor Goodway dreams she's traveled to the mysterious Cluck Cluck Island, a very strange land where Chickaletta is royalty.

data.name: Pups Save a Desert Flounder
data.overview: Traveling Travis's balloon gets caught on the Flounder.

data.name: Moto Pups: Pups vs. the Ruff-Ruff Pack
data.overview: The Motorcycle Stunt Show comes to town - bringing famed stunt cyclist Wild Cat, and the trouble-making cyclists, the Ruff-Ruff Pack. Wild Cat joins the PAW Patrol to help stop the baddies from trashing the town!

data.name: Pups Save a Trash-Dinger
data.overview: Rocky uses his newest vehicle, the Re-Use it Truck, to help clean up the beach from Mayor Humdinger's trash compacting truck.

data.name: Pups Save the Royal Armor
data.overview: Rocky uses his new Re-Use it Truck to help put armor that is for the Princess of Barkingburg back together again.

data.name: Moto Pups: Pups Save the Donuts
data.overview: The Ruff-Ruff Pack steals Mr. Porter's Mini-Donut Maker, the Moto-pups set off to get the machine back in one piece.

data.name: Moto Pups: Pups Save the Kitties
data.overview: The Ruff-Ruff Pack takes over Humdinger's lair and run off with his kitties. Now the Moto Pups and Wild Cat must rescue Mayor Humdinger's precious felines.

data.name: Moto Pups: Pups Save a Moto Mayor
data.overview: Mayor Goodway thinks she can change the Ruff-Ruff pack's naughty ways by pretending to be a "bad" biker and becoming part of their gang, but when Gasket puts the Mayor through a battery of tough tests, it's up to the Moto Pups to rescue her.

data.name: Moto Pups: Rescue at Twisty Top Mesa
data.overview: The Moto Pups must rescue the Ruff-Ruff Pack on a bus off the Twisty Top Mesa.

data.name: Moto Pups: Pups Save a Sneezy Chase
data.overview: Chase's cat allergies lead him to the desert where he's trapped with the Ruff-Ruff Pack

data.name: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Stop a Junk-Monster
data.overview: When Wingnut's junk pile and Oscar go missing at the same time, Chase and team are called in to solve the mystery.

data.name: Pups Save the Whale Pod
data.overview: When Francois accidentally crashes his diving bell, the PAW Patrol must rescue him, a Pupfish, and a pod of whales.

data.name: Pups Save Thundermouth
data.overview: Shortly after listening to the story of Thundermouth, the pups are on a mission to save elephants spooked by a scary noise.

data.name: Pups Save a Class Pet
data.overview: Mayor Goodway is left in charge of a class pet, but the hamster escapes! Now it's up to the PAW Patrol to save the pet.

data.name: Pups Save a Runaway Rooster
data.overview: Chickaletta and Roosterio run away from a chicken show and get stuck on top of a runaway drone.

data.name: Pups Save a Snowbound Cow
data.overview: When Bettina wanders up Jake's mountain and gets caught in a snowstorm, it's up to the PAW Patrol to bring her safely down.

data.name: Pups Save a Sweet Mayor
data.overview: Encased in a huge chocolate bunny, Humdinger is carried away by hungry raccoons and ends up floating in Adventure Bay with a curious dolphin.

data.name: Pups Save a Magic Trick
data.overview: Wendini's magic has gone awry, as Bunnies take over the Easter Festival. Can the PAW Patrol rescue the festival and stop the Bunnies?

data.name: Pups Save a Rubble-Double
data.overview: Rubble dreams that he's been taken aboard a spaceship and meets his alien double. When the ship crashes on an alien planet, he needs help from Ryder and the rest of the pups.

data.name: Pups Save a Clown
data.overview: The pups have to save Mayor Humdinger and his kittens when they mess around with Toodles the Clown's tiny clown car.

data.name: Pups Stop the Cheetah
data.overview: The Paw Patrol gets a brand new Paw Patroller to stop Mayor Humdinger's cousin, the Cheetah, from turning the jungle into a race course! Now it's up to the pups to rescue the jungle and stop the Cheetah!

data.name: Pups Save the Mustache
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger's mustache ends up flying after he shaves it off. Can the pups find the mustache and save it before it ends up on the cover of the magazine?

data.name: Pups Save the Funhouse
data.overview: The pups have to rescue Daring Danny X and a carnival train when the train results in a mountainside funhouse-style wild ride.

data.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Water Walker
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger swipes Francois' water-walking shoes, he ends up trapped in a pit-like turtle nest. The Sea Patrol returns once again to save him.

data.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Windsurfer
data.overview: The Sea Patrol must rescue Ms. Marjorie and Hurricane Harrigan when a nearby volcano erupts.

data.name: Pups Save the Hiding Elephants
data.overview: The elephants become trapped in the Monkey Temple after a bee frightens them away from their watering hole. Can the PAW Patrol rescue the elephants?

data.name: Pups Save a Yodeler
data.overview: When Mr. Wingnut runs away from wolves that are attracted to his yodeling, he ends up trapped in a canyon. The PAW Patrol has to hurry to save him.

data.name: Pups Save the Dizzy Dust Express
data.overview: When the Dizzy Dust Express appears with no one aboard, the PAW Patrol must stop the runaway train and find the missing passengers.

data.name: Pups Save the Treetop Trekkers
data.overview: Mayor Goodway, Tilly Turbot and Ms. Marjorie's jungle zip-lining adventure becomes a tragedy, when they get stuck on the treetops, and it's up to the PAW Patrol to rescue them.

data.name: Pups Save the Treasure Cruise
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger tricks Mayor Goodway, her uncle Otis, Mr. Porter, and Alex to sail icy waters in search of an Antarctic treasure, but they need the PAW Patrol when they get stranded on shore.

data.name: Pups Save Rocket Ryder
data.overview: The pups need to rescue Ryder and Alex when they get out of control on a rocket-powered ATV.

data.name: Pups and Katie Stop the Barking Kitty Crew
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger disrupts Adventure Bay with his barking kitties and it's up to Ryder, Katie, and the PAW Patrol to stop their barking mishaps.

data.name: Pups Save the Glasses
data.overview: Cap'n Turbot loses his glasses, and it's up to Ryder and the PAW Patrol to look for it.

data.name: Pups vs. a Neon Humdinger
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger's giant neon sign of himself gets loose, Ryder and the PAW Patrol must stop it from rolling through town!

data.name: Pups Save a Royal Painting
data.overview: Sweetie steals a painting of the Princess of Barkingburg and attempts to replace it with one of herself.

data.name: Pups Save a Chicken Tulip
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger and his mother Helga help Mayor Goodway look for a rare tulip, Humdinger's attempts to have his mom find the flower first gets them all in trouble.

data.name: Pups Stop an Xtreme Shark
data.overview: When Daring Danny X takes off on an mechanical shark with Ms. Marjorie and Mr. Porter swallowed into it, Ryder, Chase, Rocky and Skye must rescue them.

data.name: Pups Save a Show Jumper
data.overview: Winnie Winnington goes looking for a frog to enter in a frog-jumping contest and ends up needing to be rescued in a swamp.

data.name: Pups Save the Salmon
data.overview: The pups try to help salmon get to an ocean and also need to rescue Alex who gets stuck on top of a dam.

data.name: Pups vs. Ouchy Paws
data.overview: Sid Swashbuckle pretends to be a legendary ghost so that he can take Danny's new skateboard.

data.name: Pups Save a Glow-in-the-Dark Party
data.overview: Ryder and the Pups race to save Mayor Goodway's Glow-in-the-Dark Party.

data.name: Rescue Knights: Quest for the Dragon's Tooth
data.overview: When Ryder and the pups are knighted by the Princess of Barkingburg, they're put to the test when a disgruntled ex-Knight named Claw gains control of a dragon called Sparks and attacks the castle.

data.name: Pups Stop a Super Shaker
data.overview: Farmer Al's harvest machine goes haywire and shakes up Adventure Bay, even threatening to rock the Lookout off its foundation.

data.name: Pups Save a Flying Farmhouse
data.overview: Farmer Al has a wild dream that the PAW Patrol must rescue him.

data.name: Pups Save a Box Fort
data.overview: The Pups must save Rocky and Humdinger from a runaway box fort.

data.name: Pups Save Travelin' Travis from Really Big Bill
data.overview: When Skye helps Traveling Travis search for Big Bill Island, the misguided explorer gets carried away by a really, really big bird.

data.name: Rescue Knights: Pups Save a Dozing Dragon
data.overview: When the Duke and Claw use a magic cauldron to put the people of Barkingburg to sleep, their plan backfires when the enchanted fog works on Sparks; it's up to the Paw Patrol to wake up the Dragon along with everyone else in town.

data.name: Rescue Knights: Pups Save a Tournament
data.overview: The Rescue Knights help a mystery knight, the Princess of Barkingburg in disguise, win a tournament when Claw and Sparks show up and sabotage the event.

data.name: Rescue Knights: Pups Save the Baby Dragons
data.overview: The Rescue Knights must save some baby dragons from Claw and reunite them with their mother.

data.name: Rescue Knights: Break the Ice
data.overview: The Rescue Knights must warm up Barkingburg and rescue the Princess and the Earl from Big Benji after Claw and Sparks freezes it.

data.name: Rescue Knights: Pups Save Excalibark
data.overview: When Chase removes the fake Golden Bone of Excalibark from its stone, he becomes the Princess of Barkingburg's Royal Knight. Will his friends rescue him and fix the bridge?

data.name: Dancing with Luke Stars
data.overview: Mr. Wingnut turns a floating dance floor hosted by Luke Stars into a literal floating dance floor, causing everyone that is on it needing to be rescued.

data.name: Pups Save a Mischievous Octopus
data.overview: An octopus the Francois brought for a museum exhibit becomes homesick and makes the museum unknowingly haunted to the Turbots.

data.name: Pups Save the Kitties and the Kiddies
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger babysit's his new friend Cassie's children Eddie and Emmy until the animals at the farm escape and chase after the kids when the Kitty Catastrophe Crew puts treats in their pockets. Now Mayor Humdinger must enlist the PAW Patrol to rescue Eddie and Emmy and keep Cassie from finding out what happened.

data.name: Pups Save the Greenhouse
data.overview: In the arctic, Mayor Goodway and Mayor Humdinger get locked inside a greenhouse and need help from the PAW Patrol to get out.

data.name: Pups Save the Floating Goodways
data.overview: The Goodways float away on an inflatable swan. When the PAW Patrol tries to rescue them, real swans protect the inflatable where they mistook it as one of their own.

data.name: Pups Save the Portable Pet Wash
data.overview: Katie's new pet washing truck gets stolen by Mayor Humdinger, only for his Kitten Catastrophe Crew to mess with the truck's control and causing it to float on bubbles.

data.name: Pups Save a Lonesome Walrus
data.overview: Wally the Walrus searches all over Adventure Bay for Cap'n Turbot and turns the town upside-down in the process.

data.name: Pups Save the Hummy Gummies
data.overview: Everybody loves Helga Humdinger's Hummy Gummy treats, causing Mayor Humdinger to get jealous and steal them all.

data.name: Liberty Makes a New Friend
data.overview: Liberty mistakenly brings a bear into town, thinking it's someone's pet; She must fix her mistake and rescue Chickaletta.

data.name: Pups Save the Pup Pup Boogie Contest
data.overview: Francois' hot-air balloon goes out of control before the Pup Pup Boogie Contest; The Pups, with Liberty, race to the rescue.

data.name: Pups Meet the Cat Pack
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger transforms his robot cat into a tiger-sized metal-eating menace, the PAW Patrol calls in the Cat Pack for help in stopping the creature.

data.name: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Rocket Rescuers
data.overview: When Chickaletta gets trapped in a rocket, it flies all over Adventure Bay very fast. Can the Cat Pack and the Mighty Pups stop the runaway rocket before it's too late?

data.name: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: The Golden Lion Mask
data.overview: The Ruff-Ruff Pack is back and this time they stole the Golden Lion Mask. Now the cats and the pups must stop the Ruff-Ruff Pack and rescue the mask and return it to the museum!

data.name: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: The Cat Who Roared
data.overview: When a monkey is injured, it's up to the PAW Patrol, along with Cat Pack veterans Leo and Rory to save it and the jungle!

data.name: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Saving the Safe
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger and Meow-Meow break into Mayor Goodway's safe, the Cat Pack and the PAW Patrol must save it and stop Meow-Meow.

data.name: Pups Save a Humdinger Doll
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger gets kidnapped as Big Hairy's doll, the PAW Patrol must save him.

data.name: Pups Save a Sand Sculpture Contest
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger tries to cheat at the Adventure Bay sand sculpture contest, the PAW Patrol must stop his out-of-control machine!

data.name: Big Truck Pups Stop a Flood
data.overview: With their new Big Truck vehicles and their new friend, Al, the PAW Patrol must save Adventure Bay from flooding.

data.name: Pups Save the Tooth Fairy
data.overview: Julius loses his tooth and has a dream that the PAW Patrol saves a bumbling Tooth Fairy named Beamy.

data.name: Pups Solve the Mystery of the Missing Art
data.overview: When all the paintings mysteriously disappear from the Art Museum festival, except for Eddie and Emmy's painting, the PAW Patrol must solve the Missing Art Mystery and return all the paintings.

data.name: Pups Save the Hatchlings
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger gets stuck in the mud while delivering the wrong eggs, it's up to the PAW Patrol to rescue him and get the right delivery.

data.name: Pups Save a Wrongway Farmhand
data.overview: When the animals from Farmer Al and Yumi's farm get stuck after Traveling Travis gets too confused, the pups must make things right.

data.name: Big Truck Pups: Pups Save the Bridge
data.overview: The pups must save Adventure Bay's big bridge from collapsing.

data.name: Big Truck Pups: Pups Save a Sliding Chalet
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger's Mountain vacation literally goes downhill, it's up to the Pups to stop Jake's Chalet before it crashes.

data.name: Big Truck Pups: Pups Save a Really Big Dish
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger messes with the satellite dish and downs a satellite and the town's communication systems.

data.name: Big Truck Pups: Pups Save the Swiped Speakers
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger hijacks Al's big rig carrying Luke Stars and his concert equipment, it's up to the Big Truck Pups to rescue him.

data.name: Big Truck Pups: Pups Save the Big Big Pipes
data.overview: When Al's load of big pipes breaks loose, it's up to the Big Truck Pups to save their friend from the rolling hazards.

data.name: Pups Stop the Return of Humsquatch
data.overview: When Eddie and Emmy get impatient at the carnival, they hide in Mayor Humdinger's Humsquatch costume to chase everyone out.

data.name: Pups Save a Lonely Ghost
data.overview: Rubble dreams that he meets a ghost and learns that it's not easy to help a ghost make new friends.

data.name: Mighty Pups Stop a Mighty Eel
data.overview: When an eel accidentally swallows a piece of the meteor and becomes gigantic, it's up to the Mighty Pups to save Adventure Bay.

data.name: Pups Save a Floating Royal Carriage
data.overview: After Sweetie decides to commandeer the Princess's royal carriage and horses, Sid the pirate sends Arrby to steal it.

data.name: Aqua Pups: Pups Save a Floating Castle
data.overview: When an unhappy Merpup tries to float Puplantis to the surface, it's up to the PAW Patrol and their newest member Coral (Skye's long-lost merpup cousin) to save the city and stop him.

data.name: Pups Save a T-Rex Tyke
data.overview: When a baby T-Rex gets lost, Ryder and the pups go on a daring mission to the Dino Wilds to help find him.

data.name: Pups Save a Playful Elephant Calf
data.overview: When Everest joins the PAW Patrol for a visit to the jungle, she makes friends with a clumsy elephant calf and then must help rescue him.

data.name: All Paws on Deck
data.overview: Ryder calls on every member of the PAW Patrol to stop a hi-tech kid inventor from demolishing Adventure Bay so she can build her own dream city in its place.

data.name: Pups Save Katie and Some Kitties
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger tricks Katie into watching his kitties, an alarm system is set off and the PAW Patrol must rescue them.

data.name: Pups Save a Helo Humdinger
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger swipes one of Ryder's early inventions - an aircraft - he must be rescued from an out of control flight.

data.name: Aqua Pups: Pups Save a Mer-Race
data.overview: The PAW Patrol take part in a big mer-race, but must come to the rescue when Moby's cheating puts Puplantis in serious danger.

data.name: Aqua Pups: Pups Save a Merdinger
data.overview: Hearing about the pearls of Puplantis, Mayor Humdinger and the Kitten Catastrophe Crew pilot a mechanical shark to take them to Puplantis. While the Kitten Catastrophe Crew performs a diversion, Mayor Humdinger poses as a mer-pup named Merdinger in order to get close to the giant clam that makes the pearls so that he can get a purple pearl. Coral calls in the PAW Patrol when havoc occurs in Puplantis.

data.name: Aqua Pups: Pups Save the Whale Patroller
data.overview: In his latest plan to get to the mainland, Moby hijacks the Whale Patroller and pilots it, though he and McSquidly work on mastering it's controls. With the PAW Patrol's vehicles on the Whale Patroller, Coral summons some sea creatures to come to their aid and act as a mode of transportation for them with Robo-Dog being Ryder's mode of transportatio

data.name: Aqua Pups: Pups Save the Reef
data.overview: Cap'n Turbot and Coral find an old submarine purched near a canyon that has a coral reef in it. Coral finds Moby and McSquidly in it looking for parts for one of his inventions. When Coral gets trapped with Moby and McSquidly with the submarine threatening to fall onto the coral reef, it's up to the Aqua Pups to rescue them and get the submarine away from the coral reef.

data.name: Aqua Pups: Pups Stop a Giant Squid
data.overview: Using a special conch shell after stealing it from the museum, Moby and McSquidly go to Squidland where they control a giant squid into heading towards Puplantis to disrupt the distribution of the golden orbs. The Aqua Pups must work on preventing the giant squid from reaching Puplantis and thwarting Moby.

data.name: Pups Save a Flamingo Dancer
data.overview: The Paw Patrol searches for Julia, Julius and a flamingo when they go missing from a dance contest.

data.name: Pups Save a Mayor and Her Mini
data.overview: The Paw Patrol comes to the rescue when Mayor Goodway and her niece Julia get stuck on a runaway art installation.

data.name: Pups Save the Wind Trekkers
data.overview: When Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta get trapped inside a mesa, it's up to the Paw Patrol and a little snake to rescue them.

data.name: Pups Save a Trophy
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger's mom Helga loses her son's phony trophy, the Paw Patrol have to rescue her and its secret stash of treats.

data.name: Pups Save Alex's Feathery Friends
data.overview: The Paw Patrol must rescue Mr. Porter and reunite an ostrich family before the big birds get into big trouble.

data.name: Pups Save a Puffy Mayor
data.overview: During Mayor Goodway's fashion show, the Pups must save Farmer Al and Mayor Humdinger after Humdinger's puffy shirt floats away with them.

data.name: Pups Save a Jukebox
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger steals a jukebox so he can play an annoying song all day long. Chase and Rubble track it down to save the records.

data.name: Pups Save a Mayor on a Wire
data.overview: A hungry eagle causes Mayor Goodway's tightrope walking lesson to go awry sending her careening down Jake's Mountain

data.name: Pups Save the Baby Space Rocks
data.overview: When a mysterious storm drops hailstones that hatch into Baby Space Rocks, the Pups must find a way to keep them safe.

data.name: Pups Save the Eddies and Emmys
data.overview: A 3-D printer leads to trouble when Eddie and Emmy make 3-D reproductions of themselves and play pranks all over Adventure Bay.

data.name: Charger Visits the Pups
data.overview: Rubble's cousin, Charger, visits Adventure Bay just in time to help out when a Humdinger-caused geyser destroys Mr. Porter's cafe

data.name: Pups Save a Shiny Ride
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger hatches a plan to sabotage a "Shiniest Ride Contest", so it's up to the Paw Patrol to save the day.

data.name: Pups Save the Wacky Water Skiers
data.overview: en Emmy and Eddie take a joyride, Hurricane Harrigan and Cap'n Turbot get caught water skiing behind the out-of-control boat.

data.name: Pups Save the Mayor's Assistant
data.overview: Daring Danny X becomes Mayor Humdinger's assistant and builds a theme park. A jealous Humdinger sabotages the rides.

data.name: Pups Save a High-Flying Hen
data.overview: After Chickaletta accidentally takes flight on a toy airplane, it's up to the Paw Patrol to rescue her.

data.name: Pups Save a Sloth
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger mistakes a sloth for a monkey. He races the Paw Patrol to find it when it goes missing to cover up his blunder.

data.name: Jungle Pups: Pups Find a Hidden Jungle
data.overview: Tracker stumbles into a hidden jungle and its animal inhabitants who are frightened by the rumblings of an impending volcano. It's up to Ryder and the pups to use their new animal vehicles to rescue the creatures from the hot lava and save their home.

data.name: Pups Save a Windswept Polar Bear Cub
data.overview: When a windstorm sends a polar bear cub down to Adventure Bay, it's up to Ryder, Everest, and the pups to bring the baby bear back to its family.

data.name: Pups Save a Drive-In
data.overview: The Pups must save Mayor Humdinger from a runaway movie projector at the new drive-in.

data.name: Pups Save Their Digi-Tal Friends
data.overview: The Paw Patrol must save the day when two overly helpful robots take on more than they can handle.

data.name: Pups Save the Rainbow
data.overview: Then, in a dream, Mayor Humdinger finds a Prism that makes rainbows and drains Adventure Bay of color. It's up to the pups to restore colour to Adventure Bay.

data.name: Jungle Pups: Pups Save the Big, Big Animals
data.overview: When the Hidden Jungle animals appear to be uncharacteristically frightened, Marshall discovers a saber-tooth tiger has been stalking them. And the big-fanged tiger is not the only creature strangely awakening from long, long ago

data.name: Pups Save the Meerkat Pirates
data.overview: Arrby recruits a crew of Meerkats to gather magical seeds. It's up to the Pups to recover the seeds and rescue Arrby and crew.

data.name: Pups Save a Hum-Hippo
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger wants a hippo as his new hench-animal, but needs a rescue when it gallops off with Humdinger on his back.

data.name: Pups Save a Golden Sweetie
data.overview: The Pups rescue Sweetie when she sneaks into the Hidden Jungle and finds a mysterious orb that causes everything she touches to turn gold.

data.name: Pups Save the Giant Ants
data.overview: The Pups must save a colony of giant ants from destroying the Hidden Jungle and themselves.

data.name: Pups Stop a Gold Finding Machine
data.overview: The Paw Patrol springs into action when a digging machine goes out of control and takes Uncle Otis on a wild ride.

data.name: Pups Help Mayor Humdinger Out of a Jam
data.overview: Digi and Tal, try to help Mayor Humdinger but leave the Mayor covered in jam, the Pups must rescue him from hungry animals.

data.name: Liberty's Mountain Rescue
data.overview: Liberty comes to visit the pups just in time to help save the Turbots and their radar doppler in a daring mountain rescue.

data.name: Pups Save a Flying Farmer Yumi
data.overview: When Farmer Al builds a windmill, the wind takes Farmer Yumi and Garby on a wild flight.

data.name: Pups Stop the Falling Space Junk
data.overview: When Digi & Tal's space vacuum breaks it's up to the pups to save Mayor Humdinger from falling space debris.

data.name: Pups Stop the Giant Cuckoo
data.overview: Humdinger's Cuckoo Clock goes out of control. Ryder and the Pups must rescue Travis and get control of the Cuckoo to save Humdinger.

data.name: Pups Save a Hum-ñata
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger's birthday party goes horribly awry when Cat Marshall gets trapped inside a life-sized piñata.

data.name: Pups Stop the Foggy Skies
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger tries pushing fog into Adventure Bay. It's up to the PAW Patrol to find animals missing in the clouds and save the day.

data.name: Mighty Pups vs. The Mayor of the Universe
data.overview: Liberty and the Poms team up with the Mighty Pups to save Adventure Bay from being crushed by a giant, flying top hat.

data.name: Charger's Christmas Adventure
data.overview: Charger helps the PAW Patrol rescue Santa and his helpers when a blizzard at the North Pole threatens to close down Christmas.

data.name: Pups Save Great Uncle Smiley's Cup
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger enlists Digi and Tal to help him win a hockey game. It's up to the pups to undo the mayhem the team causes.

data.name: Pups Save a Baby Caribou
data.overview: When a baby caribou winds up speeding down a mountainside, it's up to the PAW Patrol to save the calf and reunite him with his family.

data.name: Pups Save Luke and His Luke-Alike
data.overview: When Luke Stars gets blown away in a giant tumbleweed, Digi and Tal make a duplicate which dances out of control.

data.name: Mighty Pups vs. The Big Chill
data.overview: Harold creates a ray that can freeze things instantly, it goes awry and sends a giant ice ball toward Adventure Bay.

data.name: Mighty Pups vs. The Mighty Cheetah
data.overview: The Cheetah snatches half of Chase's Meteor Crystal. Chase must stop the Cheetah and restore his crystal.

data.name: Mighty Pups Stop the Mighty Queen
data.overview: The Mighty Pups must stop Sweetie from using her new powers to take over Adventure Bay.

data.name: Mighty Pups Stop the Hiccups
data.overview: Mighty Nano gets the hiccups and starts duplicating out of control, it's up to Liberty and the Mighty Pups to find a cure.

data.name: Pups Save a Disappearing Flounder
data.overview: When Cap'n Turbot's ship disappears, the PAW Patrol must venture into the mysterious Adventure Bay triangle to find the missing vessel.

data.name: Pups Save Little Grandpa and Mr. Alex
data.overview: When Alex and Mr. Porter swap roles, the pups must help track down the Mini-Patrol after they go missing.

data.name: Pups Save the Elephant Spa
data.overview: While trying to save Traveling Travis, Ryder and the pups stumble across the legendary Elephants Spa.

data.name: Pups Save an Underwater Otis
data.overview: Uncle Otis believes he's found gold but when Sid the Pirate tries to jump on Otis's claim, Otis gets trapped in a sunken shipping container.

data.name: Pups vs. the Hum-Flectors
data.overview: After a drone carrying Humdinger's reflecting panel crashes in a tree, the reflector concentrates a beam of light on a wooden bridge, causing it to burn.

data.name: Pups Save a Capybara
data.overview: The Paw Patrol rescues Winnie and a capybara when they go rolling off in a giant exercise ball.

data.name: Pups and Cats Save HumCatDingerMan
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger becomes HumCatDingerMan to steal the spotlight from the Cat Pack.

data.name: Pups Save a Turbot Tournament
data.overview: The pups must save Tilly during the Turbot Tournament.

data.name: Pups Save a Talkative Mini Patrol
data.overview: Alex dreams that his Mini Patrol animals can talk and they take the Bookmobile on a wild ride.

data.name: Pups Save the History of Adventure Bay
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger steals "The History of Adventure Bay," the ancient book falls apart. It's up to the Paw Patrol to retrieve the pages and find the map.

data.name: Rescue Wheels: Pups Save Adventure Bay
data.overview: Adventure Bay is hosting a Monster Truck Rally, featuring truckers Roxi and Boomer. However, when Boomer isn't declared the Champion, he causes chaos all over Adventure Bay to prove he's the best of the best. Ryder invites Roxi to join the Paw Patrol and introduces the Pups' new Rescue Wheel vehicles just in time for them to save Adventure Bay from the havoc caused by Boomer.

data.name: Pups Save a Runaway Robo-Chicken Purse
data.overview: Digi and Tal's inventions to help a busy Mayor Goodway -- a harness with robot hands and a self-propelled chicken purse -- go haywire and lead to a wild woodland chase.

data.name: Pups Save the Buggy Trekkers
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger literally squeezes himself into the Trekkers' friendly dune buggy race, his cheating ways put the other racers in jeopardy and it's up to the Paw Patrol to rescue them.

data.name: Pups Take in a Runaway Kitty!
data.overview: When Rocky Kitty runs away from Mayor Humdinger and tries to join the Paw Patrol, he learns how to be a real hero when he helps the pups rescue Humdinger and the kitties from a wild hang-glider ride.

data.name: Pups Save the Cheese Goat!
data.overview: When the Good Neighbor Robots confuse Farmer Al's request for goat cheese and create a goat out of cheese instead, they wind up the target of a hungry eagle. Cheese Goat and Tal wind up snatched by the ravenous raptor, and the real goats stampede off! It's up to the Paw Patrol to save Tal, the cheese goat, and corral the frightened real goat herd.

data.name: Rescue Wheels: Pups vs. the Monster Mayor
data.overview: Humdinger and Boomer join forces to get Roxi out of the way so that the two can put on the ultimate monster truck show and Humdinger can show off for his mom. But when Boomer steals City Hall to crush it with his truck, the pups must stop him and rescue Mayor Goodway and Helga, who are trapped inside.

data.name: Rescue Wheels: Pups Save the Teetering Tower
data.overview: When Boomer starts swiping vehicles from all over Adventure Bay, the Rescue Wheels roll out to get them back!

data.name: Rescue Wheels: Pups Save the Spelunkers
data.overview: When the Turbot cousins go spelunking, they're left clinging to a stalactite after a cave floor collapses.

data.name: Rescue Wheels: Pups Save the Risky Race
data.overview: When Boomer challenges Roxi in a race to the top of a mountain, his reckless driving causes an avalanche of boulders!

data.name: Rescue Wheels: Pups Save the Runaway Truck
data.overview: When Boomer's monster truck stunt goes wrong, he's left dangling from a drawbridge while his monster truck goes without a driver.

data.name: Pups Plus a Plucky Chicken
data.overview: When Humdinger steals Farmer Al's super-powered seeds, Chickaletta joins the PAW Patrol to help stop the mayor's corny plan.

data.name: Pups Save a Pet Show
data.overview: When Humdinger steals Katie and Cali's tiaras, it's up to the PAW Patrol to save their costumes and the pet show!

data.name: Pups Save Helga & the Humsquatch
data.overview: While Humdinger gets dressed for a day with his Hummy Mummy, the Humsquatch accidentally puts on the mayor's suit and takes his place!

data.name: Pups Save the Missing Bone-Stone
data.overview: When a precious bone goes missing, the pups' only chance at getting it back is to team up with Sweetie!

data.name: Pups Save the Director
data.overview: Francois is directing a video when his camera crane rolls away. The PAW Patrol must rescue Francois and track down his missing camera

data.name: Pups Save the Super Cows
data.overview: Winnie's cow competitor Moona Lisa and Bettina run away during the Super Farm Fair.

data.name: Air Rescue: Pups Save the Airport Opening
data.overview: Adventure Bay is getting a brand-new airport! Sweetie tries to take the Princess' place at the grand opening.

data.name: Pups Save the Mountain Surfers
data.overview: A mighty wind sweeps Zuma and Harrigan off the beach and blows them all the way up to Jake's Mountain.

data.name: Pups Save Humdingers Home Away from Home
data.overview: Humdinger's driving lands him and his trailer at the top of a tall spire.

data.name: Pups Get Your Goat
data.overview: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin Francois are observing a pair of mountain goats when a sudden avalanche strikes.

data.name: Pups Save the Crop Circles
data.overview: Farmer Al finds mysterious crop circles in his corn field, so he calls on the PAW Patrol to find out who is making them.

data.name: Air Rescue: Pups Save a Hum-stronaut
data.overview: Captain Gordy and his Space Shuttle are blasting off from the Adventure Bay Airport with a satellite! But when Mayor Humdinger sneaks on board to snap a couple of selfies, the space shuttle blasts off with him still inside!

data.name: Air Rescue: Pups Stop a Rocket-Powered Pogo Stick
data.overview: Danny's rocket boosted pogo stick accidentally causes a fire! Now it's up to the entire Air Rescue team to save Danny and stop the forest from going up in flames.

data.name: Air Rescue: Pups Save the Sky-High Stunt Show
data.overview: When Francois' big stunt show goes horribly awry, the Air Rescue pups are on a roll!

data.name: Air Rescue: Pups vs. the Hum-Cloud
data.overview: Humdinger builds a mechanical rain cloud to sabotage the Air Rescue Pups' Air Show.

data.name: Air Rescue: Pups Stop the Mid-Air Magnet
data.overview: Uncle Otis gets a powerful magnetic drone but when the magnet malfunctions, the drone starts picking up every metal object in sight!

data.name: Pups Save the Baddies
data.overview: Humdinger, Sid, and Sweetie have joined forces to try and take over the Lookout.

data.name: Pups Save the Yumi Bee
data.overview: Humdinger sabotages Yumi's Bee costume sending her buzzing out of control! It's up to the PAW Patrol to stop the Yumi Bee before the Buzzy Bee-Fest is totally smashed!

data.name: Pups Save the Big Book Delivery
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger's kitties make off with Mayor Goodway's book delivery truck.

data.name: Pups Save the Puppets
data.overview: Julius and Julia get into a sticky situation when the paper bag puppets they created for a puppet show become stuck on the antlers of a deer!

data.name: A Jr. Patrollers' Christmas
data.overview: At a Christmas Eve sleepover, the Jr. Patrollers are fooled into helping Mayor Humdinger steal everyone's stockings so he can get all the presents.

data.name: Pups vs. The Robo-Ducky
data.overview: Digi and Tal build a giant Robo-Ducky that runs amok through Adventure Bay.

data.name: Pups Save the Lost Penguin
data.overview: When Mayor Goodway tries to catch a glimpse of a migrating penguin colony, her precious Chickaletta and a baby penguin accidentally switch places.

data.name: Pups Save the Chicken Conductor!
data.overview: Chickaletta is left driving the train after an enormous chicken floaty launches Engineer Ed out the window!

data.name: Pups Save the Digi-Tal Stylists
data.overview: When Katie needs to close the Pet Parlor early, Digi and Tal volunteer to keep the shop open; however, when they run out of pets to pamper, they bring in wild animals.

data.name: Pups Save the Stage Actor
data.overview: Francois kicks off his production, but he is accidentally transported into the woods and comes face-to-face with mountain lions that threaten his show.

data.name: Pups Save Fogstock
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger's music festival shakes up Adventure Bay and causes a big mess.

data.name: Fire Rescue: Pups Save the Big BBQ
data.overview:
Summary
Adventure Bay is getting a Fire Station! When disaster strikes during the opening day BBQ, it's up to the PAW Patrol in their awesome new Fire Rescue Gear and Vehicles to put it out.

data.name: Hum-Patrol to the Rescue
data.overview: When Adventure Bay holds a raffle, a pair of nesting seagulls snatch the winning prize.

data.name: Pups Save Morning Mountain Yoga
data.overview: A rockslide leaves Mayor Goodway, Farmer Yumi and Garby stranded on the side of a mountain.

data.name: Pups and the Power of Flowers
data.overview: A jealous Mayor Humdinger tries to swipe the florist's Easter decorations and winds up on a runaway wagon with Mayor Goodway

data.name: Pups Save the Alien Egg Hunt
data.overview: When some mysterious Alien Easter Eggs cause trouble in Adventure Bay, the Paw Patrol and their Alien Friend will team up to catch them on the egg hunt!.

data.name: Fire Rescue: Pups Save Lizzy's Lemonade Blaze
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger and his kitties accidentally set Lizzy's Lemonade Stand and parts of Foggy Bottom ablaze, it's up to the Fire Rescue pups to extinguish the fires!

data.name: Fire Rescue: Pups Save the Flaming Flounder
data.overview: Francois' pants catch on fire, sending both the lighthouse and Cap'n Turbot's Flounder up in flames.

data.name: Fire Rescue: Pups Make the News
data.overview: A news crew is in town when Chickaletta accidently causes a fire.

data.name: Fire Rescue: Pups Save a Baby Goat Birthday
data.overview: When Farmer Yumi and Al's baby goat's birthday party goes up in flames, they call on the Fire Rescue Pups to put it out.

data.name: Fire Rescue: Pups Save a S'more-mergency
data.overview: When Mayor Humdinger goes camping, he has just one thing on his mind: s'mores! But roasting marshmallows turns into a recipe for disaster!

data.name: Pups Save Captain Crinkle-cut
data.overview: When Alex dons a french-fry costume, a flock of hungry seagulls carry him off, putting him in a series of perilous predicaments.

data.name: Pups Save the Big Nightlight
data.overview: Mayor Humdinger and the kitties take the lighthouse from Seal Island.

data.name: Skye's Road Trip Rescue
data.overview: Skye, Liberty, and Everest head off on a road trip in a cool new RV. But when a baby deer, rabbit and bear go missing, the three pups must set aside their sight-seeing fun for a high-stakes triple rescue.

data.name: Pups Save the Space Kitty
data.overview: When Humdinger puts on a cat costume, the Alien Kid mistakes him for a real kitty in need of a home and beams Humdinger into his UFO!

data.name: Pups Save the Sea Sponges
data.overview: After a tiring deep-sea dive, Zuma dozes off and dreams about the life he might have if he never joined the PAW Patrol.

series.name: Paw Patrol

aliases.name: PAW Patrol - Helfer auf vier Pfoten

series.overview: PAW Patrol is a CG action-adventure for old children and preschool series starring a pack of six heroic puppies led by a tech-savvy 10-year-old boy named Ryder.

episodes.name: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups
episodes.overview: Paw Patrol Mighty Pups: When their latest scheme goes awry, Mayor Humdinger and his nephew Harold accidentally divert a meteor towards Adventure Bay. The meteor's golden energy grants the PAW Patrol superpowers. The heroic MIGHTY PUPS are on a roll to super-save the day.

episodes.name: Ready, Race, Rescue
episodes.overview: It’s the Adventure Bay 500! The pups are ready to be the pit crew for their race hero, The Whoosh! When the legendary racer is unable to drive in the championship race, he calls on Marshall to take the wheel and race in his place!

episodes.name: PAW Patrol: Jet to the Rescue
episodes.overview: When the scheming Duke steals a levitation gem from the castle, PAW Patrol must come to rescue before the town is lost forever. High-flying adventures to save a stunt pilot, one of Mayor's kittens, and Skye to fly to Jake's Mountain.

episodes.name: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Rubble and Wild and a Yarn Ball!
episodes.overview: Rubble and Wild rescue animals from a giant runaway ball of yarn.

episodes.name: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Skye and Rory Flip It
episodes.overview: Skye and Rory rescue Cora the painter hanging from a scaffold while doing some painting for Mayor Goodway.

episodes.name: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Marshall, Leo and a Ferris Wheel
episodes.overview: Marshall and Leo work together to stop a runaway ferris wheel that has animals on it.

episodes.name: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Everest, Shade and the Mountain Goat
episodes.overview: Everest meets Shade and helps her rescue a baby mountain goat from a ledge.

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Tromping Triceratops
episodes.overview: Mayor Goodway's selfie accidentally spooks a Triceratops headed toward a Velociraptor nest.

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Baby Stegosaurus
episodes.overview: Rex takes a group of stegosaurus on a nature hike only to be interfered with Mayor Humdinger taking control of the Dino Patroller.

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Dino Christmas
episodes.overview: Christmas in the Dino Wilds is interrupted when a volcano causes a landslide that traps a Brachiosaurus and it's up to Ryder and the pups to come to the Dino Rescue.

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Pterodactyl Egg
episodes.overview: A Pterodactyl mother and her egg become trapped on a ledge after a rock slide.

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save the Baby Raptors
episodes.overview: A baby Raptor gets inside the Dino Lookout, which causes commotion. Rex and Zuma race to save the Raptor's siblings, and Ryder and the pups search for its parents.

episodes.name: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Tyrannosaurus' Birthday
episodes.overview: A surprise birthday party for a Tyrannosaurus turns into a dino rescue when the startled guest of honour stomps off, getting stuck in a pit full of quicksand.

episodes.name: Pups and the Kitty-tastrophe
episodes.overview: While Chase and Rubble are playing Frisbee on the beach, they notice a little kitten floating away on a toy boat to the open ocean. The pups are sent out to rescue her, but the kitten just can't stay out of trouble.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Train
episodes.overview: A rock slide blocks a train that has Katie and Cali on it! In addition, a rock damages a trestle under the bridge the train is stopped on! The pups must clear out the rocks unaware that Katie's cat, Cali, has wandered off.

episodes.name: Pup Pup Boogie
episodes.overview: A train car derails and damages the tracks, and another train is scheduled to arrive later with important packages in it, including the all new Pup Pup Boogie 2 dance game! The PAW Patrol must try to fix the tracks before the scheduled train arrives, but how will they be able to do so when Rubble sprains his paw?.

episodes.name: Pups in a Fog
episodes.overview: At night, the sun sets and the light in the Seal Island Lighthouse goes out as a thick fog starts to roll in. Ryder, Zuma, and Chase must reach the lighthouse and fix the light before the MS Princess Maria sails too close to shore and hits the rocks! Meanwhile, the rest of the pups try to stay awake all night in case Ryder needs them.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Sea Turtles
episodes.overview: While playing on the beach, Katie, Alex, Rocky, and Zuma discover a nest of baby sea turtles hatching across the street. The PAW Patrol must make sure the baby sea turtles safely reach the ocean, which is easier said than done when Alex is being reckless around them.

episodes.name: Pups and the Very Big Baby
episodes.overview: Cap'n Turbot calls the PAW Patrol to report a beached baby whale. Ryder and the PAW Patrol must figure out how to get the whale back to her mother before she dehydrates!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Circus
episodes.overview: Ellie, the baby elephant from the circus, has escaped and is loose in Adventure Bay! Her worried mother escapes looking for her, as well! Can the PAW Patrol find Ellie and calm her mom down before they cause a lot of damage in Adventure Bay?.

episodes.name: Pup A Doodle Do
episodes.overview: Mayor Goodway's pet, Chickaletta, pet has gone missing during an important taping of Hello, Adventure Bay! Will the pups be able to find her?.

episodes.name: Pup Pup Goose
episodes.overview: When a flock of geese stop at the PAW Patrol tower during their migration, one of the goslings becomes attached to Marshall, whom Marshall names "Fuzzy." However, when it's time for the geese to continue their migration the next day, Fuzzy goes missing in Adventure Bay!

episodes.name: Pup Pup and Away
episodes.overview: It's the Annual Mayors' Balloon Race, and acrophobic Mayor Goodway is in it trying to win her first race! Luckily, Ryder is going to be with her every step of the way... That is, until she accidentally takes flight in the balloon before Ryder is ready to get in.

episodes.name: Pups Pit Crew
episodes.overview: Alex creates a makeshift "super trike," but it falls apart. Can Ryder and the PAW Patrol help build Alex a better, safer "super trike?".

episodes.name: Pups Fight Fire
episodes.overview: Marshall is training for the fastest firepup race, but his clumsiness keeps getting in his way! Ryder decides to get the other pups to help motivate him through the actual time trial. Will Marshall be able to become the fastest firepup in the world?

episodes.name: Pups Save the Bunnies
episodes.overview: Bunnies have invaded Farmer Yumi's carrot garden! The PAW Patrol are deployed to round them up and relocate them, but it's harder than it sounds when a few escape to other parts of the town.

episodes.name: Puptacular
episodes.overview: Katie wants to enter a pup in the Puptacular dog show. Unfortunately, every willing candidate is occupied with PAW Patrol duties: Marshall and Rubble have to fix and clean their trucks for an upcoming inspection; and Ryder, Zuma, Skye, and Chase are deployed to the ocean to rescue Mayor Goodway and her chicken from drifting out to sea! That only leaves aquaphobic Rocky as a possible candidate for the Puptacular dog show, which would be easy for him to do if he didn't have to take a bath.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Bay
episodes.overview: An oil tanker hits some rocks causing oil to spill into Adventure Bay! Things get worse when a baby whale gets covered in the oil after swimming into it! The PAW Patrol must temporarily fix the source of the oil spill, clean the whale, and prevent the oil from spreading further before any harm can be done to the sea life.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Goodway
episodes.overview: Mayor Goodway sends the statue of her great-great-grandfather, Grover Goodway, to be cleaned in time for Great-Great-Great-Great-Grandpa Grover Day. On its way back aboard Cap'n Turbot's boat, The Flounder, the statue falls into the bay prompting an underwater-recovery! To further complicate matters, a reckless baby whale is swimming in the area.

episodes.name: Pups Get a Rubble
episodes.overview: Ryder tells Mayor Goodway about how Rubble was rescued, helped rescue Jake from a snow cave, and became the most recent member of the PAW Patrol.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Walrus
episodes.overview: While the PAW Patrol are competitively cleaning the beach of scattered recyclables, Wally gets trapped in a net underwater! It is up to the PAW Patrol to rescue Wally before he drowns.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Treats
episodes.overview: Mr. Porter's van slides onto the frozen bay during a delivery! It is up to the PAW Patrol to save the van and the new pup food inside of it.

episodes.name: Pups Get a Lift
episodes.overview: The chair lift at the ski resort breaks down. Everyone is able to evacuate the lift except for Katie and Cali who are stuck high above the snow! Ryder and the PAW Patrol must help rescue Katie and Cali and repair the chair lift.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Hoedown
episodes.overview: Out-of-towner Farmer Al's herd of cows escape from their train car during Adventure Bay's Western Town Hoedown! It's up to Ryder and the PAW Patrol to wrangle them up before the train leaves.

episodes.name: Pups Save Alex
episodes.overview: Alex wants to help the PAW Patrol on a real mission and tags along when they go to rescue Cali who is stuck on top of Farmer Yumi's silo.

episodes.name: Pups and the Ghost Pirate
episodes.overview: It's Halloween-time in Adventure Bay, and the pups are trick-or-treating. However, trick-or-treating is cut short when Cap'n Turbot's "pirate" ship, where a Halloween Party is being held, mysteriously drifts off along with a boat-load of passengers and a series of unexplained ghostly business. Ryder and the pups must board the ship and try to make sense of all the unexplained ghostly actions.

episodes.name: Pups Save a School Day
episodes.overview: It's Alex's first day of school but he lost his backpack, so the PAW Patrol agree to help him find it. Easier said than done when Alex says that his backpack could be in many places around Adventure Bay, prompting all the pups to be deployed to all corners of the city. Not to mention they have limited time before the school bus arrives.

episodes.name: Pups Turn on the Lights
episodes.overview: Everyone is planning a surprise birthday party for Chase at Katie's vet clinic. However, the party is put on delay because of a major wind storm that breaks one of the power windmills, leaving a chunk of Adventure Bay in a blackout. The PAW Patrol are deployed to the windmills to fix them while the rest continue with preparing for Chase's surprise party.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Pool Day
episodes.overview: It's a hot day and the pups head for the water park - but the pool is empty!

episodes.name: Circus Pup-Formers
episodes.overview: When the animals don't show up in time for the circus to start, Ryder and the Paw Patrol step in to help.

episodes.name: Pups Make a Splash
episodes.overview: When Cap'n Turbot's boat runs aground, Ryder, Zuma, Skye, and Rocky must team up to save it before it sinks.

episodes.name: Pups Fall Festival
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol must pick all of Farmer Yumi's fruit before an early snowstorm comes! But how can Chase help?.

episodes.name: Pups Save Christmas
episodes.overview: When Santa's Sleigh crashes and the reindeer run off, Ryder and the Paw Patrol have to help Santa finish delivering presents and save Christmas.

episodes.name: Pups on Ice
episodes.overview: It's a snow day in Adventure Bay! However, up in Jake's Mountain, Alex is trying to snowboard but gets himself (and Jake) in danger! Can the PAW Patrol help?

episodes.name: Pups and the Snow Monster
episodes.overview: The Pups are alerted to sightings of a mysterious snow creature and strange footprints in the snow on Jake's Mountain, which some locals believe it is evidence of the the dreaded "Snow Monster" which according to local myth is said to live on Jake's mountain. Jake asks the PAW Patrol to investigate and hopefully prove it doesn't exist, or Jake may have to close the ski slopes.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Super Pup
episodes.overview: Rubble gets into trouble while pretending to be like his favorite super hero, Apollo the SuperPup.

episodes.name: Pups Save Ryder's Robot
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol must help Ryder find his robot pup when the antenna breaks and robot pup is out of control in adventure bay.

episodes.name: Pups Go All Monkey
episodes.overview: When Mandy the monkey escapes from her cage on the train, Ryder and the PAW Patrol are lead on a wild chase through Adventure Bay!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Hoot
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol are "WHO" to call when a mother owl loses her baby.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Bat
episodes.overview: A baby Bat decides to take a nap hanging from the Town Hall's bell and Mayor Goodway can't ring it. Ryder and the Pups attempt to rescue the bat quietly so it doesn't wake up, but it does and causes trouble around town.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Toof
episodes.overview: Chase finds he has loose tooth, but is terrified of going to the dentist to have it checked out. Meanwhile Alex is refusing to go to the dentist for a check up because of his own fear of going to the dentist, forcing Mr. Porter to call the PAW Patrol. Wanting to help Alex overcome his fear of going to the dentist, Ryder and the Pups must overcome their own fears in order to encourage Alex to do the same, which forces Chase to face his own fear of the dentist.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Easter Egg Hunt
episodes.overview: It’s Adventure Bay’s annual Easter Egg Hunt and the pups are helping Mayor Goodway with the egg decorating. The hunt for a very special egg leads Ryder and the PAW Patrol on an exciting adventure.

episodes.name: Pups and the Lighthouse Boogie
episodes.overview: Mayor Goodway and Alex take a rowboat out into the bay to get a closer look at a baby whale. A storm is approaching though and the rowboat drifts out of control towards the sea. It's up to the PAW Patrol to rescue them!

episodes.name: Pups Save Ryder
episodes.overview: While out on a hike, Ryder discovers that Garbie the goat is stuck on the edge of a cliff! He attempts to rescue Garbie, but gets stranded in the process. He calls the pups for help, but drops his Pup-Pad down the cliff side! Now the pups have to save Ryder... all on their own!

episodes.name: Pups Great Race
episodes.overview: It's Adventure Bay Race Day and the pups are about to race each other all across the town to see who is the fastest pup. One other competitor unexpectedly shows up though, Alex in his super trike!

episodes.name: Pups Take the Cake
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol help build an entry for the Biggest and Tastiest Cake Contest.

episodes.name: Pups and the Beanstalk
episodes.overview: Rubble has a wondrous dream, similar to "Jack and the Beanstalk," in which Marshall grows a giant beanstalk.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Turbots
episodes.overview: Francois gets involved in Cap'n Turbot's quest to take a picture of the rare Blue-Footed Booby Bird.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Camping Trip
episodes.overview: Skye and Rocky are excited to go on their Pup Scouts camping trip, and the rest of the Pups join in when Chickaletta falls into a crevice.

episodes.name: Pups and the Trouble with Turtles
episodes.overview: The Lookout is invaded by a group of cute freshwater turtles.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Space Alien
episodes.overview: An alien lands on Earth at Farmer Yumi's place, and the gang try to repair his spaceship so he can return home.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Flying Frog
episodes.overview: Marshall gets a pet frog, and it jumps into Skye's helicopter prior to a big frog-jumping competition.

episodes.name: Pups and the Pirate Treasure
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol searches for the treasure of the infamous Pirate Captain Blackfur after Cap'n Turbot accidentally ends up in Blackfur's secret pirate cave.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Penguins
episodes.overview: The pups must find a way to get a group of penguins back to the South Pole.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Dolphin Pup
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol must help a Baby Dolphin get back into the bay with her parents.

episodes.name: Pups Save Jake
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol must rescue Jake when his ankle gets stuck between some fallen rocks.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Parade
episodes.overview: Katie's bathtub float floats away when Alex puts too many balloons on it during Adventure Bay Day.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Diving Bell
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol uses Zuma's new submarine to help Cap'n Turbot.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Beavers
episodes.overview: When a storm washes away Chompy the Beaver's dam, he starts chomping wood all over town.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Ghost
episodes.overview: A mysterious Ghost is causing havoc around the Lookout at night. The Pups and Chase in his new SPY GEAR set up a stakeout to bust it, but discover that it's not a ghost after all - its Marshall... sleepwalking! Now the pups have to save the slumbering pup as he sleepwalks through town!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Show
episodes.overview: The Pups are going to put on a Medieval play in town square, but Cap'n Turbot's castle stage prop ends up collapsing and trapping him! Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to save Turbot, along with Marshall in his new FIRST MEDICAL RESPONSE GEAR. Marshall then has to save the SHOW when Chase gets sick and can't play the lead role!

episodes.name: Pups Save an Ace
episodes.overview: Skye's favorite stunt pilot, Ace Sorensen, is heading to Adventure Bay to put on a fantastic air show. Just before arrival she runs into engine trouble! It's up to Skye and the PAW Patrol to save Ace and her plane so the show can go on!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Wedding
episodes.overview: Farmer Al and Farmer Yumi are getting married! Farmer Yumi's barn is being decorated for the big day and all the pups are helping. A big storm blows in and takes down a wall of the barn! It's up to Ryder and the PAW Patrol to save the barn and the day - the wedding day!

episodes.name: The New Pup
episodes.overview: Ryder surprises the pups with their newest vehicle - THE PAW PATROLLER! Now the PAW Patrol can save the day outside of Adventure Bay in this 18 wheeler, mobile Lookout! It's just in time too because Jake ends up lost in the south pole when he loses his equipment and phone - Pups to the rescue! While the pups race down, an Arctic storm picks up, but Jake finds help from a brave mountain ranger pup named Everest!

episodes.name: Pups Jungle Trouble
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol heads to the Jungle in the PAW Patroller to meet Ryder's 10 year old pen-pal, Carlos. They also meet up with an old friend, Mandy the Monkey! Still up to her old tricks, Mandy swipes Ryder's PupPad and it's a wild Monkey chase through the jungle that leads to a cursed temple. Now Ryder and Pups have to get Mandy out of the ancient ruins, and avoid all the booby traps in the process!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Herd
episodes.overview: Chase is taking part in a herding competition and starts to herd people around town as practice which causes more trouble than good. Farmer Al calls Ryder and needs help to fix his fence and herd all the sheep! Now the Pups have to fix the fence and Chase has to herd all the sheep in time to make it to the competition!

episodes.name: Pups and the Big Freeze
episodes.overview: A winter ice storm causes trouble all over Adventure Bay. Mayor Goodway's car hit's an icy patch and gets stuck in the snow. The PAW Patrol races to the rescue, but the roads aren't the only thing affected by the ice. The Engineer's train can't break on the icy tracks and it's headed for a huge snow drift on the crossing! Ryder, Rubble, and Everest have to get there in time and clear out all the snow and ice!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Basketball Game
episodes.overview: Mayor Goodway challenges Mayor Humdinger's Basketball team to a game. The only thing Mayor Goodway is missing though is a...Basketball team! She calls Ryder and the PAW Patrol for help, and Ryder thinks the pups would make a great team! The pups become the Adventure Bay All-Stars and they'll need everyone, including a reluctant Marshall, to pitch in and help win one for Mayor Goodway and the town. Nothing but net!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Talent Show
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol becomes a band and performs at the Adventure Bay Talent Show.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Corn Roast
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol must find Chickaletta when she is trapped inside a corn maze filled with popcorn.

episodes.name: Pups Leave Marshall Home Alone
episodes.overview: Katie calls with an emergency while Marshall is the only pup available.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Deer
episodes.overview: Cap'n Turbot goes ice fishing and finds a family of deer stranded out on the ice.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Friend
episodes.overview: When Marshall feels hurt when he thinks the pups say he can't do anything right, he moves to the forest where he finds a rabbit family.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Stowaway
episodes.overview: Cali tags along with the PAW Patrol on their road trip.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Parrot
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol heads to the jungle to help their friend find his lost parrot.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Queen Bee
episodes.overview: A beehive must be relocated because it's inside the lighthouse.

episodes.name: Pups' Adventures in Babysitting
episodes.overview: The gang must babysit the mayor's twin niece and nephew, who are quite a handful.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Fireworks
episodes.overview: A package mix-up occurs, and the mayor receives piglets instead of fireworks.

episodes.name: Pups Save an Elephant Family
episodes.overview: The pups go on a safari and wind up reuniting a family of elephants.

episodes.name: Pups and the Mischievous Kittens
episodes.overview: A group of rowdy kittens wreak havoc on the town.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Mer-Pup
episodes.overview: The gang turn into Mer-Pups in order to rescue their new pals who live in the ocean.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Sniffle
episodes.overview: Katie takes care of Chase, Zuma and Skye when they catch a cold.

episodes.name: Pups and the Ghost Cabin
episodes.overview: The pups believe that an old cabin is haunted.

episodes.name: Pups Save an Adventure
episodes.overview: Marshall is able to use his vast knowledge of fire safety at a campsite.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Surprise
episodes.overview: All of Adventure Bay surprises the pups with an appreciation party, which they set up as the pups help Cap'n Turbot find Wally.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Mayor's Race
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger plans to cheat in the annual Mayor's Race.

episodes.name: Pups Save an Outlaw's Loot
episodes.overview: Ryder and Mayor Goodway find a treasure map while sorting through the old cabin of Outlaw Wild Wilbur.

episodes.name: Pups Save Walinda
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol must come to the rescue when Wally's special friend, Walinda, gets tangled in an anchor chain.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Big Bone
episodes.overview: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin are in the middle of an archaeological dig when the cliff they are on collapses all around them.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Floundering Francois
episodes.overview: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin Francois are watching white whales in Adventure Bay when their boat hits a rock and starts to sink.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Pop-Up Penguins
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol must track down some loose penguins and help them return to the land of ice and snow.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Pizza
episodes.overview: A pizza-dough delivery goes awry when the van delivering it winds up hanging off of a cliff.

episodes.name: Pups Save Skye
episodes.overview: Skye's wing gets broken in a storm, so Ryder asks Everest to rescue her.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Woof and Roll Show
episodes.overview: A pop star comes to town, but a storm hits Adventure Bay and damages the performance stage, so the gang must fix it quickly.

episodes.name: Pups Save an Eagle
episodes.overview: Chickaletta falls near an eagle's nest, but the eagle is caught in twine and is also in danger.

episodes.name: Pups Bark With Dinosaurs
episodes.overview: Baby dinosaurs run amok in Adventure Bay after the gang find three fossilized dinosaur eggs.

episodes.name: Pup-Fu!
episodes.overview: Sensei Yumi teaches the pups the ancient art of Pup-Fu.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Snowboard Competition
episodes.overview: The course for a snowboard competition is covered in snow.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Chicken of the Sea
episodes.overview: Cap'n Turbot installs new software for his diving bell.

episodes.name: Pups Find a Genie
episodes.overview: In the third-season opener, Rubble finds a genie and is granted three wishes, but the genie's magic isn't perfected yet.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Tightrope Walker
episodes.overview: A tightrope walker needs help when a flock of seagulls get in his way.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Soccer Game
episodes.overview: The pups discover that their opponents in a soccer match are cheating.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Lucky Collar
episodes.overview: Marshall wins a supposedly lucky collar, leading him to take unnecessary risks while helping Cap'n Turbot save an owl.

episodes.name: Air Pups
episodes.overview: Ryder and the pups use their new Air Patroller to find a family of monkeys working with Cap'n Turbot and Francois.

episodes.name: Pups Save Friendship Day
episodes.overview: While celebrating Friendship Day, the pups must prevent Mayor Humdinger from ruining Adventure Bay's reputation as the friendliest town on the map.

episodes.name: Pups Save Alex's Mini-Patrol
episodes.overview: The pups prepare for Adventure Bay's Tree Dedication Ceremony and end up receiving help from Alex Porter's newly-formed "mini-patrol."

episodes.name: Pups Save a Lost Tooth
episodes.overview: The pups' boat ride with Cap'n Turbot is postponed when they must track down a lost tooth.

episodes.name: Pups Save Daring Danny X
episodes.overview: Ryder performs an incredible stunt during a rescue, inspiring a young boy to become a daredevil.

episodes.name: Pups in a Fix
episodes.overview: Ryder entrusts the care of Adventure Bay to Robo-Dog while he and the pups take a vacation, but this leads to problems when Robo-Dog tinkers with Cap'n Turbot's boat, the Flounder.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Goldrush
episodes.overview: The pups search for gold using Rocky's makeshift sifting tools.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Paw Patroller
episodes.overview: The pups take a break from washing the PAW Patroller. When they return, the PAW Patroller is missing because Mayor Humdinger wants to use it's TV to watch his favorite show when the Kitten Catastrophe Crew accidentally break his big screen.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Dragon
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol performs a play in which Katie is a princess in a tower.

episodes.name: Pups Save Three Little Pigs
episodes.overview: Rubble builds a brick house for three pigs on a farm.

episodes.name: Pups Save Apollo
episodes.overview: Rubble dreams about saving his idol, Apollo the Super-Pup, from an evil Spider King.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Hippos
episodes.overview: Zuma feels left out when he cannot assist in a mission involving a trio of circus hippos.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Polar Bears
episodes.overview: Jake and Everest help Cap'n Turbot count polar bears, when The Flounder accidentally cracks a sheet of ice, setting a couple polar bear cubs out onto ice floes heading out to open water. Ryder and the pups must fly to the Arctic in the Air Patroller to rescue the lost cubs. Everest helps the PAW Patrol search and lures the frightened baby bears back to shore and their mother bear.

episodes.name: A Pup in Sheep's Clothing
episodes.overview: When little lambs keep running away from Farmer Al's pasture, it's up to the PAW Patrol to find the missing sheep and discover who's been making holes in the fence. Super Spy Chase uses his spy gear and tools to search for the culprit from outside the pasture, while Marshall infiltrates the flock by dressing up like a sheep. Despite the pups' efforts, three lambs manage to escape and get trapped in a cave. Now Marshall a.k.a Baaaaney, must save them and bring the real lambs home.

episodes.name: Pups Save a School Bus
episodes.overview: The school bus breaks, so Rocky repairs it while Ryder uses the PAW Patroller to transport the kids. While fixing the bus, the kids hop into some pups' vehicles and drive off! The PAW Patroller drives off, too, and it's up to the PAW Patrol to rescue them all.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Songbirds
episodes.overview: Egg nests are found with the mother songbirds missing, so Ryder and Chase begin searching for the mama birds.

episodes.name: Pups Save Old Trusty
episodes.overview: Ryder investigates when jets of water start springing up all over town

episodes.name: Pups Save a Pony
episodes.overview: The Paw Patrol helps a rancher find a spooked horse.

episodes.name: All Star Pups!
episodes.overview: The pups' game of kickball is interrupted when an eagle steals their ball. Now Skye and Everest must face the bird and save the day.

episodes.name: Pups Save Sports Day
episodes.overview: The All Star Pups are ready to compete in the summer sports day when Daring Danny X turns the field into an ice rink!

episodes.name: Tracker Joins the Pups!
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol's newest member, Tracker, helps find an ancient crown.

episodes.name: Parroting Pups
episodes.overview: Rocky loses his voice while visiting Tracker in the jungle, so a talkative parrot helps him fulfill his PAW Patrol duties.

episodes.name: Merpups Save the Turbots
episodes.overview: Cap'n Turbot and Francois try to catch magical mer-pups on film. When they accidentally lure a giant sea slug on top of their diving bell in the process, the mer-pups must rescue them.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Robo-Saurus
episodes.overview: The pups set out to recover a missing robotic dinosaur.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Film Festival
episodes.overview: The pups have trouble filming their entry for a film festival.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Stinky Flower
episodes.overview: Mayor Humdinger drops off a 'gift' to Mayor Goodway, a flower that spreads a horrible stink when it blooms. Mayor Goodway tries to return it to him, but runs into trouble and has to be rescued by the PAW Patrol. It takes Ryder, the pups, and Rocky's brand new tugboat to get that stinky plant out of Adventure Bay before it explodes stink seeds everywhere.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Monkey-Naut
episodes.overview: A UFO has just splashed down in the bay! When Ryder and the pups pop the hatch, they find a monkey astronaut with a broken spacecraft and no way back into space. It's the PAW Patrol to the rescue! Ryder and the pups will have to launch the space capsule from the Air Patroller to get the monkey back into space in time to complete his mission!

episodes.name: Pups Bear-ly Save Danny
episodes.overview: Hungry bears are in pursuit of Daring Danny X, who's stuck in a tree over a canyon.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Mayor's Tulips
episodes.overview: Mayor Goodway's tulips are damaged prior to a contest, and sabotage is to blame.

episodes.name: Pups Get Growing
episodes.overview: The pups must stop overgrown tomatoes from rolling around Adventure Bay

episodes.name: Pups Save a Space Toy
episodes.overview: Marshall is beamed into the sky by space aliens.

episodes.name: Pups in a Jam
episodes.overview: The pups take care of an ant infestation on the day of Adventure Bay's jam festival

episodes.name: Pups Save a Windsurfing Pig
episodes.overview: Zuma tracks down a pig on a windsurfing board

episodes.name: Pups Save the Gliding Turbots
episodes.overview: When Francois and Cap'n Turbot become stranded on a remote island, Ryder and the pups fly in to find and rescue the bickering cousins.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Plane
episodes.overview: It's a double daring mid-air rescue as Mayor Goodway's first flying lesson goes sideways, and the pups make sure everyone lands safely.

episodes.name: Pups Get Skunked
episodes.overview: The pups' hunt for berries is cut short when Everest is sprayed by a skunk

episodes.name: Pups and a Whale of a Tale
episodes.overview: During a whale watching trip, Cap'n Turbot finds a baby whale trapped under an ice sheet.

episodes.name: The Pups' Winter Wonder Show
episodes.overview: The Snow-Show's in jeopardy when the penguins are kidnapped by Mayor Humdinger, so the pups and Tracker mount a rescue mission.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Giant Plant
episodes.overview: Tracker's new Venus flytrap grows at an unexpected rate after being planted in an unsuitable area.

episodes.name: Pups Get Stuck
episodes.overview: Rubble's electromagnet falls into Marshall's fire truck, magnetizing the vehicle and causing problems around the town.

episodes.name: Pups Raise the Paw Patroller
episodes.overview: The pups must find a way to save their waterlogged 18-wheeler after Daring Danny X accidentally sinks it to the bottom of Adventure Bay in an attempt to a stunt.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Crows
episodes.overview: Two crows start to steal objects from around Adventure Bay, including hats needed for the town's "Hat-a-palooza" event.

episodes.name: Pups Save Their Floating Friends
episodes.overview: A "floating ray" from outer space causes the people of Adventure Bay to float in mid-air.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Satellite
episodes.overview: The PAW Patrol must stop an out-of-orbit satellite from crashing in time to catch Rubble's favorite TV show.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Blimp
